title: Innovation & AI Intern
description:
**Role: Innovation & AI Intern** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden** 




**Start Date: September** 




**Working Arrangement: Recommended five days per week. Minimum 9 months** 




  





  





**About Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)** 




  





**Building greater futures through innovation and collective knowledge** 




 Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) is a global IT services, consulting and business solutions company partnering with many of the world’s largest organizations. With
 **600,000 experts worldwide** 
 and
 **18,000+ consultants supporting Nordic clients** 
 , we drive digital transformation, innovation and purpose-led impact across industries.
 



 In Sweden we work with more than 50 companies who are leaders in their own space. With them we have long term and trustful relationships. TCS in Sweden and Nordics has been ranked as a Top Employer for 12 consecutive years that reflects the organization’s commitment to an inclusive, empowered and entrepreneurial work culture.
 



 We now welcome applications for a hands‑on Innovation & AI Internship within our Nordic Innovation team. This role gives you real exposure to AI-driven innovation, ecosystem activities, research, and the daily operations of our Stockholm PACE Studio.
 



  





**Tasks & Responsibilities** 




  





**Your Role & Assignments** 




 As an
 **Innovation & AI Intern,** 
 you will support the team across all innovation activities. Typical tasks include:
 



  





**Innovation & Workshop Support** 




  




* Assist in preparing and delivering innovation and AI-focused workshops
* Help set up the PACE Studio for customer visits and demos
* Capture notes, insights and learnings from client and internal sessions



  





**AI & Trend Research** 




  




* Conduct quick desk research on emerging AI trends, tools and use cases
* Prepare short briefs, summaries or slides for internal and client discussions



  





**Events & Ecosystem Support** 




  




* Help plan and coordinate events such as Lunch & Learn sessions, roundtables and hackathons
* Support engagement with startups, universities and research partners, including AI ecosystem actors



  





**Team Coordination** 




  




* Assist with simple project coordination tasks (scheduling, follow-ups, SharePoint/material updates)
* Work closely with the Innovation Lead and Innovation Analyst on day-to-day activities



 This is a broad role designed to give you a strong foundation in innovation methods, AI trends, workshop facilitation and ecosystem engagement.
 



  





  





  





**Your Qualifications** 




  




* Interest AND solid understanding of
 **AI, digital technologies or innovation**
* Experience from student projects, events, or tech-related activities is a plus
* Strong communication skills in
 **English and Swedish**
* Good proficiency with
 **MS Office** 
 (PowerPoint, Excel, Word)
* Curious, organised, proactive and comfortable engaging with multiple stakeholdersProficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word, SharePoint)



  





**What You Gain** 




  




* Practical exposure to
 **AI and innovation** 
 in a global tech company
* Experience with workshops, research, ecosystem engagement and studio operations
* Mentorship from the Nordic Innovation team
* Opportunity to contribute to real client and partner activities
* High-performing interns may be considered for future roles in the team



  





  





**Privacy Note:** 




**https://ibegin.tcs.com/iBegin/privacy-notice**

title: Senior Network Automation Engineer
description:
**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU’LL DO** 
  

  





 We’re looking for a
 **Senior Network Automation Engineer** 
 to join our Network team and help automate and optimize global network infrastructure. In this role, you’ll build tools and platforms that enhance visibility, resilience, and speed deployment across retail, warehouse, and data center environments. You’ll work closely with network engineers and architects to design scalable systems for multi-vendor networks (Cisco, Aruba).
   

  





 In addition to the above, your role will involve:
   

  




* Design, develop, and
 **implement network automation** 
 solutions using
 **Python and Ansible** 
 .
* Apply
 **DevOps** 
 principles to streamline workflows, including CI/CD processes.
* Oversee software development processes, including testing, code analysis, and release management.
* Lead network automation initiatives.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive projects to completion.
* Independently manage development tasks and initiatives, even in the absence of clear direction.



**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH** 
  

  





 You’ll be working closely with our
 **Networking team** 
 to design and evolve our global network infrastructure across data centers, warehouses, and retail environments. This is a collaborative environment where the team operates cutting-edge technology that’s always on, while also fostering a culture of fun and teamwork.
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE** 
  

  





 We are looking for people to have experience with...
   

  




* Proficiency in
 **Python** 
 and at least one other programming language
* Experience with Network automation frameworks
* Understanding of
 **Networking fundamentals** 
 (TCP/IP, DNS, routing, switching)
* Familiarity with
 **CI/CD** 
 workflows and tools
* Experience with
 **REST APIs** 
 , event-driven systems, and webhook-based integrations



 Nice to have:
   

  




* Master's in computer science, Network Engineering, Data Science, or related field.
* Experience automating Cisco, Aruba, or cloud networking.
* Knowledge of hybrid cloud environments.
* Advanced Python skills.
* Proven DevOps experience (CI/CD workflows).
* Strong grasp of software development best practices.
* 2-3 years in network automation.
* Expertise in routing, switching, and Cisco/Aruba technologies.
* Ability to work independently and in teams.



 And people who are…
   

  




* Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset.
* Able to work independently and collaboratively in a global team.
* Passionate about innovation, automation, and continuous improvement.
* Excellent in communication and documentation skills.



**WHO WE ARE** 
  

  





 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE**




 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe.
   

  




* Staff discount card: Usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online.
* H&M Incentive Program (HIP): Included in our HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
* Competitive pensions: Collective Agreement and ITP pensions competitive to the Swedish market.
* Generous vacation: 30 days' vacation, health care allowance, and good work-life balance.
* Additional perks: Discounts from Benify.
* Innovative Environment: Work with cutting-edge technology and innovative solutions.
* Global Impact: Be part of a team that influences users worldwide.
* Professional Growth: Endless opportunities to learn and develop your skills.
* Collaborative Culture: Join a motivated team that values collaboration and excellence.



**JOIN US** 
  

  





 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.
   

  





 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.

title: Lagrings- och Backupspecialist
description:
**Startdatum:** 
 2026-06-15
   

  

**Slutdatum:** 
 2027-06-30 (option på förlängning)
   

  

**Omfattning:** 
 100%
   

  

**Plats:** 
 Sundbyberg / Hybrid (distansarbete möjligt 2 av 3 dagar)
   

  

**Uppdragsbeskrivning**
 Vi söker en senior specialist inom lagring och backup för ett långsiktigt uppdrag hos en större verksamhet med komplex IT-infrastruktur. Rollen omfattar ansvar för drift, förvaltning och vidareutveckling av lösningar inom enterprise-lagring och backup.
   

  

 Uppdraget innebär både operativt arbete med incidenthantering och daglig administration samt strategiskt arbete med livscykelhantering, införande av nya funktioner och avveckling av befintliga tjänster och plattformar. Konsulten kommer att arbeta nära flera tekniska team i en miljö med höga krav på stabilitet, tillgänglighet och säkerhet.
   

  

**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:**
* Drift och administration av lagrings- och backupmiljöer
* Incidenthantering, felsökning och problemlösning
* Livscykelhantering och uppgraderingar av befintliga plattformar
* Utvärdering och införande av nya tekniska funktioner och tjänster
* Dokumentation och förbättring av rutiner och processer
* Samarbete med andra teknik- och driftteam inom infrastrukturområdet


**Skall-krav**
* Minst 8 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av enterprise-lagring och backup i större IT-miljöer
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av arbete med NetApp ONTAP
* Erfarenhet av drift och förvaltning i komplexa infrastrukturlandskap
* God vana av incidenthantering och teknisk felsökning
* Erfarenhet av arbete i större organisationer med höga krav på tillgänglighet
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat och självständigt


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av Commvault
* Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt
* Tidigare arbete i säkerhetskritiska eller reglerade miljöer
* Erfarenhet av utveckling och förbättring av infrastrukturtjänster

title: Informationsarkitekt
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
 Vill du arbeta i gränslandet mellan verksamhet och teknik och skapa struktur i komplex information? På Sopra Steria söker vi nu en
 **Informationsarkitekt** 
 som vill bidra till att göra organisationers information begriplig, strukturerad och möjlig att använda fullt ut.
   

  

 Som informationsarkitekt hos oss arbetar du i varierande och ofta samhällsviktiga uppdrag där
 **information, data och begreppslig tydlighet är avgörande för framgång** 
 . Du hjälper våra kunder att skapa förståelse för sin information och lägga grunden för hållbara digitala lösningar.
   

  

 I rollen ansvarar du för att strukturera och definiera verksamhetens information så att den blir
 **begriplig för kunden och möjlig att realisera tekniskt** 
 . Du arbetar nära verksamheten, arkitekter och utvecklingsteam för att säkerställa att information förstås på samma sätt genom hela organisationen – från strategi till implementation.
   

  

 En central del av arbetet är
 **informations- och datamodellering** 
 , där du översätter verksamhetens behov till konceptuella och logiska modeller som stödjer både dagens och morgondagens lösningar.
   

  

**Dina arbetsuppgifter**
**Som Informationsarkitekt Kommer Du Bland Annat Att**
* Kartlägga och strukturera verksamhetens informationslandskap
* Ta fram begreppsmodeller, informationsmodeller och logiska datamodeller
* Etablera gemensamma begrepp och semantiska definitioner i organisationen
* Säkerställa spårbarhet mellan verksamhetsbehov, information och systemlösningar
* Bidra till arbetet med data governance, masterdata och datakvalitet
* Ta fram metoder, riktlinjer och arbetssätt för informationsarkitektur
* Stödja projekt och utvecklingsteam i frågor kring information och datamodellering


 Du arbetar nära verksamhetsrepresentanter, arkitekter och utvecklingsteam och bidrar till att skapa en
 **gemensam förståelse för information och dess betydelse i organisationen** 
 .
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Du är en strukturerad och analytisk person som drivs av att skapa
 **ordning, tydlighet och kvalitet i information** 
 . Du trivs i dialog med verksamheten och har förmågan att omsätta komplexa behov till modeller och strukturer som går att realisera i teknik.
   

  

**Vi Tror Att Du**
* Har relevant utbildning inom IT, informationsarkitektur, systemvetenskap eller liknande
* Har god erfarenhet av informationsmodellering och/eller datamodellering i komplexa miljöer
* Är van att arbeta verksamhetsnära och facilitera workshops kring begrepp och information
* Har god förståelse för skillnaden mellan informationsmodell och datamodell
* Har erfarenhet av modelleringsspråk som UML och/eller ER-diagram
* Har arbetat i eller nära initiativ inom data management, MDM eller informationsstyrning


 Du har en god kommunikativ förmåga och kan förklara informations- och datamodeller på ett pedagogiskt sätt för både tekniska och icke-tekniska intressenter. Du behärskar
 **svenska och engelska flytande i tal och skrift** 
 .
   

  

**Varför välja Sopra Steria?**
* En plats där din kompetens verkligen gör skillnad – Vi bygger smarta och hållbara lösningar som förbättrar samhälle och verksamheter med användarupplevelsen i centrum.
* Stark företagskultur med Power of Sharing – Vi tror på kraften i kunskapsdelning, transparens och samarbete. Hos oss når vi längre tillsammans.
* Toppbetyg som arbetsplats – Great Place to Work har rankat oss år efter år som en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser och vi har mottagit utmärkelsen Karriärföretag flera år i rad.
* Del av en europeisk ledare inom digital transformation – Med över 50 000 experter i många länder kan vi både påverka stora projekt och ge dig möjligheter att växa globalt.
* Värderingar som genomsyrar allt vi gör – Vi sätter kundens behov i fokus, värderar respekt, professionalitet, nyfikenhet och en kollektiv förmåga att agera positivt och skapa hållbara resultat tillsammans.


**Ansökan**
 Nu vill vi gärna höra lite om dig! Ansök enkelt genom att antingen ladda upp ditt CV eller länka direkt till ditt LinkedIn-konto via annonsen. Om det fortfarande finns något du funderar över är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef Marie Berg, marie.berg@soprasteria.com eller Talent Acquisition Partner Svante Larsson, svante.larsson2@soprasteria.com
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att få höra ifrån dig!
   

  

 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.

title: Liquidity Risk Analyst | SEB, Stockholm
description:
Join a critical function safeguarding SEB’s resilience and shaping our liquidity risk framework. Your expertise will drive positive change in an evolving financial world.
   

  

 At SEB, we recognise that the world of finance is evolving at an extraordinary speed. That’s why we’re committed to driving towards a more sustainable future for everyone — people, businesses, and society. Since we welcomed our first customer in 1856, we have been a catalyst for positive change by providing reliable advice and capital to people with ideas for the future. If you are ready to make your mark on our industry and positively shape the world, you will thrive at SEB.
   

  

**About the role:**
 You will join a critical function within our CRO organization, safeguarding SEB’s resilience by shaping its liquidity risk framework. This role offers deep insight into banking operations, liquidity dynamics, and risk management in a regulated environment. You’ll drive the maintenance and development of liquidity risk models and scenarios, collaborating closely with Treasury and stakeholders across all business areas. Your work directly supports senior management decision-making and ensures our balance sheet connects to business strategy.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* A university degree in mathematics, economics, engineering, finance, or a related field.
* At least 3 years of professional experience in liquidity risk, finance, treasury, or quantitative risk analysis.
* Strong theoretical and practical knowledge of liquidity risk frameworks, metrics, regulations, and bank balance sheet.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a structured and detail-oriented approach.
* Good English communication skills (written and verbal), fostering effective collaboration.


**What we offer:**
* Hybrid work model, meaning remote work is possible up to 2 days/week
* Long-term stability and growth as a company
* International opportunities and working environment


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-05-24. If you have questions about the position, please contact Peter Dahlström, peter.dahlstrom@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means that this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

**Learn more about working at SEB** 
 on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Scrum Master
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.
   

  

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*
**Your Profile (Must-have Requirements)**
* Extensive experience working as a Scrum Master
* Experience from agile programs and/or complex technical environments
* Experience working with distributed teams
* Strong communication skills and the ability to work with senior technical stakeholders
* Background in software development is strongly preferred


**Application deadline:** 
 22-05-2026
   

  

**About Us**
 We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.
   

  

 Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?
   

  

 We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.
   

  

 🌟 A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.
   

  

 🚗 Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.
   

  

 💼 Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.

 🏥 Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.
   

  

 📚 Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.
   

  

 🕑 Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?
   

  

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: (Senior) Solution Architect - Sweden
description:
**Who We Are** 




**M-Files** 
 is redefining how work gets done. Our context-first document management system offers purpose-built business use cases—spanning universal and industry-specific workflows—to enable secure collaboration, automate processes, and ensure governance.
 



 Unlike traditional systems, M-Files organizes content around the context of your business, connecting documents to related people, projects, and transactions. With our unique metadata-driven architecture, organizations can model content in line with their business processes, unify information across silos, and apply AI at scale. The result is greater productivity, reduced risk, and smarter, faster decisions for over 6,000 customers in 100+ countries. 
   

 For more information, visit www.m-files.com
   

  

 We are now looking for a (
 **Senior) Solution Architect** 
 to join our growing team
 
***in Sweden,***

 with the position opened locally.
   

  

 You will work closely with your team in both national and international customer projects by sharing your knowledge and sparring with your colleagues. With the help of a nice and competent team, you get to work in significant projects that change the way the world manages information!
 



 Your daily work consists mostly of consulting with customers in M-Files projects. You will have a unique opportunity to perceive our customers' business processes and enable customers to enhance them with the use of our product. You are a senior consultant who supports the customer throughout the project.
 



 As a
 **Solution Architect** 
 , you design and implement advanced M-Files solutions for customers. Your main responsibilities include defining business requirements with the customer and planning a system design with the ascertained requirements. You divide the system design into smaller and manageable implementations. By choosing the correct methods of implementation with scalability and maintenance in mind, you ensure a high customer value throughout the solution's life cycle. You will also participate in the continuous development of our implementation practices.
   

  




**Requirements**

**What is needed to be successful in the role:** 



* Several years of work experience as a Solution Architect or in a position with strong technical background
* Active role in customer projects and ability to work independently
* Ability to communicate verbally and in writing while considering the stakeholder's technical level (management, end-users, technical experts, etc.)
* Experience in analyzing customer and business requirements
* Experience in documenting and presenting specifications
* Experience in working in the customer interface
* B.Sc or M.Sc degree (or equivalent) in computer science, IT, engineering, or in other technical or commercial field
* Fluency in Swedish and English is mandatory; additional language skills are an advantage
* Readiness to travel domestically and abroad



**Additionally, we value competence in some of these areas:** 



* Ability and passion about IT systems, databases and integrations between them
* Understanding of software development and how programming can be utilized in implementations
* Corporate IT infrastructure (Windows Server, Databases, Network Infrastructure)
* Other technologies: M-Files, Windows, Azure, SQL Server, .NET



 Our culture is based on the guiding principles of Make It Happen, Help Others and Love Customers, and we strive to provide an environment that is both exciting to work in and encourages career growth.
   

  

 This is a perfect time to join M-Files and contribute to our exciting growth journey!
   

  




**Benefits**

**What We Offer:** 



* International team of top performers
* Inclusive and dynamic culture (virtual and in-person)
* Opportunity to contribute to our success and growth globally
* Flexible work/life balance
* Competitive compensation and benefits package



**Recruitment steps:** 



- Position is open for applications

- You will get a phone call if you pass the first gate

- There will be a 1.5-hour interview and a pre-assignment using M-Files product.

- Suitability Assessment

- Job offer


  

 Join M-Files and help industry leaders transform the way they manage information and drive business success!
   

  

 The position will be filled as soon as we find the right candidate, and we are reviewing applications on an ongoing basis.
   

  

 Please note that we do not accept applications sent via email. All applications should be submitted through job boards like LinkedIn or our career portal. Due to the high volume of applications, we will not be able to respond to all LinkedIn InMails.
   

  

**Please note that we are unable to offer relocation support for this position. Applicants must already hold valid residency and work authorization in Sweden.** 




 Be sure to apply soon, but no later than
 **May 15th, 2026,** 
 if you are interested!
   

 Applications are considered on a rolling basis and the position will be filled as soon as the right individual comes along.

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
**Would you like to become a part of the World Of Red Bull?** 
 Do you naturally come up with creative, entertaining video ideas and know how to turn them into content people actually want to watch, share, and engage with?
   

  

 As a
 **Social Media Specialist** 
 , you help fuel the engine behind Red Bull Sweden’s digital content strategy. You’re an expert in your field — plugged into trends, platform mechanics, and user behavior, and you know what it takes to create content that cuts through.
   

  

 Based in Stockholm, your mission is to manage and grow our social media channels, activating everything from Red Bull events and sponsored athletes to live broadcasts, films, editorial content, and digital consumer activations. In short: you bring the brand to life where our audience is.
   

  

 Ready to take on the role of Social Media Specialist for one of the world’s strongest brands? Apply today — selection is ongoing.
   

  

**All the responsibilities we'll trust you with:**
**CONTENT CREATION**
 By proactively developing your own creative content initiatives, while also leveraging both local and global content opportunities, you use your creativity and video editing skills to ensure our channels are filled with engaging, up-to-date, and tailor-made video content that truly represents the brand.
   

  

**ORGANIC REACH**
 You create innovative, wow-worthy ideas to activate our athletes and events, and know exactly how to turn them into organic viral moments that people actually care about. And no — we don’t do paid ads.
   

  

**COMMUNITY MANAGEMENT**
 You proactively strengthen Red Bull’s presence through community management — driving engagement, answering questions, and keeping conversations alive with both consumers and social opinion leaders to build deeper interest in the brand.
   

  

**ANALYSIS & TREND MONITORING**
 To continuously optimize Red Bull Sweden’s communication, you identify, analyze, and adapt content in line with the latest digital trends. You stay ahead by tracking emerging technologies and spotting new opportunities to leverage them. Through insights from audience data, market research, and analytics tools, you actively shape and evolve our content strategy.
   

  

**Your areas of knowledge and expertise that matter most for this role:**
* Excellent film production and video editing skills. Experience with DaVinci Resolve is a strong plus.
* 2–3 years of experience in a similar role, building brands in social — both from a project management and creative perspective.
* A strong understanding of how content travels across social platforms, and how to maximize reach, relevance, and engagement.
* Fluent in spoken and written Swedish and English, with strong communication and collaboration skills.
* A genuine personal interest in areas such as extreme sports, gaming, motorsport, or music.


 Red Bull Sweden AB is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We welcome applications from all members of society irrespective of age, sex, disability, sexual orientation, race, religion.

title: Public Sector Solution Engineer - Sweden
description:
**Description**
**Overview of the Role:**
 As a Solution Engineer in Salesforce's Public Sector sales organisation in Sweden, you will act as a client-facing pre-sales consultant — translating complex business challenges into clear, compelling solutions built on the Salesforce AI CRM and Agentforce platform. You will work closely with sales colleagues to understand customer goals, design tailored demonstrations and PoCs, and position Salesforce as the best solution for public sector organisations. This is a role for someone who is deeply curious about technology, passionate about AI, and skilled at making complex ideas accessible to diverse audiences.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead the full functional and technical solution cycle in close collaboration with sales colleagues and the broader SE organisation, from discovery through to demonstration and RFP response
* Design and deliver innovative, customised demos and solution concepts — including Agentforce and agentic AI capabilities — that address public sector customers' specific business challenges and demonstrate clear value
* Develop and maintain deep knowledge of the Salesforce product portfolio, including PaaS, SaaS, and agentic AI, through ongoing training, certifications, and internal enablement programs
* Attain quarterly and annual objectives as agreed with management, balancing multiple projects in a team-selling environment


**Required Qualifications**
* Proven experience in solution engineering, consultancy, or enterprise software delivery, with strong oral, written, and presentation skills and the ability to engage credibly with both technical and business stakeholders
* Demonstrated familiarity with AI tools and the agentic AI landscape, with a track record of adopting new technology and applying it to customer challenges
* Proven time management and collaboration skills, with the ability to balance multiple projects in a fast-paced, team-selling environment
* Fluent in Swedish and English, with the right to work in Sweden


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working with or selling into Public Sector organisations, with an understanding of the sector's unique business and compliance requirements
* Salesforce product knowledge and/or certifications; experience with other CRM or enterprise platforms is also welcome
* Degree or equivalent relevant experience; backgrounds will be evaluated based on core competencies for the role (e.g. extracurricular leadership, military experience, volunteer work)

title: Erfaren IT-specialist / Infrastruktur – Stockholm
description:
**Erfaren IT- specialist till konsultbolag i Stockholm – arbeta brett med drift, infrastruktur och säkerhet.**
 Vill du arbeta i en bred roll inom IT-infrastruktur där du får arbeta över flera tekniska områden och bidra till helheten? Vi söker nu en erfaren IT- specialist, gärna med god Linuxkompetens till ett mindre konsultbolag med ett långsiktigt uppdrag hos en statlig myndighet. Här får du arbeta brett med drift, system, nätverk och infrastruktur i en IT-miljö med hög säkerhet.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig**
* En bred och varierad roll inom IT-infrastruktur
* Långsiktigt uppdrag i en samhällsviktig verksamhet
* Stor möjlighet att påverka teknikval och arbetssätt
* Frihet under ansvar och förtroendearbetstid
* Konkurrenskraftiga villkor och starka förmåner


**Det här gör du hos oss**
 I rollen som IT- specialist arbetar du operativt med drift, utveckling och förbättring av IT-miljöer.
   

  

**Du Kommer Att**
* Hantera och utveckla IT-infrastruktur i en bred kontext
* Arbeta med olika typer av system med fokus på Linux
* Arbeta med nätverk, säkerhet och virtualisering
* Stötta inom flera tekniska områden såsom databaser och klientmiljöer
* Arbeta med övervakning, loggning och felsökning
* Bidra till struktur, dokumentation och förbättrade arbetssätt


**Ditt team och arbetsplats**
 Anställningen är hos ett mindre konsultföretag som bland annat jobbar med ett längre kunduppdrag.
   

  

 I det uppdraget arbetar du centralt i Stockholm på plats hos en statlig myndighet i en IT-miljö med hög säkerhet. Du blir en del av ett mindre team där man arbetar nära varandra och tar gemensamt ansvar för helheten i infrastrukturen.
   

  

**Mer om dig**
 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlighet. För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du:
   

  

* Är en generalist som trivs i en bred teknisk roll
* Har ett helhetsperspektiv och gillar att arbeta över flera områden
* Är självgående men också en lagspelare
* Trivs i en strukturerad och säkerhetsmedveten miljö
* Är prestigelös och lösningsorienterad


**Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet inom flera av följande områden:**
* God kompetens inom Linux
* Erfarenhet av IT-drift och infrastruktur
* God förståelse för nätverk


**Meriterande**
* Intresse för IT-säkerhet
* Virtualisering
* Skriptning (t.ex. PowerShell)
* Databaser
* Övervakning och loggning
* Windows
* Klienthantering


**Övrigt**
* Svenska i tal och skrift
* Kommer behöva genomgå säkerhetsprövning


**Så här får vi kontakt**
 I den här rekryteringen har vi valt att samarbeta med Ada Digital som strävar efter en transparent, inkluderande och snabbrörlig rekryterings- och konsultupplevelse. Vi vill veta mer om dig och din potential! Du söker tjänsten enkelt och behöver inte bifoga några dokument. Det räcker med en motivering till varför du söker tjänsten och om du saknar CV kan du bifoga din LinkedIn-profil. Följ sedan din ansökan live via vår hemsida. Urvalet sker löpande och tjänsten kan bli tillsatt före sista ansökningsdatum. Är du nyfiken och vill veta mer innan du söker? Hör av dig till ansvarig rekryterare. Vi ser fram emot att få kontakt med dig!

title: Social Media & Content Intern (Plenty Labs)
description:
**Plenty Labs is a stealth startup within Epidemic Sound. Join our global force of 500+ innovators, blending the latest in tech with the greatest in soundtracking, from our Stockholm HQ to offices in London, New York, Los Angeles, Berlin, Paris, Oslo, and Seoul. We’re an industry leader with a startup mentality. We take what we do seriously, but we don’t take ourselves too seriously. Creating and collaborating to transform the sound of streaming, content, and culture. Come join us - and let the world** 
***feel***
**your work.**
 As a Social Media & Content Intern, you will play a crucial role in the Plenty Labs marketing team. Your role will be to breathe life into our social media presence and shape how we tell the world about our futuristic AI platform. This role contributes to our goals by building our brand's digital footprint from the ground up during our launch phase. You will have a high impact on the team by becoming one of the first voices of Plenty Labs, using our own AI tools to reach global audiences. You’ll join a small, passionate team of creators and developers who value speed, experimentation, and genuine curiosity.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities Include**
* Creating and producing high-quality TikTok and Instagram content using the Plenty platform.
* Managing content distribution across social channels and analyzing performance data to iterate on hooks and formats.
* Actively participating in product development by sharing insights and ideas based on your hands-on use of our AI tools.


**Requirements**
* A deep obsession with TikTok and Instagram, with a clear understanding of why certain content resonates and goes viral.
* Proven experience in content production and a keen eye for aesthetic detail.
* A "bias for action" mindset that prioritizes rapid testing and learning over waiting for perfection.
* This is a LIA internship; therefore, you must be currently enrolled in a relevant study program where an internship period is a mandatory requirement.


**It would also be music to our ears if you have**
* Previous experience with social media advertising or a variety of AI-powered creative tools.
* Bonus if your account or post has gone viral on social media.


**Equal opportunity employer**
 We believe that bringing people together from different backgrounds, experiences and perspectives makes for a healthy workplace, a more successful business and a better world. We value diversity and encourage everyone to come and soundtrack the world with us.
   

  

**Application**
 Ready to make the world feel your work? Please apply, in English.

title: Information Security & Compliance Specialist
description:
**About Us**
 We're Alva Labs, an AI hiring system built on science, aiming to make every hire the best hire. We provide an end-to-end system that brings structure, science, and automation to the hiring process, ensuring repeatable quality and accurate outcomes. Our mission is to replace gut feeling with evidence in hiring, making it fairer and more efficient so businesses can grow stronger and people can truly thrive. We are dedicated to making great hiring the norm, not the exception, for both clients and candidates. We operate on principles like "Evidence over instinct," "Being worthy of trust," and "Raising the bar," and hold global certifications for security, AI governance, and privacy, including ISO 27001 and ISO 42001, which are independently audited to maintain our high standards.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As the Information Security & Compliance Specialist at Alva Labs, you will be at the forefront of maintaining and enhancing our security posture and compliance efforts. This pivotal role ensures that Alva Labs continues to meet the highest standards of data protection, AI governance, and regulatory compliance, reinforcing our commitment to being worthy of trust with our clients and candidates. Your work will directly support our mission by safeguarding the integrity and security of our AI hiring system. This is an on-site role based in our Stockholm, Sweden office, fostering collaboration and direct engagement with our teams.
   

  

**What You'll Work On**
* Own and maintain our ISO 27001 certification, driving the process, conducting internal audits, and managing risk management systems to ensure continuous compliance and security.
* Draft comprehensive and accurate information security responses for RFPs and compliance questionnaires, collaborating with legal and AI teams to address all requirements.
* Review vendors from an information security perspective, manage the supplier/application ledger, and ensure that new tools, especially AI-driven solutions, meet Alva Labs' stringent security and compliance standards.
* Independently manage the information security portion of customer security reviews, addressing inquiries and providing assurance regarding Alva Labs' security measures.
* Proactively address and resolve the backlog of system reviews and vendor assessments, ensuring all systems and vendors meet current security requirements.
* Support the maintenance and improvement of ISO 42001, building redundancy across both ISO 27001 and ISO 42001 to ensure responsible AI governance.
* Collaborate with the AI project team, supporting the development of AI-driven solutions for fact-checking RFPs and enhancing overall compliance efforts.


**What We're Looking For**
* You have experience in information security, compliance, or related fields, with practical experience with ISO 27001. Experience in SaaS/tech environments or certification work is a plus.
* You possess a foundational understanding of data protection and regulatory compliance.
* You have strong competence in AI and a curiosity to explore and develop it further.
* You are self-sufficient and proactive, capable of driving your area of responsibility without daily supervision, demonstrating a strong sense of ownership.
* You have excellent communication skills, with the ability to clearly articulate complex security concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders, fostering clarity over complexity.
* You bring strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a commitment to raising the bar in security and compliance standards.
* Fluency in both Swedish and English is a requirement for this role.
* You are able to work collaboratively in a team environment, being supportive and contributing to collective success.


**Our Hiring Process**
 We believe in a transparent and fair hiring process. Here’s what you can expect:
   

  

* Psychometrics: You'll be invited to complete a personality test and a logic test.
* TA Interview: An interview with our Talent Acquisition team to discuss your communication, teamwork, and initiative.
* HM Interview: An interview with the Hiring Manager to delve into your experience with auditing, risk management, information security, compliance, AI governance, and data protection.
* Work Sample Interview: An interview focusing on your AI knowledge, analytical skills, problem-solving abilities, and planning.


 If you're passionate about information security, compliance, and the ethical application of AI, and want to contribute to a company that's changing how the world hires, we encourage you to apply. Join Alva Labs and help us build a future where hiring is fair, efficient, and evidence-based.

title: Head of Private Cloud
description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Head of Private Cloud** 
 to lead the strategy, development, and operation of our private cloud capabilities. 
 


**The Wow** 

 The Head of Private Cloud will lead the strategy, development, and operation of our private cloud capabilities, including compute, storage, backup, connectivity, and database platforms that power critical business applications across the enterprise. This role is responsible for delivering scalable, secure, and highly reliable infrastructure services that support a global Betsson organisation. You will work closely with the Head of Public Cloud, who leads infrastructure and cloud capabilities in AWS, ensuring a cohesive hybrid cloud strategy that enables application teams to deploy and operate workloads efficiently across both environments.
 


**A taster of what you will be involved with** 

 Private Cloud Strategy & Platform Development
 


* Define and execute the strategy for the organization’s private cloud platform, aligned with enterprise technology and business goals.
* Drive the evolution toward modern, automated, and scalable infrastructure platforms.
* Ensure the private cloud environment supports hybrid and multi-cloud application architectures.
* Develop platform capabilities that enable self-service and platform consumption for internal teams.



 Platform Ownership
 


* Oversee the design, lifecycle management, and operational performance of key infrastructure services including
* Compute platforms (virtualization, container platforms where applicable)
* Storage platforms and data services
* Enterprise backup and recovery solutions
* Network connectivity and data center infrastructure integration
* Database platforms supporting enterprise workloads



  
 



 Service Reliability & Operations
 


* Ensure high availability, performance, and resilience of all private cloud services.
* Establish operational standards, service-level objectives (SLOs), and platform reliability metrics.
* Lead incident management and continuous service improvement initiatives.
* Ensure strong integration with IT service management processes.



 Hybrid Cloud Alignment
 


* Partner closely with the Head of Public Cloud to develop and operate a cohesive hybrid cloud ecosystem.
* Align architectural standards, networking, security, and operational models between private and public cloud platforms.
* Enable workload placement strategies that balance performance, compliance, and cost.



 Leadership & Team Development
 


* Lead and develop teams responsible for private cloud engineering and operations.
* Foster a culture of automation, reliability engineering, and platform thinking.
* Support talent development, skills modernization, and technical excellence across the team.



 Governance, Security & Compliance
 


* Ensure private cloud platforms meet enterprise security standards and regulatory requirements.
* Collaborate closely with security and risk management teams on infrastructure hardening and compliance.
* Implement strong governance for platform lifecycle management.



 Stakeholder Collaboration
 


* Work with enterprise architecture, application teams, and platform engineering groups to ensure infrastructure capabilities support business needs.
* Collaborate with procurement and vendor management on infrastructure technology


**What we are looking for** 
* 10+ years of experience in enterprise infrastructure, cloud platforms, or data center environments.
* Proven leadership experience managing infrastructure or platform engineering teams.
* Strong experience with modern private cloud platforms and infrastructure automation.
* Deep knowledge of enterprise infrastructure domains such as compute, storage, networking, and backup.
* Experience operating large-scale virtualized or cloud-like environments.
* Understanding of hybrid cloud architectures and workload portability.
* Experience working in global or multi-regional technology organizations.



  
 


**What we offer** 

 Much like riding a rollercoaster, sometimes life at Betsson can be lightning fast with twists and turns but always FUN! Then again, what else would you expect from a business 75% millennial and 1700 strong, spread across 7 offices with 900 based out of our Malta HQ alone! We recognise it may not be for the faint-hearted, but if you’re a go-getter, initiator and adrenaline junkie, always striving to push the boundaries and challenge yourself, then you’ll fit right in.
 



  
 


 Challenge accepted?
 
***By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our Privacy Policy***

title: Systemingenjör IT-säkerhetskrav
description:
Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen. Det du gör spelar roll.
   

  

 Din roll
   

  

 I den här rollen får du möjlighet att spela en avgörande roll i utvecklingen av våra avancerade produkter, där IT-säkerhet är en central del. Du kommer att arbeta med design och kravställning av systemlösningar för att skydda både information och teknologi. Det innebär att tolka it‑säkerhetskrav, analysera it‑säkerhetslösningar samt dokumentera dessa för att understödja systemdesignen.
   

  

 Du kommer att vara med och forma våra system genom hela processen, från att förstå kundkrav till att realisera våra produkter. Du kommer att vara en viktig del i att leverera säkra och hållbara lösningar. Med din kunskap inom IT-säkerhet kommer du att arbeta proaktivt med att säkerställa att våra produkter följer de krav och regelverk som gäller, samtidigt som du bidrar med din erfarenhet i riskanalyser och säkerhetsbedömningar.
   

  

 Du ges möjligheten att samarbeta med erfarna kollegor och vara i ständig dialog med kunder och andra intressenter. Du blir en del av PU Air som levererar ledningssystem både till det svenska flygvapnet och till internationella kunder.
   

  

 Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:
   

  

* Bryta ned kundkrav, definiera och specificera systemkrav ur ett IT-säkerhetsperspektiv
* Dokumentera och redovisa de genomförda säkerhetslösningarna på ett tydligt sätt
* Genomföra riskanalyser ur ett IT-säkerhetsperspektiv för att identifiera och bedöma potentiella hot och sårbarheter.


 Din profil
   

  

 För att trivas i denna roll är du en självgående och kommunikativ person som är van vid att samarbeta effektivt med både teammedlemmar och andra intressenter. Du är strukturerad och har ett självsäkert tankesätt som gör att du kan anpassa dig till förändrade omständigheter.
   

  

 Du söker ett långsiktigt åtagande och är samtidigt nyfiken på ny kunskap för att utvecklas inom en föränderlig miljö som styrs av världsläget. Du har en god samarbetsförmåga och kan samtidigt stå på dig när det behövs. Flexibilitet och förmågan att ta initiativ är också något du känner dig bekväm med. Därtill har du goda kunskaper inom IT-säkerhet.
   

  

 Erforderliga färdigheter:
   

  

* Bachelor/Master i systemvetenskap eller liknande, med fokus på IT-säkerhet
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med krav för komplexa system ur ett IT-säkerhetsperspektiv
* Förmåga att argumentera för och främja relevanta IT-säkerhetslösningar i ett system
* God analytisk förmåga
* God förmåga att tolka och skriva teknisk information
* Mycket god kommunikationsförmåga på både svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift


 Meriterande:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med militära system eller andra säkerhetskritiska system
* Certifierad inom CompTIA Security+, GIAC GPEN, CISSP, EC-Council CEH eller liknande
* Tidigare erfarenheter av praktiskt arbete med säkerhetsprodukter
* Arbete med ackreditering


*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.*
 Vad du blir en del av
   

  

 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här.

title: Group Senior Engineer (m/f/d) - IT Endpoint Management
description:
Become part of a vital chain and contribute to our common goal of making people’s lives better. Octapharma is one of the largest human protein manufacturers in the world, developing and producing medicines sourced from human plasma and human cell lines. We are a privately-owned company, where the warmth of family meets the scale of a global organisation.
   

  

 We're hiring engineers to build innovative solutions in a modern, cloud-based environment. With tools like Microsoft Intune and Windows 365, we offer secure, flexible access to the resources you need—anytime, anywhere. The position will be filled in either
 **Vienna** 
 (Austria),
 **Stockholm** 
 (Sweden) or
 **Lingolsheim** 
 (France).
   

  

 Join us in shaping our vision to provide new health solutions advancing human life.
   

  

 Your main tasks and responsibilities
   

  

* Design and devolpment of endpoint-related solutions and device of management platforms
* Review and oversee the teams demand, intake from the business through project softwares and ticketing systems
* Participate in the design and development of features and systems, from initial architecture through implementation and post-deployment support
* Collaborate with other platform teams to ensure successful deployment of deliverables needed
* Troubleshoot and Provide Tier 3 support to resolve complex technical issues related to endpoint systems and infrastructure


 Your expertise and ideal skill set
   

  

* Bachelor degree in Computer Science or Technical Certifcation courses in IT
* Minimum of 5 years working experience in providing IT technical support or administering IT systems
* Strong experience with Microsoft Intune and On Prem Endpoint systems
* Knowledge of mobile devices, desktop systems, IoT devices and other connected assets
* Fluent English (oral and written)
* Strong communication and presentation skills
* Analytical and conceptual thinking
* Strong prioritization, problem solving, diagnosis and troubleshooting skills


 Your department - where you make an impact
   

  

* We, the Endpoint Team department, are the trusted partner that drives the technical transformation of Octapharma. Together with Business, we create and deliver technical solutions to transform the organisation and improve performance.
* We are a team of Engineers who work on the design, and development of endpoint-related solutions, such as device management platforms.


 Thrive with us
   

  

* Company restaurant & meal subsidy
* Training & further education
* Health promotion
* Parking spaces and good public transport connections
* Company and team events


 Enjoy these attractive benefits! You can find all offers here:
 **Benefits**
 The minimum gross salary according to the
 **austrian collective agreement** 
 (chemical industry) is EUR 4,270.14 based on 38 hours per week (full-time). As we strive to offer a salary that reflects your individual profile and qualifications, there is a willingness to pay above the minimum salary.
   

  

 It´s in our blood
   

  

 We live diversity and stand for equal opportunities as an employer! We therefore look forward to receiving your application - regardless of age, gender, origin, sexual orientation, and religion.
   

  

 Do you have any questions? Then get in touch with your contact person.
   

  

 Larissa Amling
   

  

 Octapharma Pharmazeutika Produktionsges.m.b.H.
   

  

 Oberlaaer Straße 235, 1100 Wien
   

  

 T: +43 664 789 53 728
   

  

 Want to find out more about us?
   

  

 Visit our website
 **Octapharma Career** 
 and follow us daily on
 **LinkedIn** 
 .

title: Dataskyddsombud till Polismyndigheten
description:
Arbetsplatsbeskrivning
   

  

 Är du redo för en större uppgift? Som dataskyddsombud inom Polisen är du med och arbetar för att den senaste tekniken används på ett hållbart sätt inom Sveriges största myndighet. Du får möjlighet att bidra till Polisens uppdrag – att öka tryggheten och minska brottsligheten i samhället.
   

  

 Polismyndighetens fem dataskyddsombud arbetar tillsammans i en självständig och oberoende funktion inom myndigheten. Dataskyddsombudsfunktionen arbetar för att säkerställa att registrerade personers fri- och rättigheter skyddas när Polisen utför sitt viktiga samhällsuppdrag. Funktionen lämnar bland annat råd till myndighetens ledning och anställda i frågor som rör personuppgiftsbehandling och granskar att myndigheten behandlar personuppgifter enligt gällande lagstiftning. Dataskyddsombuden rapporterar direkt till rikspolischefen.
   

  

 Dataskyddsombudfunktionen är placerad vid tillsynsenheten vid rikspolischefens kansli. Vid tillsynsenheten finns även fyra andra verksamhetsområden:
   

  

* Intern tillsyn som sker för att granska verksamheten ur ett rättssäkerhetsperspektiv.
* Extern tillsyn med ansvar för att i tillsynsärenden företräda Polismyndigheten i kontakter med Justitieombudsmannen (JO), Justitiekanslern (JK), Diskrimineringsombudsmannen (DO), Integritetsskyddsmyndigheten (IMY) och Myndigheten för säkerhet och integritetsskydd (MSI).


 Arbetsbeskrivning
   

  

 Som dataskyddsombud vid Polismyndighetens dataskyddsombudsfunktion utvecklar du löpande funktionens arbetssätt och planerar arbetet tillsammans med de andra dataskyddsombuden. Utgångspunkten är ett riskbaserat arbetssätt, där funktionen bidrar till att stärka myndighetens systematiska dataskyddsarbete.
   

  

 Som dataskyddsombud har du en betydande frihet att själv prioritera och lägga upp ditt arbete. Varje dataskyddsombud genomför i regel sina egna granskningar och lämnar råd självständigt. Samtidigt har du goda möjligheter att diskutera dina bedömningar med de andra dataskyddsombuden och med dataskyddsjuristerna vid rättsavdelningen. Dataskyddsjuristerna hanterar olika ärenden som rör dataskydd inom myndigheten och lämnar rättligt stöd.
   

  

 Inom Polismyndigheten bedrivs en snabb och omfattande utveckling av nya metoder och verktyg för att stärka polisens brottsbekämpande förmåga. Som dataskyddsombud kommer du därför att ge råd inom konsekvensbedömningar som rör användning av ny teknik så som exempelvis AI. Du kommer även att delta vid förhandssamråd med IMY i de fall där det krävs.
   

  

 I dina arbetsuppgifter som dataskyddsombud ingår bland annat att:
   

  

* Granska Polismyndighetens behandling av personuppgifter och rapportera dina bedömningar och rekommendationer till rikspolischefen.
* Ge myndigheten och dess anställda råd i samband med verksamhetsutveckling och framtagandet av nya tekniska förmågor.
* Ge råd vid utveckling av myndighetens interna styrning och vid hantering av externa tillsynsärenden som rör dataskydd.
* Arbeta tillsammans med myndighetens övriga dataskyddsombud och samverka med myndighetens dataskyddsjurister utifrån era respektive roller.
* Delta i nätverk med andra dataskyddsombud inom svenska och internationella organisationer samt bedriva omvärldsbevakning.
* Vara en kontaktpunkt för frågor som rör personuppgiftsbehandling, både inom myndigheten och externt.


 Polismyndigheten erbjuder möjlighet till distansarbete två dagar i veckan, friskvårdsbidrag och gym i egna lokaler. Arbetsplatsen är för närvarande belägen i området Sörentorp i Solna, men kan komma att ändras till Kungsholmen på sikt. Dataskyddsombuden har för närvarande också möjlighet att arbeta från Kungsholmen vid behov.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 Detta är en möjlighet för dig som har:
   

  

* Juris kandidatexamen eller juristexamen
* Flerårig och aktuell erfarenhet av självständigt juridiskt arbete, exempelvis som dataskyddsombud, dataskyddsjurist, informationssäkerhetsspecialist, IT-säkerhetsspecialist eller inom AI och digitalisering, eller annan roll som arbetsgivaren bedömer likvärdig och relevant för tjänsten
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift
* Svenskt medborgarskap


**Det Är Meriterande Om Du Även Har**
* Erfarenhet av arbete som dataskyddsombud
* Genomfört notarie- eller assessorstjänstgöring
* Erfarenhet av arbete på brottsbekämpande myndighet eller annan myndighet
* Erfarenhet av tolkning, implementering och tillämpning av EU-rättsakter
* Erfarenhet av tillsynsverksamhet som bedöms relevant


**Personliga egenskaper**
 Som dataskyddsombud stödjer du verksamheten genom att ge relevanta och väl avvägda råd och vägledning. Du har god kommunikativ förmåga och kan skapa samt upprätthålla förtroendefulla relationer, samtidigt som du värnar integriteten i din yrkesutövning. Du arbetar strukturerat, har god prioriteringsförmåga och förmåga att se helheten. Vidare har du en god pedagogisk förmåga och bidrar till en ökad förståelse för dataskyddsfrågor i verksamheten.
   

  

 Du är lösningsinriktad i ditt arbetssätt, med förmåga att pröva nya angreppssätt och anpassa dig till förändrade behov. Du har god samarbetsförmåga, trivs med att arbeta både självständigt och tillsammans med andra för att nå gemensamma mål
   

  

 Vi kommer att lägga stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Kontaktpersoner
   

  

 Rekryterande chef, Lena Frylemo, lena.frylemo@polisen.se
   

  

 HR-konsult, Pernilla Melander,010-568 17 24, pernilla.melander@polisen.se
   

  

 Fackliga företrädare
   

  

 Saco-S, saco-s.avdelningarna@polisen.se
   

  

 Polisförbundet, Sofia Ask, tfn 010-563 87 10
   

  

 ST, st.inom-polisen@polisen.se
   

  

 Seko Polisen, Karna Tillheden, tfn 073-249 04 22
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning med en provanställning på 6 månader. Anställningsbenämning: Handläggare
   

  

 Arbetsort: Stockholm – Solna, Sörentorp
   

  

 Arbetstid: Förtroendearbetstid
   

  

 Tillträde: Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

 Funktion: Dataskyddsombud
   

  

 Ansök genom att bifoga ditt CV (vi vill inte ha något personligt brev) och besvara urvalsfrågorna i ditt ansökningsmejl. Frågorna utgår från kravprofilen för den här rekryteringen och dina svar ligger till grund för det urval som sker i processen. Det är därför viktigt att du svarar tydligt och utförligt på frågorna och inte hänvisar till andra handlingar t.ex. CV.
   

  

**Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.**
 Besvara följande urvalsfrågor som en del av din ansökan.
   

  

* Har du Juris kandidatexamen eller juristexamen? Ja/Nej
* Har du flerårig och aktuell erfarenhet av självständigt juridiskt arbete, exempelvis som dataskyddsombud, dataskyddsjurist, informationssäkerhetsspecialist, IT-säkerhetsspecialist eller inom AI och digitalisering, eller annan roll som arbetsgivaren kan bedöma som likvärdig och relevant för tjänsten? Ja/Nej Om ja, beskriv så utförligt som möjligt din erfarenhet.
* Har du mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift? Ja/Nej
* Har du Svenskt medborgarskap? Ja/Nej
* Har du erfarenhet av arbete som dataskyddsombud? Ja/Nej Om ja, från när?
* Har du genomfört notarie- eller assessorstjänstgöring? Ja/Nej Om ja, när?
* Har du erfarenhet av arbete på brottsbekämpande myndighet eller annan myndighet? Ja/Nej Om ja, från vilken myndighet?
* Har du erfarenhet av tolkning, implementering och tillämpning av EU-rättsakter? Ja/Nej Om ja, beskriv på vilket sätt
* Har du erfarenhet av tillsynsverksamhet? Ja/Nej Om ja, beskriv kortfattat din erfarenhet


 Vänligen notera att krav och eventuella meriter ska vara uppfyllda vid ansökningstillfället.
   

  

 De uppgifter du lämnar i samband med din ansökan kan användas för att kontakta dig, få information och kallelser samt eventuella anställningshandlingar.
   

  

 Urvalstest kan förekomma inom ramen för rekryteringen.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan i form av CV och svar på urvalsfrågor via e-post till jobb.na@polisen.se senast måndag den 18 maj 2026. Ansökningar till denna befattning kommer endast tas emot via den mailadress som anges i annonsen.
 **Märk din ansökan med referensnummer A269.330/2026 i mailets ärendemening.**
 Har du skyddade personuppgifter, referenser eller liknande information som du själv bedömer som skyddsvärd rekommenderar vi att du kontaktar ansvarig HR-konsult innan du går vidare med din ansökan.
   

  

 En anställning hos Polismyndigheten kan komma att inledas med en provanställning om sex månader.
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) genomförs innan beslut om anställning fattas. Med anställning följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. Läs mer om krigsplacering och säkerhetsprövning under https://polisen.se/krigsplacering och https://polisen.se/sakerhetsprovning
   

  

 Polismyndigheten kommer att behandla dina personuppgifter i enlighet med reglerna i EU:s dataskyddsförordning (2016/679) och annan tillämplig dataskyddsreglering. Läs mer om vår hantering av personuppgifter på https://polisen.se/personuppgifter/rekrytering
   

  

 Din ansökan är en allmän handling enligt offentlighetsprincipen.
   

  

**Polismyndigheten**
*Polismyndigheten erbjuder dig en arbetsplats som stimulerar till mångfald, kreativitet och personlig utveckling. Läs gärna om våra förmåner som anställd hos polisen på* 
*https://polisen.se/erbjudande*
*Vi bedriver vår verksamhet enligt den statliga värdegrundens sex principer demokrati, legalitet, objektivitet, fri åsiktsbildning, respekt samt effektivitet och service. Som medarbetare inom polisen förväntas du agera enligt dessa och bidra till dess upprätthållande. Det är en förutsättning för rättssäkerhet, rättstrygghet och för polisens legitimitet i samhället. Som företrädare för polisen respekterar du allas lika värde och skapar förtroende för polisen.*
*Läs gärna mer om polisen och vår verksamhet på* 
*www.polisen.se*
**Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**
 Vi undanber oss samtal och mejl från dig som vill sälja annons- och rekryteringstjänster.

title: Public Sector Solution Engineer - Sweden
description:
**Description**
**Overview of the Role:**
 As a Solution Engineer in Salesforce's Public Sector sales organisation in Sweden, you will act as a client-facing pre-sales consultant — translating complex business challenges into clear, compelling solutions built on the Salesforce AI CRM and Agentforce platform. You will work closely with sales colleagues to understand customer goals, design tailored demonstrations and PoCs, and position Salesforce as the best solution for public sector organisations. This is a role for someone who is deeply curious about technology, passionate about AI, and skilled at making complex ideas accessible to diverse audiences.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead the full functional and technical solution cycle in close collaboration with sales colleagues and the broader SE organisation, from discovery through to demonstration and RFP response
* Design and deliver innovative, customised demos and solution concepts — including Agentforce and agentic AI capabilities — that address public sector customers' specific business challenges and demonstrate clear value
* Develop and maintain deep knowledge of the Salesforce product portfolio, including PaaS, SaaS, and agentic AI, through ongoing training, certifications, and internal enablement programs
* Attain quarterly and annual objectives as agreed with management, balancing multiple projects in a team-selling environment


**Required Qualifications**
* Proven experience in solution engineering, consultancy, or enterprise software delivery, with strong oral, written, and presentation skills and the ability to engage credibly with both technical and business stakeholders
* Demonstrated familiarity with AI tools and the agentic AI landscape, with a track record of adopting new technology and applying it to customer challenges
* Proven time management and collaboration skills, with the ability to balance multiple projects in a fast-paced, team-selling environment
* Fluent in Swedish and English, with the right to work in Sweden


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working with or selling into Public Sector organisations, with an understanding of the sector's unique business and compliance requirements
* Salesforce product knowledge and/or certifications; experience with other CRM or enterprise platforms is also welcome
* Degree or equivalent relevant experience; backgrounds will be evaluated based on core competencies for the role (e.g. extracurricular leadership, military experience, volunteer work)


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and be your best, and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can do your best. Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 At Salesforce, we strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates.
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodation Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity Statement.
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.
   

  

**Salesforce welcomes all.**
 In the United States, compensation offered will be determined by factors such as location, job level, job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Salesforce offers a variety of benefits to help you live well including: time off programs, medical, dental, vision, mental health support, paid parental leave, life and disability insurance, 401(k), and an employee stock purchasing program. More details about company benefits can be found at the following link: https://www.salesforcebenefits.com.

title: Group Senior Engineer (m/f/d) - IT Endpoint Management
description:
Become part of a vital chain and contribute to our common goal of making people’s lives better. Octapharma is one of the largest human protein manufacturers in the world, developing and producing medicines sourced from human plasma and human cell lines. We are a privately-owned company, where the warmth of family meets the scale of a global organisation.
   

  

 We're hiring engineers to build innovative solutions in a modern, cloud-based environment. With tools like Microsoft Intune and Windows 365, we offer secure, flexible access to the resources you need—anytime, anywhere. The position will be filled in either
 **Vienna** 
 (Austria),
 **Stockholm** 
 (Sweden) or
 **Lingolsheim** 
 (France).
   

  

 Join us in shaping our vision to provide new health solutions advancing human life.
   

  

 Your main tasks and responsibilities
   

  

* Design and devolpment of endpoint-related solutions and device of management platforms
* Review and oversee the teams demand, intake from the business through project softwares and ticketing systems
* Participate in the design and development of features and systems, from initial architecture through implementation and post-deployment support
* Collaborate with other platform teams to ensure successful deployment of deliverables needed
* Troubleshoot and Provide Tier 3 support to resolve complex technical issues related to endpoint systems and infrastructure


 Your expertise and ideal skill set
   

  

* Bachelor degree in Computer Science or Technical Certifcation courses in IT
* Minimum of 5 years working experience in providing IT technical support or administering IT systems
* Strong experience with Microsoft Intune and On Prem Endpoint systems
* Knowledge of mobile devices, desktop systems, IoT devices and other connected assets
* Fluent English (oral and written)
* Strong communication and presentation skills
* Analytical and conceptual thinking
* Strong prioritization, problem solving, diagnosis and troubleshooting skills


 Your department - where you make an impact
   

  

* We, the Endpoint Team department, are the trusted partner that drives the technical transformation of Octapharma. Together with Business, we create and deliver technical solutions to transform the organisation and improve performance.
* We are a team of Engineers who work on the design, and development of endpoint-related solutions, such as device management platforms.


 Thrive with us
   

  

* Company restaurant & meal subsidy
* Training & further education
* Health promotion
* Parking spaces and good public transport connections
* Company and team events


 Enjoy these attractive benefits! You can find all offers here:
 **Benefits**
 The minimum gross salary according to the
 **austrian collective agreement** 
 (chemical industry) is EUR 4,270.14 based on 38 hours per week (full-time). As we strive to offer a salary that reflects your individual profile and qualifications, there is a willingness to pay above the minimum salary.
   

  

 It´s in our blood
   

  

 We live diversity and stand for equal opportunities as an employer! We therefore look forward to receiving your application - regardless of age, gender, origin, sexual orientation, and religion.
   

  

 Do you have any questions? Then get in touch with your contact person.
   

  

 Larissa Amling
   

  

 Octapharma Pharmazeutika Produktionsges.m.b.H.
   

  

 Oberlaaer Straße 235, 1100 Wien
   

  

 T: +43 664 789 53 728
   

  

 Want to find out more about us?
   

  

 Visit our website
 **Octapharma Career** 
 and follow us daily on
 **LinkedIn** 
 .
