title: Senior Integration Manager
description:
Startdatum: Omgående
   

  

 Slutdatum: Option på förlängning
   

  

 Omfattning: 100%
   

  

 Plats: Stockholm (hybrid)
   

  

**Uppdragsbeskrivning**
 Vi söker en senior konsult som ansvarar för att leda och samordna ett omfattande integrationsarbete i en komplex organisationsmiljö. Uppdraget omfattar ett helhetsansvar för planering, styrning och genomförande i en fas där verksamheter både ska sammanföras och delvis separeras. Rollen innebär att skapa tydlig struktur, säkerställa framdrift och hantera beroenden mellan flera funktioner och intressenter.
   

  

 Konsulten kommer att arbeta nära ledning och styrgrupp, med fokus på att möjliggöra välgrundade beslut, säkerställa kontinuitet i verksamheten samt driva förändringsarbete med hög kvalitet.
   

  

**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:**
* Etablera övergripande plan, styrmodell och arbetssätt för integrationsfasen
* Leda och koordinera tvärfunktionella team och arbetsströmmar
* Säkerställa leveranser enligt prioriterad tidplan och identifierade beroenden
* Hantera risker, flaskhalsar och kritiska aktiviteter samt föreslå åtgärder
* Driva kommunikation, rapportering och beslutsunderlag till styrgrupp
* Säkerställa kontinuitet i verksamheten under förändringsarbetet


**Skall-krav**
* Gedigen erfarenhet av att leda komplexa projekt eller program med många intressenter
* Dokumenterad förmåga att etablera struktur, planering och uppföljning
* Erfarenhet av integrationsprojekt och/eller större verksamhetsförändringar
* Stark ledarskapsförmåga utan formellt personalansvar
* Erfarenhet av arbete mot styrgrupp och seniora beslutsfattare
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet från större organisationer med komplexa beroendestrukturer
* Bakgrund inom förändringsledning och organisationskommunikation
* Erfarenhet av samverkan i arbetsrättsliga eller fackliga sammanhang
* Förståelse för samspel mellan funktioner såsom HR, IT, ekonomi och juridik

title: Junior Operativ purchaser - electronics or PCB
description:
**Professional Galaxy** 
 is an IT and technology consulting company that provides highly specialized expertise within IT, software development, SAP, purchasing, electronics and mechanical design. We collaborate with experienced senior experts and deliver strategic value-creating expertise to some of Sweden's most complex and analytically demanding projects. Our focus is always on high quality, professionalism and clear, measurable results.
   

  

 We are now seeking a
 **Junior Operativ purchaser - electronics or PCB** 
 for one of our clients.
   

  

**About the assignment:**
 Are you a communicative, accurate and driven team player with experience from supply or sourcing? Then you are just what we are looking for to strengthen our growing Procurement organization. We can offer you an exciting and challenging position as an Operative Purchaser.
   

  

 As an junior operative purchaser electronics or PCB, you have the responsibility to ensure delivery of essentially planned demands to our production, which is characterized by a large project focus. You will be part of a team that purchases material for both prototypes and smaller series production of technically complex solutions. This places great demands on quality, flexibility, teamwork and rapid action by both suppliers and buyers.
   

  

 Your ongoing tasks will mainly be as follows:
   

  

* Purchase of materials and services based on planned needs
* Monitoring delivery through close dialogue with suppliers and customers
* Obtain a cost estimate
* Build supplier relationship and structure for efficient interaction
* Support in Flow Optimization and process development


 Your most important interfaces in addition to the team will of course be the suppliers, planning department and several different Project Offices.
   

  

 We believe that you have a background of working within supply or sourcing, preferably as an operative purchaser. You should enjoy a high pulse in a production environment and have a good understanding of what factors govern purchasing in the Supply Chain. You should also be able to independently drive to ensure good delivery precision. You are fluent in English and Swedish.
   

  

**Start date** 
 2026-06-01
   

  

**End date** 
 2027-01-29
   

  

**Last date to apply** 
 2026-05-22
   

  

 Are you the right person for the assignment, or do you want to recommend a strong candidate? Do not hesitate to contact us.
   

  

 Please apply directly through our system with:
   

  

* Your updated CV in english
* Availability to start the assignment


 In the motivation, describe why you are suitable for this assignment - refer to previous consulting assignments, employmxent, education and personal qualities.
   

  

**Please note:** 
 We do not accept any applications through mail. All applications have to be sent through the portal to be valid.
   

  

**Offer continuously:** 
 Please note that for this role we offer continuously. That means that we sometimes remove the assignments before the deadline. If you are interested, we recommend that you apply immediately.

title: Partner Sales Manager within IT Retail
description:
**About Us**
 Velory empowers companies to automate and secure IT asset management in one seamless platform. From purchase to end-of-life, our software ensures complete control over IT assets with a sustainable, circular approach.
   

  

 Velory is transforming how companies buy, manage, and reuse IT. Our platform automates the entire IT lifecycle from procurement to end-of-life helping companies operate smarter and save both time and money.
   

  

 A core part of Velory is our network of IT retailers. They are not just partners they are essential to how we deliver value. Through Velory, customers purchase hardware via IT retailers, making them a critical part of our product and delivery. At the same time, retailers are a powerful growth engine. By reselling Velory as part of their offering, they bring new customers, new revenue, and help us scale across markets.
   

  

 We’ve already proven that this model works. Now, we’re scaling it across Europe.
   

  

**About The Role**
**Your mission is clear:**
 Sign top-tier retailer partners across Europe and build a channel that drives revenue. You will own the commercial process end-to-end, with a strong focus on pipeline, deal execution, and closing.
   

  

**This includes:**
* Identify and prioritise leading IT retailers in key European markets
* Create and maintain a strong, high-quality pipeline
* Focus on partners with real revenue potential
* Closing high-impact partnerships
* Own the full deal cycle from first contact to signed agreement
* Position Velory as a growth driver for retailers, enabling new customers and new revenue streams
* Leverage Velory’s proven retailer model and adapt it across markets
* Identify what works and replicate success across regions
* Contribute to building a repeatable European partner playbook
* Bring insights from retailer conversations into product, pricing, and go-to-market
* Continuously sharpen the pitch based on what converts
* Stay focused on outcomes: signed partners and revenue potential


**What success looks like:**
* Signed partnerships with retailers that can drive meaningful revenue
* Consistent deal velocity and high close rate
* Expansion of Velory’s retailer footprint across key European markets


**Required Skills**
* Experience in B2B sales, partnerships or business development
* Experience within IT retail
* Proven track record of closing deals and driving commercial outcomes
* Strong communication and negotiation skills
* Fluent in English


****Nice to have****
* Experience working with IT retailers or resellers in Europe
* Background in SaaS, IT hardware or marketplaces
* Experience from a startup or scale-up environment where you have had to build and move fast
* Additional European languages


****Who you are****
 You are a commercial builder with a strong focus on closing, creating momentum and turning opportunities into signed partnerships.
   

  

* Show ownership: You are highly commercial and driven by results, taking full responsibility for outcomes and consistently turning opportunities into real business impact
* Manage speed: You have a strong ability to prioritise and focus on high value opportunities, moving fast and maintaining momentum in a scale up environment
* Represent quality: You run a sharp and structured process that drives deals forward and increases close rate
* Earn trust: You are confident in negotiations and stakeholder management, building strong relationships through clear communication and reliable follow through
* Deliver wow: You are motivated to go beyond expectations, creating impact in ways that stand out and leave a lasting impression


**What We Offer**
* A unique opportunity to grow and learn in a fast-paced scale-up environment.
* A collaborative and inclusive work culture.
* Flexible work arrangements.
* Daily breakfast buffet at the office.
* Workouts with PT at the office gym.
* Private healthcare insurance and a generous wellness grant.
* Six weeks of paid vacation and ITP1-level pension.
* Select your preferred equipment via our own Velory Platform.
* Stockholm HQ with remote flexibility


****Join Us****
 At Velory, you’ll be more than just an intern – you'll be a key player in our mission to revolutionize the digital landscape. If you’re ready to bring your creativity, skills, and passion to our team, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Account Manager, Retail
description:
foodora is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in around 65 countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.
   

  

**Job Description**
**From groceries and flowers to dog food and phone chargers - these days, you can order just about anything through the foodora app. This level of convenience is made possible by the expertise of our Marketplace team. We're currently on the lookout for our next superstar Account Manager to join this dynamic group. In this role, you'll be the key ingredient in nurturing and strengthening relationships with our existing partners, ensuring that every collaboration becomes a mutual success story! If you want to be a part of reshaping the way people do their shopping, now is your time!**
**Your mission**
 Join our team and create an impact in the quick commerce revolution! We partner with retailers across various industries with a strong focus on grocery partnerships.
   

  

* Manage a dynamic portfolio ranging from influential local businesses to the largest brands within the grocery and retail sector.
* Educate our partners within quick commerce and analyze their performance on our platform to set a joint plan for future success, with a strong focus on developing their digital business.
* Develop a successful collaboration with partners and create a commercial plan with primary focus on order and revenue growth.
* Drive partner engagement and visibility by planning and activating promotions across your portfolio.


 We are looking for a true foodorian who enjoys working in a
 **dynamic** 
 environment and is eager to elevate our team. To thrive in this role, you'll need to bring loads of
 **energy** 
 and
 **drive** 
 - we are not just closing deals, we are creating new consumer behaviors and we need you to take it to the next level!
 **Cooperation** 
 is our secret sauce, and we believe that effective teamwork turns prospects into partners. Your
 **solution-oriented** 
 mindset allows you to see a new approach instead of the bumps in the road. If you’re
 **responsible** 
 and capable of juggling multiple tasks without dropping the ball, you’ll fit right in. Since you’ll be collaborating with various partners, building and maintaining
 **strong relationships** 
 will be your bread and butter, driving our collective success
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Minimum 2 years of working within B2B Sales or Customer Success with good results
* Fluent in Swedish and English
* You have a driver's license
* Any experience from working with or within FMCG is a big plus.


**Additional Information**
* Wellness allowance topped with the opportunity to participate in many work/life balance initiatives at foodora such as wellness hour & reduced price on massage.
* Employee discount at foodora (woho!) and awesome friday breakfasts!
* Occupational pension, incl. premium exemption insurance, accident insurance and life insurance.
* foodora Learning - Monthly learning sessions about different topics, such as the q-commerce industry, negotiation techniques and project management combined with a structured onboarding and inspiring courses within our learning tool Sana
* Great deals at Benify (for e.g. gym membership, e-bikes hotels, audiobooks, streaming services, clothes, kitchen supplies… and so much more!
* Awesome AW’s and (pink) parties!

title: Technical Lead AMS
description:
Inom Atea och AMS vill vi stärka vår tekniska miljö genom att välkomna en erfaren och nyfiken teknisk ansvarig. Du blir en nyckelperson i vår projektorganisation i Atea Managed Services – samt vara en trygg teknisk resurs både internt och gentemot våra kunder.
 



 Detta är rollen för dig som tycker om att förstå helheten, bygga robusta standarder och lösa problem innan andra ens ser dem komma.
 



  





**Din roll** 




 Som teknisk ansvarig får du ett brett och varierande ansvar med fokus på bland annat:
 


* Identitet, åtkomst och modern drift (Entra ID, Intune, GPO, Kerberos, DNS m.m.)
* Infrastruktur, hybrida miljöer, moln och grundläggande nätverksmekanismer
* Server- och virtualiseringsmiljöer (Windows Server, VMware)
* Automatisering, skriptning och standardisering (PowerShell, Terraform, Ansible)
* Dokumentation, utveckling av rutiner samt etablering av tekniska standarder
* Kunddialog, koordinering och tekniskt ledarskap i leveranser
* Att leda och ansvara för lösningsdesign – från behovsanalys till färdig arkitektur
* Översätta kundens affärs- och tekniska behov till konkreta och genomförbara designval



  





 Du blir en central person inom vårt driftområde, med ansvar för kvalitet, riktning och stabilitet i de lösningar vi bygger.
 



  





**Vem är du?** 



* Minst 5 års erfarenhet inom IT‑infrastruktur, drift eller teknisk konsultroll
* En bred och gedigen förståelse för IT‑infrastruktur inom server, identitet och nätverk
* Erfarenhet av Entra ID, AD, Intune, Windows Server, VMware och grundläggande nätverkskoncept
* Kunskap om automatisering och skriptning (PowerShell, Terraform, Ansible)
* Meriterande med erfarenhet av Citrix, Azure Administrator eller andra relevanta certifieringar
* Förmåga och vilja att lära dig ny teknik – gärna även inom AI och avancerad automatisering
* Trygghet i kunddialog, förmåga att äga problem och ta tekniskt ansvar när situationen kräver det
* God skriftlig förmåga och vana vid att ta fram tydlig och strukturerad dokumentation



  





 Kort sagt: du gillar bredd, utveckling och att förstå
 *varför* 
 saker fungerar – inte bara
 *hur* 
 .
 



  





**Om Atea** 




 Visste du att Atea är den ledande leverantören av it-infrastruktur i Norden och Baltikum? I Sverige är vi runt 2700 medarbetare fördelade på 35 kontor runt om i hela landet. Vår styrka ligger i vår kombination av lokal närvaro, vårt omfattande och heltäckande erbjudande samt alla våra specialister. Tillsammans med våra kunder och partners bygger vi Sverige med it och förbättra vardagen för skolbarn, lärare, äldre, sjukvård och näringslivet. Hos oss får du vara en del av världens mest hållbara it-servicebolag, där vi är med och påskyndar omställningen mot en mer hållbar it-värld.
 



  





 På Atea blir du en del av en vardag och en kultur som präglas av framåtanda, laganda och humor. Vi har en vision om att vara "The Place to Be" – en plats där alla växer och trivs, med kollegor som bryr sig om dig, om kunderna och om samhället.
 



  





**Kontakt & mer information** 




 Har du frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta Therése Klint, Affärschef, therese.klint@atea.se. Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum, ansök därmed redan idag!
 



  





 I den här rekryteringen kan arbetspsykologiska tester användas som en del av urvalsprocessen. Som en kvalitativ del i vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår slutkandidater en bakgrundskontroll för vissa av våra tjänster, detta för att öka kännedomen om dig som vår framtida medarbetare.
 



 Vår arbetssätt är flexibelt - Vi tror på att ge möjlighet till flexibilitet i vardagen men merparten av arbetstiden som vi inte spenderar hos en kund eller på resande fot utgår vi från kontoret, som är vår primära arbetsplats.
 



  





 Atea vill vara The Place To Be, den självklara platsen, för alla människor då vi värdesätter och jobbar aktivt med mångfald och inkludering.
 



 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
 



*Den här rekryteringen hanteras av oss på Atea och vi undanber oss därför samtal och mail från rekryterings- och bemanningsföretag* 
 .
 



**Följ oss i sociala medier**

title: Growth Marketing Manager
description:
Yabie is growing on two fronts: directly with SMB merchants in Sweden, and through partners across the globe. We have messaging, content, and campaigns. What we're building now is the engine connecting all of it — the automation, analytics, and attribution layer that turns marketing activity into measurable pipeline.
   

  

 We've already validated that automated nurturing moves the needle. This role exists to scale that into a full system, build the analytics infrastructure to prove marketing's commercial impact, and own the organic growth strategy that makes Yabie findable — in search engines and in AI-generated answers.
   

  

**The Core of the Job**
**Own the marketing tech stack.** 
 HubSpot, WordPress, GA4, and our SEO tooling are yours — configured, integrated, and producing clean data. You build the dashboards that capture the full funnel from both a campaign and business perspective. When the question is which subject line converts better, you set up the test.
   

  

**Scale what's proven.** 
 We've validated that automated lead nurturing improves pipeline. That proof of concept needs to become a machine: multiple sequences, lead scoring, vertical segmentation, multi-touch journeys. You build the system, the team fills it with content.
   

  

**Set the campaign strategy.** 
 You're not running ads day-to-day — you're the person who decides where to push and where to pull based on actual performance data. You brief the team and the agency, analyse what comes back, and redirect budget accordingly.
   

  

**Build the attribution layer.** 
 GA4 conversion tracking, UTM governance, funnel dashboards, closed-loop Salesforce reporting. The goal: every marketing euro traceable to a result.
   

  

**What You'll Spend Your Time On**
*Marketing Automation*
* HubSpot workflows, sequences, lead scoring, lifecycle stages, segmentation
* Scale nurturing into 4–8 automated sequences across verticals and lifecycle stages
* HubSpot ↔ Salesforce integration — clean lead handoff and closed-loop reporting
* A/B testing on sequences: subject lines, timing, CTAs


*Campaign Strategy & Performance*
* Quarterly campaign strategy aligned with overall marketing direction
* Structured briefs for the team and agency — audiences, messaging, KPIs
* Weekly performance review across Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, email, organic
* Budget optimisation and reallocation based on CAC and pipeline data


*Analytics & Attribution*
* GA4 and GTM setup: conversion events, attribution model, custom reports
* Funnel dashboards: traffic → MQL → SQL → pipeline → revenue, per channel
* Monthly performance report for leadership
* CAC per channel. Pipeline contribution per campaign.


*SEO & AEO*
* Keyword strategy for priority terms across our core verticals and use cases
* Technical SEO audit and fixes — crawlability, speed, schema, internal linking
* AEO strategy — how Yabie appears in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI Overviews
* Competitive keyword and positioning monitoring across key market players


*AI Workflows*
* Prompt libraries for recurring tasks: email sequences, ad variants, briefs, reporting
* Semi-automated pipelines: research → brief → draft → edit → publish
* Train team members on AI-assisted production workflows


**What We're Looking For**
 Must-haves: 3–5 years in B2B growth marketing or demand generation, preferably SaaS or fintech. HubSpot expert — not "I've used it" but "I've built automation that drove measurable results." Google Analytics 4 proficient. Salesforce working knowledge. Data-driven: fluent in funnel math, A/B testing, and statistical thinking. Campaign strategy experience — has set direction for paid channels, not just executed. Fluent in Swedish and English.
   

  

 Strong signals: Comfortable in environments where the playbook doesn't fully exist yet and ownership is broad. Has worked in contexts where marketing was expected to prove its commercial impact, not just report on activity. Thinks about how to scale output without scaling headcount. Background in fintech, payments, or SMB tech.
   

  

 What the right person looks like: You look at a marketing team and immediately see the gaps in the plumbing. You'd rather build a dashboard that changes how the team makes decisions than write a clever headline. You care about what converts, not what looks nice. You've built something from scratch before — and you're energised by doing it again somewhere the impact is immediate and visible.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* The opportunity to build Yabie's marketing operations layer from the ground up
* A flat, unpretentious team with a strong focus on competence and collaboration
* Competitive salary and benefits
* A modern office in the heart of Stockholm
* A culture where curiosity, growth, and customer focus are at the core


**Join us on our journey to become the next leading fintech company!**

title: SAP TM /BN4L Specialist
description:
**Avigna is hiring SAP TM & BN4L Professionals (Multiple Roles)** 




  





 Our SAP Delivery Center aims to build strong and sustainable solutions for customers across Europe. We are looking for
 **SAP TM Test Leads, Senior SAP BN4L / TM Functional Consultants, and SAP TM Technical Consultants** 
 to join the team to build, support, and drive customer innovations, bringing efficiency to logistics and transportation processes through effective management of cost, quality, and schedule.
 



  





 These roles are part of a global
 **SAP S/4HANA logistics transformation program** 
 , supporting transportation management, logistics collaboration, and worldwide warehouse rollouts. If you want to grow and build a strong foundation on the
 **S/4HANA platform** 
 while working across complex international SAP programs, look no further.
 



  





 In alignment with Avigna’s values, we are committed to providing an inclusive work environment for all employees to positively impact our culture every day.
 



  





**Indian and European profiles are accepted who is willing to relocate to Sweden** 




  





**Experience:** 



* SAP TM Test Lead: 8+ years
* Senior SAP BN4L / TM Functional Consultant: 6–10+ years
* SAP TM Technical Consultant: 6–10+ years



**Location :** 
 Stockholm, Sweden - Initially remote till the time visa getting processed
 



**Mode of work :** 
 Onsite
 



  





**Responsibilities:** 




**Role 1 : SAP TM Test Lead** 



* Define and own the
 **overall test strategy** 
 for SAP TM within a global SAP S/4HANA logistics program
* Lead
 **end-to-end testing and User Acceptance Testing (UAT)** 
 activities
* Coordinate testing across
 **pilot sites and global warehouse rollouts**
* Ensure test readiness, quality validation, and
 **formal sign-off before go-live**
* Track and report
 **test execution status, risks, defects, and recommendations** 
 to program leadership
* Build and maintain
 **reusable test assets, test scenarios, and regression test packs**
* Collaborate with business users, IT teams, and system integrators during testing, cutover, and go-live phases



  





**Role 2 : Senior SAP BN4L / TM Functional Consultant** 



* Configure, support, and enhance
 **SAP Business Network for Logistics (BN4L)** 
 solutions
* Drive functional integration between
 **SAP TM, BN4L, and external logistics partners**
* Support
 **freight collaboration, carrier connectivity, track & trace, and logistics visibility** 
 processes
* Act as a functional expert during
 **global SAP S/4HANA logistics rollouts**
* Work closely with business stakeholders, IT teams, and external vendors to gather and implement requirements
* Support functional, integration, and UAT testing activities
* Ensure alignment with
 **global templates, standards, and best practices**
* Contribute to continuous improvement and optimization of logistics processes



  





**Role 3 : SAP TM Technical Consultant** 



* Participate in
 **global SAP TM template design and rollout workshops**
* Configure and adapt SAP TM solutions during
 **local and global rollout phases**
* Design, build, and support integrations between
 **SAP TM and SAP S/4HANA/ECC components** 
 (EWM, GTS, VIM) and external logistics systems
* Develop and enhance SAP TM solutions using
 **ABAP / ABAP OO, BOPF, BRF+, CDS Views, and OData services**
* Build and optimize
 **SAP Fiori and UI5 applications**
* Support transportation planning, routing, carrier selection, charge management, and optimization scenarios
* Apply
 **SAP Clean Core principles** 
 to ensure scalable and sustainable solutions
* Support transition from project delivery to steady-state support and continuous improvement



  





**Qualification:** 



* Strong hands-on experience with
 **SAP Transportation Management (TM)**
* Experience working on
 **large, global SAP S/4HANA logistics or supply chain programs**
* Hands-on experience with
 **SAP Business Network for Logistics (BN4L)** 
 is highly desirable
* Good understanding of transportation, freight, and logistics processes
* Experience with SAP integrations such as
 **EDI, IDoc, APIs, and web services**
* Technical expertise in
 **ABAP, BOPF, BRF+, CDS Views, and OData** 
 (for technical roles)
* Experience with
 **SAP Fiori and UI5** 
 development is an advantage
* Strong communication, stakeholder management, and collaboration skills
* SAP TM or SAP S/4HANA certification is a plus

title: Volunteer Online as a Conversation Partner
description:
ENGin pairs English-fluent volunteers from around the world with Ukrainian learners for weekly online conversation practice Participants are matched 1-on-1 based on preferences, interests, and availability to ensure an effective and mutually enjoyable communication experience. After a match is made, ENGin supports learners and volunteers throughout their participation in the program with tips, resources, and problem resolution. We screen every learner and volunteer to ensure their fit for the program, and provide training and orientation.
   

  

 Since launching in 2020, ENGin has connected over 26,000 Ukrainians with over 24,000 volunteers. 99% of our learners report breaking the language barrier after 3 months of participation in our program.
   

  

 Want to learn more about volunteering with ENGin? Register to attend one of our weekly Zoom info sessions https //calendly.com/volunteer-training/volunteer-info-sessions
   

  

 You can learn more about ENGin at www.enginprogram.org/volunteer . If you have any questions before signing up, please contact us at info@enginprogram.org.
   

  

 ,
   

  

**Ready to change a life from the comfort of home?**
 Join ENGin as a conversation partner and be matched with a learner in Ukraine for weekly one-on-one English conversations. In just one hour a week, you can help someone build confidence, break the language barrier, and feel supported, all while discovering a new culture and making a genuine human connection.
   

  

 We’ll pair you up with a learner in Ukraine for weekly one hour videochats at times that are convenient for you. During your conversations, you’ll facilitate English practice for your partner, learn about each other’s cultures, and offer an empathetic, authentic space for connection.
   

  

 Our only requirements for volunteers are English fluency, a strong internet connection, and the ability to commit to
 **one hour a week** 
 for a minimum of 12 weeks.
   

  

 No prior tutoring experience or knowledge of Ukrainian language is needed to volunteer with ENGin. We offer ample training resources, session materials, and total flexibility to customize your sessions to fit your/your partner’s goals and preferences. Our friendly team is available to support you throughout your time with us.
   

  

 Since our launch in 2020, ENGin has matched over 30,000 volunteers with Ukrainians for authentic English-language connection across borders, and we continue to grow every day. 99% of our learners report feeling they were able to break the language barrier as a participant in our program, and 79% of our participants form lasting friendships. We're incredibly proud of these results, and we can't wait to welcome you into this global community of volunteers making them possible.
   

  

**Here's What Three ENGin Volunteers Say About Their Experience.**
* "I made a friend in Ukraine and we are teaching each other about our culture, our language, and our humor. We're even trading dad jokes! Both of us look forward to our chats and have a hard time wrapping it up."
* “Fantastic organization doing great work. So happy to be a small part of it. My partner and I have worked together for two years and have become good friends! Her English has become better, and I have become more knowledgeable about Ukraine!”
* "This program has been, I think, life-changing for both of us. I really consider her more like my daughter right now. That's how close we have become!"


**Ready to Get Started?**
 To learn more about ENGin and become a volunteer, please visit
 **www.enginprogram.org/volunteer** 
 .
   

  

**Still curious what volunteering with ENGin looks like?**
 Watch our short Introduction to Volunteering video to learn more about ENGin and the role of Conversation Partners.
   

  

 If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact our team at info@enginprogram.org.

title: Delivery Solution Architect – Hybrid Cloud, Infrastructure & AI Solutions
description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**About HPE Professional Services**
 HPE Professional Services is HPE’s innovative IT services organization, helping customers accelerate outcomes from their digital transformation initiatives. We combine industry-leading technology with deep expertise to design, integrate, and deliver modern hybrid cloud and AI-enabled solutions that drive measurable business value and superior customer experiences.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a
 **Solution Architect** 
 , you will serve as a trusted advisor and technical leader, designing end-to-end hybrid cloud and AI-enabled architectures for enterprise customers. You will work closely with customers, sales teams, and delivery organizations to align business goals with scalable, secure, and intelligent IT solutions.
   

  

 This role is ideal for a senior architect who is passionate about Private cloud and AI technologies, thrives in complex customer environments, and enjoys shaping future-ready digital platforms.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 In this role, you will:
   

  

* Establish trusted advisor relationships with senior and executive-level stakeholders.
* Design detailed, well-documented hybrid cloud and AI-enabled solutions that address customer requirements and RFPs, in close collaboration with sales teams.
* Lead workshops to gather business, technical, and data-related requirements across stakeholders.
* Facilitate goal-aligned discussions and propose architectures aligned with HPE and partner portfolios.
* Provide strategic guidance on hybrid cloud, AI, and data platform adoption, aligned with business objectives.
* Define and communicate hybrid cloud and AI adoption roadmaps, including key milestones and dependencies.
* Develop cost models, including AI workload cost estimation, and recommend strategies to optimize infrastructure and cloud spend.
* Design end-to-end architectures integrating on-premises infrastructure, cloud platforms, and AI/ML services.
* Support and lead implementation efforts, ensuring security, compliance, ethical AI principles, and best practices.
* Oversee migration of applications, data, and AI workloads between on-premises and cloud environments.
* Collaborate with data and application teams to enable AI-ready platforms, including data pipelines, model hosting, and inferencing capabilities.
* Monitor and optimize hybrid cloud and AI platform performance, leveraging automation and AIOps where applicable.
* Stay current on emerging trends in AI, machine learning, cloud-native platforms, and automation, and contribute to the technical community.


**Required Technical Experience**
 You bring strong depth across infrastructure, cloud, and emerging AI technologies:
   

  

* 7+ years of experience as a Cloud Engineer, Cloud Architect, or Infrastructure Architect.
* Strong background in hybrid cloud, IaaS, PaaS, DevOps, and CI/CD.
* Solid market knowledge of IT consulting services related to cloud and AI transformation.
* Hands-on experience with containers, Kubernetes, and microservices.
* Knowledge of Linux and Windows operating systems.
* Solid understanding of AI/ML architecture concepts, such as:
+ Model training vs. inferencing
+ Data pipelines and feature stores
+ GPU/accelerator-based workloads

* Familiarity with MLOps principles, automation, and lifecycle management of Private Cloud solutions.
* Understanding of IT infrastructure components (compute, storage, networking, virtualization) and their role in business workloads.
* Proficiency in infrastructure and solution architecture methodologies.
* Familiarity with ITIL / ITSM frameworks (preferred).
* Experience in large-scale enterprise environments is a strong advantage.


**You Are**
**Professional & Leadership Skills**
* A strong professional with business acumen and a high sense of accountability.
* Comfortable building trusted relationships with C-level and senior executives.
* A collaborative leader who coaches others, promotes teamwork, and resolves conflicts constructively.
* An excellent communicator with strong presentation, verbal, and written communication skills.
* Able to translate complex cloud and AI concepts into clear business value.
* Fluent in both the local language and English.


**Why Join Us?**
 At HPE Professional Services, you will help customers design and implement
 **future-ready Hybrid cloud and AI architectures** 
 that enable innovation, efficiency, and competitive advantage. You will work with leading-edge technologies, collaborate with highly skilled professionals, and play a key role in shaping intelligent digital platforms for global enterprises.
   

  

 If you are passionate about cloud and AI technologies, have a strong track record of delivering complex architectures, and thrive in a dynamic, customer-focused environment, we invite you to apply.
   

  

**Additional Skills**
 Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Business Growth, Change Management, Client Expectations Management, Coaching, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Customer Centric Solutions, Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow-Through, Growth Mindset, Information Technology (IT) Infrastructure, Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS), Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity, Process Improvements, Product Services, Relationship Building {+ 5 more}
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health & Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal & Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.

title: Senior Software Tester (embedded systems)
description:
Senior Software Tester - Embedded systems
   

  

**Be part of building the future of test automation**
**Overview**
 Do you want to take a leading role in shaping
 *how* 
 embedded systems are tested – not just
 *what* 
 is tested?
   

  

 At Munters, we develop sustainable and energy‑efficient climate solutions for industrial environments. Our embedded control systems are a critical part of this mission – and now we are looking for a Senior Software Tester for Embedded Systems who wants to be a key driver in our test automation journey.
   

  

 This is not a “maintain what already exists”-role. You will join us in an early and formative phase of test automation, where our clear ambition is to automate everything that can be automated – from hardware‑near system tests to integration and regression testing.
   

  

 You will have the opportunity to shape strategy, tools, frameworks and ways of working, and to use your experience to raise both quality and efficiency across the organization. If you enjoy taking ownership, challenging old truths, and driving change – this role is for you.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 As a Senior Software Tester, you will act as a
 **technical leader within test and quality for embedded systems** 
 , working closely with software, hardware and product teams.
   

  

**You Will**
* Take overall ownership of test strategy, test design and test automation for embedded control systems
* Be a driving force in the transition towards high test automation coverage, choosing and implementing frameworks, tools and best practices
* Design and execute advanced system tests, both manual and automated, including hardware‑near testing
* Build and evolve test environments, simulators, stubs and tooling
* Advocate for testability early in the development lifecycle, influencing architecture and requirements
* Analyze complex system failures and lead root‑cause investigations
* Coach and mentor other testers and developers in testing and automation practices
* Collaborate closely with developers, product management and quality functions to embed quality throughout the lifecycle
* Communicate risks, insights and improvement proposals clearly to stakeholders


 You won’t wait to be told what to improve – you will
 **see opportunities, take initiative, and push the organization forward** 
 .
   

  

**Our ambition within test automation**
 We are at the beginning of a focused journey where:
   

  

* Test automation is a first‑class citizen, not an afterthought
* We aim for maximum automation coverage where it creates value
* Test is integrated into CI/CD and daily development workflows
* We continuously explore new technologies, including AI‑assisted testing, to improve speed, coverage and insight


 You will have a
 **real mandate** 
 to influence this journey.
   

  

**Who We Think You Are**
 You are an experienced tester within embedded systems, but just as importantly, you are a change driver.
   

  

**You Likely Have**
* Several years of experience in system testing of embedded systems
* Several years of experience in test automation, e.g. Python, Robot Framework or similar
* Strong understanding of microcontrollers, embedded Linux and communication protocols
* Experience with HIL testing and troubleshooting
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and version control
* Experience working in agile/SCRUM environments


 It’s a plus if you have experience within industrial or climate control systems, C/C++, IoT/cloud technologies, or electrical systems – but mindset and drive are just as important as the exact background.
   

  

**Personal qualities we value**
* Proactive and courageous – you are not afraid to challenge existing solutions
* Driven by improvement – quality, efficiency and technical excellence motivate you
* Strategic yet hands‑on – you can define direction and still build things yourself
* Collaborative and communicative – you enjoy working across disciplines
* Curious and open‑minded, with an interest in new tools, methods and AI‑based solutions that create real value.


**Why Munters?**
* A real opportunity to influence architecture, tooling and quality direction
* A role with both technical leadership and hands‑on work
* Products that contribute to a more sustainable world
* A collaborative and knowledgeable engineering culture
* A transformation journey where your experience truly matters

title: SVT söker systemtekniker med fokus på klientutveckling
description:
**Vad Vi Erbjuder Dig**
 Hos oss på SVT får du arbeta i en kreativ och samhällsviktig miljö där teknik möter journalistik. Du blir en del av ett engagerat team som tillsammans driver vår digitaliseringsresa framåt. Vi erbjuder en varierande och händelserik vardag där du får möjlighet att påverka, utvecklas och bidra till SVT:s långsiktiga utveckling.
   

  

**Hos Oss Får Du**
* Arbeta i en inkluderande kultur med kollegor som brinner för sitt uppdrag
* Delta i spännande projekt och tekniska initiativ
* Möjlighet att utvecklas både tekniskt och professionellt


**Vem Vi Tror Att Du Är**
 Du trivs med att samarbeta och vill utvecklas tillsammans med ditt team. Du är serviceinriktad, kommunikativ och initiativtagande. Vi ser gärna att du har flera års erfarenhet av klientutveckling i större IT-miljöer.
   

  

**Du Behöver Ha**
* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT/teknik
* Flerårig erfarenhet av arbete inom IT
* Goda kunskaper i SCCM, Intune, OS Deployment, Active Directory, GPO och PowerShell
* Erfarenhet av M365, Windows 11, autopilot och APIér
* Kunskap om Mac
* Intresse av förändringsarbete
* Förmåga att uttrycka dig väl på svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift


**Meriterande**
* Power BI och automatisering är bra att kunna i den här rollen
* Erfarenhet av att ha arbetat i en produktorganisation


**Vad Den Här Tjänsten Innebär**
* Ansvara för klientpaketering, samordning och tester
* Stötta interna beställare och hantera ärenden i vårt ärendehanteringssystem
* Driva utvecklingsinitiativ kring klienthantering och klientplattformen
* Arbeta nära tjänsteägare och IT-säkerhet


 Du blir en del av gruppen Teknisk Support och produktionsservicetekniker (PST), där vi tillsammans säkerställer att SVT:s interna IT-processer fungerar smidigt och effektivt.
   

  

**Hur Du Ansöker**
 I den här rekryteringsprocessen använder vi oss av urvalsfrågor och CV i stället för att be om personligt brev. Det gör vi för att säkerställa att rekryteringen blir kompetensbaserad och effektiv och att vi får samma viktiga information av alla kandidater. Skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt då intervjuer kommer att ske löpande. Sista ansökningsdag är den 10 maj.
   

  

**Annat Som Är Bra Att Veta**
 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid med placering i Stockholm. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse. Svenskt medborgarskap krävs då tjänsten kan placeras i säkerhetsklass. Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta Catarina Norlén, gruppchef Teknisk support och PST, via mejl catarina.norlen@svt.se. Fackliga frågor besvaras av Maria Nassikas Unionen, Gunnar R Johansson SJF och Fanny Lindhé SACO via växeln 08-784 00 00.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Krav- och verksamhetsanalytiker
description:
Sök jobbet
   

  

 Är du en it-nära krav- och verksamhetsanalytiker som trivs i gränslandet mellan verksamhet och it? Drivs du av att göra nytta och påverka samhället på riktigt? Då kan det här vara en roll för dig.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 I rollen som krav- och verksamhetsanalytiker hos oss arbetar du i ett tvärfunktionellt agilt team där du tillsammans med systemutvecklare, ux-specialister, utredare och andra verksamhetsspecialister löpande levererar värde. Ditt ansvar innebär att tillsammans med teamet utreda och dokumentera verksamhetens krav i en tydlig struktur, både på övergripande och detaljerad nivå. Kraven omvandlas sedan till lösningsförslag och utvecklingsuppgifter tillsammans med teamets övriga roller. Du fungerar även som ett stöd när det kommer till prioritering och analysarbete kopplat till området.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära dina kollegor och ni ansvarar gemensamt i teamet för kvaliteten på arbetet. Du fungerar som länken mellan användarnas behov och de tekniska möjligheterna, vilket innebär att du har många olika kontaktytor på jobbet. Ni driver utveckling tillsammans för att skapa våra framtida digitala hälsodatalösningar och du är med och skapar nytta för Sveriges medborgare.
   

  

**Om dig**
 Vi söker dig som är samarbetsinriktad och har lätt för att bygga relationer i hela organisationen. Det är en självklarhet för dig att ta ansvar för ditt eget arbete och du arbetar både strukturerat och noggrant. Vidare har du en flexibel inställning i din yrkesroll och du ser till helheten i såväl stort som smått.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* relevant akademisk utbildning alternativt likvärdig arbetslivserfarenhet
* aktuell erfarenhet av kravarbete i it-nära verksamhet
* erfarenhet av agilt arbetssätt
* goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift.


**Det är meriterande för tjänsten om du har:**
* erfarenhet av arbete inom vård-, hälso- och/eller omsorgssektorn eller från apoteksbranschen.


**Vad erbjuder vi?**
 E-hälsomyndigheten är en myndighet i tillväxt och vi driver utvecklingen av nationell digital infrastruktur inom hälsa, vård och omsorg. Vi skapar förutsättningar för digitala tjänster och lösningar för både privatpersoner och professioner inom hälso- och sjukvård, apotek och socialtjänst. Vi arbetar för att hälsodata ska bli tillgängliga i hela vårdkedjan.
   

  

 Vi är cirka 600 medarbetare i Kalmar och Stockholm. Hos oss finns möjlighet att göra skillnad i en innovativ miljö med trevliga och kompetenta arbetskamrater. Alla medarbetare har förtroendearbetstid och kan arbeta delvis på distans. Läs mer om E-hälsomyndigheten som arbetsplats: Jobba hos oss
   

  

**Är du intresserad?**
 Frågor angående tjänsten besvaras av rekryterande chef Anna Sandell, 010-458 6264.
   

  

 Frågor angående rekryteringsprocessen besvaras av HR-specialist Dorothea Lockman, 010-175 3741.
   

  

 Välkommen att skicka in din ansökan och cv via vårt rekryteringsverktyg senast den 26 maj. Ladda gärna upp examensbevis, betyg och intyg som är relevanta för tjänsten i samband med din ansökan.
   

  

 Anställningen är tillsvidare med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde snarast eller enligt överenskommelse. Placeringsort för anställningen är Kalmar eller Stockholm. Arbetet kan innebära tjänsteresor, främst mellan Kalmar och Stockholm.
   

  

 En anställning hos oss kan innebära placering i säkerhetsklass. Därför kan vi komma att behöva genomföra en säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585). För en del arbetsuppgifter i säkerhetsklass krävs svenskt medborgarskap.
   

  

 Om du har beslut om skyddade personuppgifter, kontakta den HR-specialist som finns namngiven i annonsen.
   

  

 Läs mer om oss på www.ehalsomyndigheten.se
   

  

**Anställningsform**
 Tillsvidareanställning
   

  

**Anställningens omfattning**
 Heltid
   

  

**Tillträde**
 Enligt överenskommelse
   

  

**Löneform**
 Individuell lönesättning
   

  

**Antal lediga befattningar**
 1
   

  

**Sysselsättningsgrad**
 100
   

  

**Ort**
 Stockholm
   

  

**Län**
 Stockholms län
   

  

**Land**
 Sverige
   

  

**Referensnummer**
 2026/03390
   

  

**Kontakt**
* Anna Sandell, rekryterande chef, 010-4586264
* Dorothea Lockman, HR-specialist, 010-1753741
