title: Global Head of Automotive and R&D Engineering
description:
##### **Project description**

About DXC Luxoft Engineering Services  

DXC Engineering Services, powered by Luxoft, is a next-generation engineering partner combining deep domain expertise, software system integration capabilities, and proprietary IP assets to help clients design, build, and evolve smart products and intelligent systems. Operating as a focused business within DXC Technology — with the agility and autonomy of a specialist firm — we serve over 280 clients across 21 countries, partnering with enterprises where physical and digital product complexity is highest.  

We are not a traditional IT services provider. We bring together consulting, embedded software engineering, cloud and connectivity capabilities, and an expanding portfolio of partnerships and owned IP to act as a true engineering co-creator for our clients. Our work spans the full product lifecycle — from architecture and design through productization and continuous evolution.  

In the Automotive industry we enable digital business transformation, enhance customer experiences, and boost operational efficiency through our strategy, solutioning, and software engineering services. There are millions of cars on the road today with solutions designed by Luxoft.
  

With expertise spanning future mobility technologies such as Digital Cockpits, Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS), Electric, Over the Air (OTA), Luxoft delivers user experience design, software engineering and integration expertise that improves productivity, accelerates time to market and enhances innovation processes.  

  

Role Overview  

* The Global Head of Automotive and R&D Engineering is one of the most senior and strategically significant leadership positions within DXC Engineering Services. This executive leads large and established business domain Automotive Engineering while simultaneously spearheading our expansion into adjacent ER&D verticals including but not limited to Advanced Manufacturing, Consumer Electronics, Aerospace, and Logistics & Transportation Services.
* This is a senior management role with full P&L ownership, global scope, and a remit to drive both organic growth and market repositioning. The right leader will combine a powerful automotive industry network with a genuine appetite to build new markets — and will understand how to position DXC Engineering Services not simply as an outsourcing partner, but as a software system integrator and smart connected product co-creator.
* With a team of over 3,000 engineers globally, the role demands a leader who operates at the intersection of commercial vision, engineering credibility, and organizational strength.
##### **Responsibilities**


Hold full P&L accountability for the Automotive and R&D Engineering business globally, ensuring sustainable growth, margin health, and delivery quality.


Lead and evolve the go-to-market strategy for the Automotive portfolio while building parallel growth momentum across Manufacturing, Consumer Electronics, Aerospace, and Logistics & Transportation — industries undergoing profound smart product transformation.


Position DXC Engineering Services as a software system integrator and next-generation ER&D partner — leveraging proprietary IP assets, strategic partnerships, and engineering excellence to differentiate from traditional service providers.


Drive a high-growth, high-performance culture across a globally distributed team; attract, develop, and retain top engineering and commercial talent.


Build and deepen executive-level relationships with OEM clients, Tier 1 suppliers, and enterprise clients across target verticals — with a strong focus on the C-suite and engineering leadership.


Champion cross-selling and solution integration across DXC Engineering Services offerings, creating broader client value and expanding commercial footprint within accounts.


Uphold and promote DXC Engineering Services' heritage of quality, innovation, and transformation across all phases of client engagement and business operations.


Serve as a recognized thought leader in the Automotive and broader ER&D market — representing the company at industry forums, in client engagements, and in strategic conversations with partners.


Enhance the firm's global footprint while driving collaboration across geographies and practice areas.


##### **Skills**


Must have


A proven general manager with a strong commercial track record in engineering services, ER&D, or product engineering — with demonstrated success scaling a services-oriented business against ambitious revenue targets.


Deep knowledge of the Automotive industry is essential; familiarity with or appetite to expand into adjacent smart product industries (Manufacturing, Consumer Electronics, Aerospace, Logistics) is highly valued.


Established network within the automotive ecosystem — OEMs, Tier 1 suppliers, and technology partners — and the credibility to open and develop relationships at the C-level.


Proven ability to build and manage a complex P&L, including large multi-year accounts alongside a portfolio of growing and emerging clients.


Experience operating within matrixed organizations where influence, collaboration, and stakeholder alignment are as important as direct authority.


A track record of organizational transformation — able to align large, distributed teams behind a unified client-focused vision and execute against ambitious plans.


Ambidextrous leadership style: strategically oriented, operationally grounded, and commercially relentless.


Ability to articulate and sell the value of software system integration, embedded engineering, and smart product development — both to clients and internally.


Experience attracting, mentoring, and developing senior talent in a high-performance, multicultural environment.


Exceptional communication, executive presence, and the ability to lead from the front in complex sales and client situations.


Nice to have


*

Executive

title: AI Engineer, Retrieval & Quality
description:
**The Role**


Among other things, you'll design and own the systems that decide which licensed data reaches our customers' models, and the evaluation infrastructure that proves it's better than the alternatives.


In this role, you will:

* Design and operate the retrieval pipeline that serves licensed data to AI agents and models in real time: hybrid search, ranking, fusion, re-ranking
* Build the eval harness that runs continuously, gates deploys on quality, and surfaces regressions before customers feel them
* Translate research from our data science team into production systems, then own them end to end
* Define what "good" means for Redpine's output and build the dashboards that prove it across customers, verticals, and competitors
* Work across the stack as quality demands it, from ingestion signals through embedding pipelines to the API response

**The Team**


We're a small, fast growing team based in Stockholm, working across infrastructure, data, and AI. The same people designing systems are building, shipping, and running them. Feedback loops are short and ownership is direct.


You'll work closely with our data scientists, who own research, methodology, and data quality. You'll own production retrieval and the eval infrastructure that runs on top of that.


We're early enough that many of the core systems are still being defined. That means you won't be scaling someone else's architecture.

**What we're looking for**

* Production experience with retrieval systems: search, ranking, recommendation systems, or RAG at scale, not just notebooks
* Strong opinions on evaluation, both offline and online. You've designed test sets, run A/B experiments, and argued with data scientists and product managers about whether a metric reflects reality
* Comfortable with the full retrieval stack: embeddings, vector and lexical indexes, learning-to-rank, hybrid systems & knowledge graphs
* Have shipped, not only researched. You know the difference between a method that works in a paper and one that works in production
* Comfort operating where direction evolves quickly and problems aren't yet well-defined
* We work primarily in Go, Rust and Python in a multi cloud environment. We hire for judgment, not stack.

**Why this role**


Most retrieval and AI engineering roles are about plugging the latest models into an existing product. This isn't.


You'll be working on questions like:

* How do you prove that licensed data produces better agent outputs than scraped data, with rigor that holds up to a customer's evaluation team?
* What does a retrieval system look like when freshness, provenance, and rights are first-class signals alongside relevance?
* How do you build evals that are honest enough to fail your own deploys and convincing enough to win customers?


This role sits at the core of whether Redpine is differentiated infrastructure or a nicer API on commodity vector search.

**Practical details**

* This role is based in Stockholm and requires a valid Swedish work permit or similar eligibility
* Relocation support available
* Competitive salary and meaningful equity

**About Redpine**


If models were the first wave of AI, and compute the second, we're building the data layer that comes next.


Only a small fraction of the world's data is on the open internet. The rest, high-quality, domain-specific, often critical, sits behind paywalls, in databases, or with rights holders. Redpine is building the infrastructure to unlock it.


We provide AI builders and autonomous agents with access to licensed, high-quality, multimodal data through a unified platform and API. The goal is simple: make AI systems more accurate, more useful, and grounded in real-world information.


We're backed by Nordic Ninja, Node VC, and Luminar, alongside angels from OpenAI, Spotify, and Perplexity.

title: AI Engineer, Cloud Infrastructure
description:
**The Role**


As an AI Engineer in Cloud Infrastructure at Redpine, you will design and own the foundation for a new type of AI platform, one where data access, compliance, and real-time retrieval are first-class concerns.

  

This role is based in Stockholm, Sweden and requires a valid Swedish work permit or eligibility.

  

In this role, you will:

* Design and build the infrastructure powering our data platform and APIs
* Work on systems that serve high-quality data to AI models and agents in real time1
* Develop abstractions that make complex data access simple for developers
* Build for a new category of workloads, where retrieval, latency, and data quality matter as much as compute
* Make architectural decisions that will define how the platform scales globally
* Take ownership of reliability and performance as the system evolves

**The Team**


We’re a small, focused and highly technical team based in Stockholm, working across infrastructure, data, and AI. The same people designing systems are building, shipping, and running them. Feedback loops are short and ownership is direct. We’re early enough that many of the core systems are still being built. You won’t be scaling someone else’s architecture, instead you’ll be defining it.

 **What We’re Looking For**

* Production experience building data infrastructure: vector database, object storage at scale, streaming/ingestion, data transfer infrastructure & pipelines
* You have a strong understanding of cloud platforms and modern infra tooling
* Deep experience with Kubernetes or similar orchestration systems1
* A strong interest in working on systems where data, not just compute, is the core constraint
* The judgment and ability to operate in an environment where direction evolves quickly and many problems are not yet well-defined
* Experience in monitoring, observability, and security is a plus.1

**Why This Role**

  

You’ll be working on questions like:

* How should AI systems access data that isn’t public?
* What does a real-time, API-native data layer for agents look like?
* How do you make licensed data as easy to use as scraped data, but better?


This is closer to building Spotify in the early days of music streaming than running a traditional cloud platform. Your work will define whether we build a foundational data layer or a commodity cloud service.

**Practical Details**

* This role is based in Stockholm and requires a valid Swedish work permit or similar eligibility
* Small team 10+ people, high ownership1
* Backed by strong VCs and angels from OpenAI, Spotify, and Perplexity
* Relocation support available

**About Redpine**


If models were the first wave of AI, and compute the second, we're building the data layer that comes next.


Only a small fraction of the world's data is on the open internet. The rest, high-quality, domain-specific, often critical, sits behind paywalls, in databases, or with rights holders. Redpine is building the infrastructure to unlock it.


We provide AI builders and autonomous agents with access to licensed, high-quality, multimodal data through a unified platform and API. The goal is simple: make AI systems more accurate, more useful, and grounded in real-world information.


We're backed by Nordic Ninja, Node VC, and Luminar, alongside angels from OpenAI, Spotify, and Perplexity.

title: Head of Connectivity
description:
At Electrolux Professional Group we hire to meet needs beyond tomorrow  

  



UNLOCK YOUR POTENTIAL
At Electrolux Professional Group, we believe potential powers progress. We’re not searching for perfection—we’re looking for people with the right mindset. If you're curious, resilient, and ready to grow, you'll find the space to lead, innovate, and together with us Meet the needs beyond tomorrow.  

  

https://www.electroluxprofessionalgroup.com/en/join-us/
  

HEAD OF CONNECTIVITY
The Head of Connectivity & Digital Platforms will own and scale Electrolux Professional’s global connected ecosystem, including **OnE Connected** and associated digital platforms. This role is responsible for defining the **end‑to‑end vision, architecture, and roadmap** for connectivity, IoT, cloud platforms, and digital services across Electrolux Professional’s Food, Beverage, and Laundry solutions, ensuring measurable customer value, recurring revenue growth, and competitive differentiation.


Electrolux Professional’s strategy explicitly emphasizes **digitalization, connected platforms, service‑as‑a‑solution, and data‑driven customer value** , making this role a **core growth enabler** for the Group.  



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING


**Strategy & Leadership**

* Define and own the **global connectivity and digital platform strategy** , aligned with Electrolux Professional’s growth pillars: innovation, digitalization, sustainability, and service expansion
* Establish a long‑term roadmap for **connected appliances, cloud platforms, digital services, and data monetization** across product lines.
* Act as executive sponsor for **OnE Connected** , Electrolux Professional’s all‑in‑one digital ecosystem for connected equipment and workflows.
* Lead cross‑functional alignment across Product Management, R&D, Service, IT, Cybersecurity, Sales, and Operations.

**Platform & Ecosystem Ownership**

* Own **end‑to‑end accountability** for digital platforms including:
	+ Device connectivity and IoT architecture
	+ Cloud platforms, APIs, data pipelines, and analytics
	+ Partner, distributor, and customer portals
* Ensure platforms are **secure, scalable, GDPR‑compliant, and cloud‑native** , supporting enterprise‑scale deployments across global customers.
* Drive platform reuse and standardization across Food, Beverage, and Laundry portfolios.

**Customer Value & Business Outcomes**

* Translate connectivity into **tangible customer outcomes** : improved uptime, efficiency, sustainability, food safety, hygiene compliance, and total cost of ownership reduction.
* Enable **new digital business models** (e.g., subscription services, data‑driven services, service‑as‑a‑solution).
* Partner with Commercial and Service teams to drive **adoption, engagement, and monetization** of digital solutions.

**Technology & Architecture Governance**

* Define enterprise‑level **reference architectures** for IoT, cloud, edge, data, AI, and cybersecurity.
* Govern technology choices, ensuring interoperability across connected equipment and future acquisitions.
* Ensure alignment with Electrolux Professional’s broader digital platform and partner ecosystems

**Innovation & External Ecosystem**

* Build strategic partnerships with **cloud providers, IoT platforms, technology vendors, and startups** .
* Track emerging trends in Industrial IoT, AI, sustainability analytics, and digital services relevant to professional foodservice and laundry industries.
* Support M&A integration from a **digital and connectivity perspective** .

**People & Organizational Leadership**

* Build and lead a **multi‑disciplinary, international team** spanning product, engineering, platform, and data.
* Foster a product‑led, agile, and customer‑obsessed culture.
Develop internal capabilities and talent succession in connectivity and digital platforms.  
* 

**Key Interfaces**

* Executive Leadership Team
* Product Management & R&D
* Global Service & Customer Care
* Sales, Marketing, and Business Transformation
* IT, Cybersecurity, and Data teams
External technology and platform partners  
* 

WHAT’S NEEDED FOR YOU TO THRIVE


**Experience**

* 12–18+ years of experience in **digital platforms, IoT, connected products, or large‑scale cloud ecosystems** , preferably in industrial, appliance, equipment, or B2B environments.
* Proven executive‑level ownership of **connected platforms used by thousands of customers and devices** .
* Demonstrated success in scaling **IoT / digital ecosystems** from pilot to global adoption.
* Experience translating platforms into **commercial value and recurring revenues** .
* International leadership experience within complex, matrix organizations.
Fluent English; other languages will be considered a plus  
* 

**Technical & Domain Expertise**

* Strong understanding of:
	+ IoT and device connectivity architectures
	+ Cloud platforms and data architectures
	+ APIs, microservices, and integration patterns
	+ Cybersecurity and GDPR requirements
* Experience with **digital service platforms** , analytics, and customer portals.

**Leadership & Personal Attributes**

* Strategic, business‑oriented technology leader
* Strong communicator at executive and board level
* Customer‑centric with a product mindset
* Able to balance long‑term vision with near‑term delivery
Comfortable operating in a global, multi‑cultural environment  
* 

OUR CULTURE IN 4 WORDS
Be Customer Obsessed. Build Trust. Be Bold. Act Sustainably.
(We’re building it every day — and we’d love your help.)  

  

WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU
Trust, ownership, and the opportunity to grow
 * Be part of a company grounded in customer focus, sustainability leadership, innovation, and social impact. We aim to Meet Needs Beyond Tomorrow
* The possibility to work hybrid and build a flexible worklife balance
* Be part of an industry shift that makes a difference — in how people live, cook, clean, care, and serve
* Plus: country-specific perks and benefits designed to support your well-being.

  
**Electrolux Professional Group - meeting needs beyond tomorrow**

Electrolux Professional Group is the sustainability leader in our industry and one of the leading global providers of food service, beverage, and laundry solutions for professional users. Our innovative products and worldwide service network make our customers’ work-life easier, more profitable – and truly sustainable every day. Our solutions and products are sold in over 110 countries. In 2025, the Electrolux Professional Group had global sales of SEK 12.2bn and approximately 4,300 employees. Electrolux Professional’s B-shares are listed at Nasdaq Stockholm. For more information, visit https://www.electroluxprofessionalgroup.com

title: Principal Technical Program Manager, AWS Digital Sovereignty & European Sovereign CloudDigital
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


AWS is building the future of sovereign cloud computing. As a Principal Technical Program Manager on our Digital Sovereignty team, you will drive strategic programs that enable AWS customers to maintain control over their data while leveraging the full power of AWS cloud services.  

You will work directly with the Director of Digital Sovereignty and Managing Director of European Sovereign Cloud to orchestrate technical workstreams that support our global strategy and initiatives.  

This role requires deep technical expertise, strategic thinking, and the ability to influence without authority across a complex, matrixed organization. You will own technology roadmaps, manage portfolios of programs, and drive execution of initiatives with broad cross-organizational impact. You will also help the director to prioritize his external engagements.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

Strategic Leadership  

* Develop annual strategic plans that align cross-functional technical contributors toward unified business outcomes
* Identify gaps and opportunities across countries, architectures, and organizations
* Influence organizational technical priorities and business strategy through data-driven contributions
* Maintain and foster executive relationships at Director and Vice President levels
* Collaborates with the Director and Go-To-Market team to plan, prepare, and execute high-impact executive customer engagements, ensuring technical discussions are tailored, well-coordinated, and aligned to customer priorities

  

Program Execution  

* Lead global programs and coordinate efforts across matrixed teams of Solution Architects, Technical Business Developers, Technical Program Managers, and Account Managers
* Drive execution through influence and collaboration, providing technical guidance and mentorship without direct reporting relationships
* Define clear, measurable goals and success metrics aligned with internal Amazon customer needs across diverse business units
* Assess risks, anticipate bottlenecks, provide escalation management, and make tradeoffs between business needs and technical constraints
* Manage team outcomes and cross-functional deliverables using Salesforce and tracking mechanisms

  

Cross-Functional Collaboration  

* Foster deep collaboration with AWS service teams (EC2, S3, Global Networking, Bedrock), Infrastructure, Partners, and Professional Services
* Orchestrate cross-functional initiatives that accelerate innovation and customer outcomes
* Facilitate knowledge sharing and best practice development across technical contributors
* Build organizational capability and ensure consistent approaches to complex technical challenges

  

Technical Excellence  

* Bring strong, data-driven, and strategic technical judgment to decisions
* Lead design, implementation, and delivery of highly complex cross-functional projects in ambiguous or new technology areas
* Create scalable mechanisms, methodologies, and best practices for the organization
* Recognize and actively steer teams away from prior technology failure patterns
* Write effective narratives (PRFAQs, strategic documentation) and present to senior leadership
* Provides technical review and input to support the go-to-market team in developing, scaling, and maintaining internal and external technical enablement materials, ensuring accuracy and technical credibility across internal and external audiences

  

About the team  

About Digital Sovereignty at AWS?  

AWS has prioritized sovereignty since our beginning as the only major cloud provider allowing customers to control the location and movement of their data. Digital sovereignty means different things across countries and regions—there is no single definition. Through conversations with customers, analysts, and regulators, we have identified key themes: data residency and security, operator access restriction, resiliency and survivability, and independence and transparency.
  

The AWS European Sovereign Cloud represents our commitment to meeting the evolving sovereignty requirements of EU customers. Learn more:https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/aws/in-the-works-aws-european-sovereign-cloud/
  

  

Why AWS?  

Work-Life Harmony We value work-life balance. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why flexibility is part of our working culture.
  

Inclusive Team Culture AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique.
  

Mentorship and Career Growth We continuously raise our performance bar as we strive to become Earth's Best Employer. You'll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship, and career-advancing resources to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.
  

Diverse Experiences Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all preferred qualifications, we encourage you to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn't followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don't let it stop you from applying.
**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Experience in project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management
* Experience developing strategies that influence leadership decisions at the organizational level
* 8+ years experience with Bachelor's degree, or 5+ years with Master's degree or equivalent experience
* Experience in digital sovereignty, regulated industry, public sectors, regulators, European data regulations and certifications (GDPR, C5, SecNumCloud, etc).
* Demonstrated experience building processes and working with software development teams
* Experience leading creation, revision, and improvement of standard operational procedures (SOPs).

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience in information security and compliance
* Master's degree in a technical field
* Experience presenting to senior leadership
* Experience defining KPIs and SLAs used to scale businesses and provide reporting to senior leadership
* Strong sense of ownership and ability to promote operational excellence
* Deep knowledge of core system technologies or broad understanding of company systems and technologies

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
company_description: Amazon Web Services (AWS) offers the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform, with over 200 powerful services that enable our customers and our people to make more of an impact.

title: AI Engineer
description:
Help AI move from experimentation to production impact.
  
What if your work didn’t stop at prototypes — but became part of how a global business operates, makes decisions, and ensures trust in its systems?
  
At ASSA ABLOY Entrance Systems in Stockholm, you’ll help build AI systems such as AI assistants, knowledge retrieval tools, and automation services integrated into business workflows.
  
  

Why this role matters
  
AI adoption is moving beyond experimentation into production-grade systems that must be reliable and actively used in real products and operations.
  
We are scaling how AI is used across the business – and need engineers who can turn models and ideas into robust services that integrate with real products and processes.
  
  

The role
  
You’ll take ownership of designing and delivering production AI systems end-to-end — from integrating LLMs and retrieval pipelines to building backend services and running them in the cloud.
  
This is a hands-on engineering role where you build, ship, and operate real systems into production environments.
  
  

What you’ll work on
  
Build and ship GenAI applications (RAG systems, LLM-powered assistants, agent-based workflows for analysis and knowledge retrieval)
  
Develop production Python backend services and APIs powering AI features in production systems
  
Design and implement end-to-end ML system architectures (models, data pipelines, retrieval systems, and domain logic)
  
Deploy and operate AI services in Azure (including Azure OpenAI), with some AWS exposure
  
Work with modern LLM stacks (prompt engineering, retrieval optimization, orchestration, evaluation, and tool use)
  
Translate real operational needs into production AI systems, working closely with stakeholders and engineers
  
  

What will help you succeed
  
MSc or PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence or relevant fields — or up to 3 years of experience in AI/ML or data science.
  
Strong Python skills and experience building real applications, services, or data-driven systems.
  
Solid understanding of machine learning fundamentals.
  
Hands-on experience with Generative AI (LLMs, RAG systems, or agent-based applications).
  
Familiarity with modern AI tooling such as LLM APIs (e.g. Azure OpenAI), vector databases, embeddings, and retrieval systems.
  
Experience working with production-oriented systems such as APIs, backend services, data pipelines, or deployed ML/AI solutions, with awareness of constraints like performance, scalability, reliability, and cost.
  
  

We value strong fundamentals and practical experience working with real systems more than formal experience length.
  
  

Why ASSA ABLOY Entrance Systems
  
You’ll work in a GenAI & Data Science team building AI systems that move beyond experimentation into production environments.
  
Modern GenAI stack — Work hands-on with LLMs, RAG pipelines, Azure OpenAI, and vector databases
  
Build & ship focus — Take features from idea → implementation → production deployment and real usage
  
Engineering ownership — High autonomy over system design, architecture, and implementation decisions
  
Growth environment — Be part of building a modern AI engineering capability from an early stage
  
Work–life balance — Hybrid working and a sustainable engineering culture focused on long-term quality
  
  

This role is offered as an initial one-year fixed-term contract, with a strong intention to transition into a permanent position based on performance and business needs.
  
  

Ready to build production AI systems?
  
If you’re motivated by building AI systems that go beyond experimentation and are deployed in real-world operational use — this is your opportunity.
  
Apply today and help shape how AI systems are engineered, shipped, and operated across ASSA ABLOY.
  
We review applications continuously, so don’t wait.
  
We’re committed to building diverse, inclusive teams and encourage applications from all who see themselves thriving here. To make sure your personal data stays protected, we do not review applications sent via email or post. If you have questions about the role or process, contact Léa Rein, Senior Talent Acquisition Business Partner at lea.rein@assaabloy.com.
  
Let’s create a safer and more open world — together.
  
We are the ASSA ABLOY Group
  
Our people have made us the global leader in access solutions. In return, we open doors for them wherever they go. With nearly 63,000 colleagues in more than 70 different countries, we help billions of people experience a more open world. Our innovations make all sorts of spaces – physical and virtual – safer, more secure, and easier to access.
  
As an employer, we value results – not titles, or backgrounds. We empower our people to build their career around their aspirations and our ambitions – supporting them with regular feedback, training, and development opportunities. Our colleagues think broadly about where they can make the most impact, and we encourage them to grow their role locally, regionally, or even internationally.
  
As we welcome new people on board, it’s important to us to have diverse, inclusive teams, and we value different perspectives and experiences.
company_description: Let’s create a safer and more open world – together!

title: Senior Partner Account Manager
description:
### **Senior Partner Account Manager**


* JR-160610
* Hybrid
* Stockholm
* Sales
* Full time

**Who are we?**



Equinix is the world’s digital infrastructure company®, shortening the path to connectivity to enable the innovations that enrich our work, life and planet.

  


A place where bold ideas are welcomed, human connection is valued, and everyone has the opportunity to shape their future.



A career at Equinix means being at the center of shaping what comes next and amplifying customer value through innovation and impact. You’ll work across teams, influence key decisions, and help shape the path forward. You’ll find belonging, purpose, and a team that welcomes you—because when you feel valued, you’re empowered to do your best work.**Senior Partner Account Manager – Nordics**

**Why this role matters**


This is a role for someone who thrives in ambiguity, enjoys building from the ground up, and wants to shape how Equinix partners drive real pipeline and revenue impact.


You will act as the go-to partner leader in the Nordics, working across a diverse ecosystem of Hyperscalers, Neoclouds, Global Systems Integrators, Distributors, Service Providers, and regional partners - connecting strategy to execution and turning partnerships into a measurable growth lever.

**What you’ll do**

**Drive partner pipeline generation and deal execution – end-to-end**

* Own deal registrations, opportunity tracking, and joint funnel development
* Actively work with partners and Equinix sales teams to progress and identify net new opportunities
* Ensure deals are properly positioned, registered, and followed through to close
* When needed attend tactical escalation calls both internally and externally

**Coordinate internally to get things done**

* Work cross-functionally with Sales, Marketing, Sales Engineering, Operations, and Customer teams
* Facilitate internal alignment to support partner opportunities and remove blockers
* Ensure partners know how to engage the right Equinix resources at the right time

**Track, measure, and improve**

* Maintain visibility on pipeline, deal progress, and partner performance
* Conduct business and pipeline reviews to assess progress and identify gaps
* Continuously improve how partnerships are executed based on what works in practice

 **Enable and activate partners**

* Train partners on how to work with Equinix (processes, tools, engagement model)
* Guide partners on how to identify, position, and progress opportunities
* Help partner sales teams adopt new ways of selling with and through Equinix

 **Execute and operationalize go-to-market plans**

* Build and drive joint sales plans with partners, including targets and pipeline creation
* Coordinate with cross-functional stakeholders and business service partners with Partner Marketing on campaigns, messaging, and partner collateral
* Other GTM Execution: pipeline development, sales targets, sales plan, deal management, Day 2 support, billing and ordering support, and QBRs

 **Manage partner relationships and engagement**

* Build and maintain relationships across partner organizations, from executives to sales teams
* Identify and align executive sponsors on both sides
* Run regular cadence meetings, including partner reviews and opportunity checkpoints

 **To be successful in this role**


You’ll thrive here if you:

* **You create momentum, not wait for it**  

You naturally take ownership and accountability, push things forward in close collaboration with local / regional / global cross functional stakeholders, and don’t rely on direction, structure, or reminders to get things done.
* **You are comfortable operating without a finished playbook**  

You don’t need everything to be defined. You can work with partial information, make decisions, and adjust as you go.
* **You combine persistence with pragmatism**  

You follow through consistently, but you also know when to adapt your approach to unlock progress.
* **You build trust across very different stakeholders**  

You can flex your style, from engaging senior executives to working hands-on with partner sales teams and know how to bring people along.
* **You don’t let ambiguity get in your way**


You are comfortable and capable to operate with ambiguity and system and tools under development

 **What you bring**

* **Experience in partner/channel sales within cloud, network, data center, or related technology environments**
* Proven ability to drive pipeline and revenue through partners
* Established relationships within the Nordic partner ecosystem, with the ability to quickly build credibility and open doors
* Strong stakeholder management across cross-functional audiences
* **Fluent Swedish and English**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience


Equinix is at a unique moment of transformation. We are significantly investing in our partner ecosystem to accelerate growth, and we’re looking for someone to help **build and scale that engine in the Nordics**.


Equinix is committed to ensuring that our employment process is open to all individuals, including those with a disability. If you are a qualified candidate and need assistance or an accommodation, please let us know by completing form.


Equinix is an Equal Employment Opportunity and, in the U.S., an Affirmative Action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to unlawful consideration of race, color, religion, creed, national or ethnic origin, ancestry, place of birth, citizenship, sex, pregnancy / childbirth or related medical conditions, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital or domestic partnership status, age, veteran or military status, physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, political / organizational affiliation, status as a victim or family member of a victim of crime or abuse, or any other status protected by applicable law.

**We use artificial intelligence in our hiring process. Learn more** **here****.**


This posting is for a backfill position, meaning it is to fill an existing vacancy within our organization.
company_description: Equinix (Nasdaq: EQIX) is the world’s digital infrastructure company®.

title: Technical Pre-Sales & Solution Specialist
description:
Vill du kombinera teknik, affär och kunddialog i en roll där du får vara med och forma framtidens kommunikationslösningar för våra företagskunder. Brinner du för att översätta komplex teknik till tydligt kundvärde och affärsresultat? Hos oss på Tre B2B söker vi nu en Technical Pre-Sales & Solution Specialist.
  
  

Som Technical Pre-Sales & Solution Specialist hos oss blir du en nyckelperson i Tre: s företagsaffär. Rollen är bred och kombinerar teknisk rådgivning, affärsutveckling och kundnära säljstöd. Du arbetar med moderna kommunikationsplattformar – exempelvis UCaAS, molnbaserad telefoni, mobilplattformar och IoT – och hjälper våra företagskunder att hitta rätt lösningar utifrån deras behov.
  
  

Du deltar i kundmöten tillsammans med våra säljare och tar fram tekniska lösningsförslag, paketerar erbjudanden, sätter prisbilder och säkerställer att vi skapar värde genom både teknik och kommersiella upplägg. Internt får du en central roll inom B2B och arbetar tätt tillsammans med bland annat IT, legal och säljkanaler för att driva lösningar hela vägen från behov till leverans. Du följer utvecklingen på marknaden, analyserar konkurrenslandskapet och driver omvärldsbevakning för att säkerställa att vi ligger steget före.
  
  

Du kan se fram emot att
  
  

ha en central roll i komplexa kunddialoger där teknik, affär och strategi möts
  
påverka utvecklingen av nya produkter genom omvärldsbevakning och marknadsanalys för våra företagskunder
  
vara en del av en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser (Great Place to Work 2026)
  
Några av våra medarbetare
  
Julia Maxén
  
Gruppchef
  
"Jag vill att mitt team ska få de bästa förutsättningarna för att göra sitt jobb på bästa sätt. Det är så vi utvecklar oss som team, men även utvecklar Tre framåt."
  
Henrik Sundvall
  
Digital projektledare
  
"Det absolut bästa med att vara projektledare på Tre är jag får jobba brett med kollegor från alla delar av organisationen och få lära mig nya saker varje dag. Jag har friheten att vara mig själv – och bli uppskattad för det!"
  
Jayasri Battola
  
Utvecklare
  
"The great work culture and the technology made me choose Tre. Working alongside great people in mixed team setups, with both experienced and new talents, along with the latest and greatest tools and technologies like Cloud and Azure."
  
  

Mer om dig
  
  

Vi tror att du har en teknisk bakgrund, och en gedigen erfarenhet i en motsvarande roll där telekom, plattformslösningar eller kommunikationstjänster står i centrum. Du är trygg i kunddialoger och trivs i en roll där du bygger relationer, skapar förståelse och omsätter komplex teknik till tydliga affärsmöjligheter. En stor del av din tid jobbar du nära säljorganisationen för att få ihop komplexa lösningar. Du förstår vikten av att hålla dig uppdaterad kring teknik, marknad och konkurrenter för att säkerställa att vi ligger steget före.
  
  

Som person är du lösningsorienterad och tar naturligt initiativ för att driva ditt arbete framåt samtidigt som du trivs med att samarbeta nära andra för att nå gemensamma resultat. Du har god kännedom om Microsofts plattformslösningar och arbetar vant med moderna kommunikationslösningar. Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på både svenska och engelska. Har du dessutom kunskap inom cybersäkerhet ser vi det som en värdefull tillgång i rollen.
  
  

Välkommen med din ansökan!
  
  

Vi tar emot ansökningar via denna annons och kommer hålla intervjuer löpande. Personligt brev behövs inte, men vi vill gärna att du bifogar CV och svarar på de frågor vi ställt nedan i samband med att du söker. Vi använder tester för att säkra objektiva bedömningar i samband med urval. Tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Bakgrundskontroll görs på slutkandidat.
  
  

För mer information om tjänsten kontakta rekryterande chef Per Malm (per.malm@tre.se)
  
  

Vi har riktigt bra förmåner
  
  

Friskvårdsbidrag, föräldrarlön, pension & försäkringar enligt kollektivavtal
  
  

Flexibla helgdagar och fem dagar extra ledigt per år
  
  

Hundzon & gym i 3huset
  
  

Subventionerad lunch
  
  

Förmånliga rabatter på cyklar, kollektivtrafik och elbilar
  
  

Generösa bonusmodeller eller provisioner
  
  

Vi drivs av att hela tiden försöka göra saker bättre, på nya och annorlunda sätt. Vi ser oss själva som en avgörande del av Sveriges samhällsstruktur, eftersom vi vet att pålitlig uppkoppling är en viktig grundsten i dagens digitala värld.
  
  

Tre föddes som utmanare och är en organisation i ständig rörelse. Vi strävar efter att vara i framkant i allt vi gör. Vi är övertygade om att det är människorna och kulturen på Tre som är avgörande för vår utveckling.
  
  

När du startar din resa på Tre finns det oändliga möjligheter att växa och utvecklas med oss.
  
  

WE THINK LIKE CHALLENGERS - I en föränderlig värld, är vi på Tre nyfikna och ständigt öppna för nya lösningar. På Tre anpassar vi vägen framåt allt eftersom vi provar och lär oss vad som funkar bäst.
  
  

WE WORK LIKE CHAMPIONS - På Tre gör vi alltid vårt bästa. Vi känner ägandeskap för vår uppgift, sätter tydliga mål och håller fokus på det som gör mest nytta för affären.
  
  

WE ACT LIKE BUDDIES - På Tre är vi schyssta kollegor. Vi samarbetar med varandra över team och funktioner, vi bollar idéer, ger och tar emot feedback.
  
  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video
  
  

2003
  
Tre först i Sverige med videosamtal och strömning av mobil video. Att se personen som du ringer upp i ögonen är en helt ny upplevelse vid den här tidpunkten.
  
  

2006
  
Tre lanserar mobilt bredband som tredje operatör i världen. Under de kommande fem åren vinner Tre pris för Sveriges snabbaste mobila bredband.
  
  

2013
  
Tre’s systerbolag Hallon startas med en vision att vara den enkla mobiloperatören utan onödigt krångel.
  
  

2019
  
Ett händelserikt år! 3Världen lanseras som innebär att kunder kan surfa i 80 länder till samma pris som inom Sverige. Därefter lanseras 3Samla som gör att alla kunder kan lägga till fler användare till sitt abonnemang och sist men inte minst är Tre först i Sverige med ett lansera ett publikt 5G-nät.
  
  

2025
  
Tele2 Arena byter från 1 januari namn till 3Arena. Med vår starka passion för innovation, uppkoppling och upplevelser ska vi medverka till arenans och områdets utveckling.
  
  

Per Malm | Kontaktperson

title: Modern Workplace Specialist sökes till Nordlo i Göteborg
description:
Hos oss på Nordlo Improve arbetar du i långsiktiga outsourcingåtaganden där säkerhet, stabilitet och struktur är avgörande. Det här är en roll för dig som vill ta tekniskt ansvar – inte bara att förvalta det som redan finns. I den här rollen äger du klientplattformen i komplexa outsourcingmiljöer.


Vi söker dig som byggt, migrerat och standardiserat moderna klientplattformar i skarpa produktionsmiljöer.

### **Om tjänsten**


Du har ett helhetsansvar för klientplattformen i en eller flera affärskritiska kundmiljöer med höga krav på säkerhet och användarupplevelse.


Det innebär att du:

* Äger och vidareutvecklar Intune- och MEMCM-strategi
* Driver modernisering från on-prem/co-management till cloud-managed
* Designar och implementerar Autopilot- och Zero Touch-flöden
* Sätter säkerhetsstandarder (Conditional Access, compliance, härdning)
* Arbetar med hela klientlivscykeln – från utrullning till avveckling
* Automatiserar och standardiserar med PowerShell
* Agerar tekniskt rådgivande i kunddialog

### **Om dig**


Vi ser att du har

* minst 5 års erfarenhet av klient- och endpoint management
* djup kompetens inom Intune och MEMCM/SCCM
* arbetat med säker klienthantering och Zero Trust-principer
* erfarenhet av hybrididentitet (AD och Microsoft Entra ID)


Du är tekniskt trygg, strukturerad och bekväm i att ta beslut. Du kan förklara arkitekturval för både tekniker och kundledning och är van att arbeta självständigt i komplexa miljöer.

**Meriterande kompetenser**


Vi arbetar i varierande kundmiljöer och värdesätter därför bredd, har du erfarenhet av något av följande:

* Virtuella arbetsplatser, exempelvis Azure Virtual Desktop
* Fördjupad säkerhetskompetens inom endpoint och identitet
* Större transformationsprojekt (Windows, tenant-migreringar)
* Erfarenhet från outsourcing- eller multi-kundmiljö

### 

### **Din framtida arbetsgivare**


Nordlo är en ledande aktör inom moln och infrastruktur. Vi erbjuder skalbara driftlösningar och full outsourcing av IT- och digitaliseringstjänster till företag och offentliga verksamheter. Genom nära samarbete och med ansvarsfulla val av innovativ teknik hjälper vi våra kunder växa säkert och hållbart i en samtid som förändras varje dag.


Nordlo omsätter 2,5 miljarder SEK, har ca 1000 anställda på orter över hela Sverige och stora delar av Norge.


Vill du veta mer? På vår hemsida kan du läsa om vår verksamhet, kundcase och våra medarbetare.


Anställningsform: tillsvidare med provanställning | Anställningens omfattning: heltid | Antal lediga befattningar: 1 | Sysselsättningsgrad: 100% | Ort: Göteborg | Län: Västra Götalands län | Land: Sweden | Referensnummer: 2026/63 | Publicerat: 2026-05-06 | Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-06-06

title: DHL Freight söker: Marketing & Communication Specialist
description:
På DHL arbetar vi med att få våra kunders vardag att fungera. Som ett av världens ledande företag inom logistik ser vi till att varor och material når fram dit de ska – varje dag. Utan transporter stannar samhället. Vårt uppdrag är **Connecting people, improving lives**.  

Som medarbetare hos oss är du en viktig del av detta.

  

**Arbetsuppgifter och ansvar**

  

Som **Marketing and Communications** **Specialist** är du ett operativt stöd till teamet i det dagliga marknads- och kommunikationsarbetet. Rollen är bred, praktisk och utvecklande, och passar dig som vill bygga erfarenhet inom marknadsföring, kommunikation och varumärke i ett internationellt bolag.


Du hjälper till med produktion, anpassning och publicering av innehåll till interna och externa kanaler såsom intranät, webb, nyhetsbrev och presentationer. Du stöttar vid genomförande av kampanjer, event och andra marknadsaktiviteter samt bidrar i arbetet med sponsringsinsatser.


I rollen ingår även administrativa uppgifter, koordinering, enklare analyser och sammanställningar, samt stöd vid arbete med visuellt material och text. Du samarbetar nära kollegor inom marknad, kommunikation, produkt och försäljning.

  

**Profil & Bakgrund**


**Krav**


* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom marknadsföring, kommunikation, media eller motsvarande t ex Berghs, Beckmans, IHM eller Hyper Island
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift
* Adobe Creative Cloud samt grundläggande kunskaper i Microsoft Office, främst PowerPoint
* Mycket god förmåga att skriva tydliga, målgruppsanpassade texter
* Intresse för marknadsföring, kommunikation och digitala kanaler

  

**Meriterande**

  

* Praktik, trainee‑roll, studentjobb eller arbetslivserfarenhet inom marknad/kommunikation
* Öga för färg, form och visuellt uttryck
* Erfarenhet av grafiskt arbete eller innehållsproduktion
* Intresse för logistik, e‑handel eller B2B‑marknad

  

**Nedan kännetecknar dig som person:**

  

* Serviceinriktad och prestigelös
* Noggrann och strukturerad
* Kreativ med känsla för både text och visuellt uttryck
* Tycker om att skriva och arbeta med innehåll
* Nyfiken och vill utvecklas
* Flexibel och trivs med varierande arbetsuppgifter
* Samarbetsvillig och kommunikativ
* Pålitlig och ansvarstagande

Du uppskattar att vara den som får saker att hända bakom kulisserna och trivs i en roll där du stöttar flera kollegor samtidigt.

  

Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning med 100 % tjänstgöringsgrad. Vi tillämpar provanställning.  

Tjänsten är placerad i Solna.

  

**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**


Hos DHL möts du av ett engagerat team, stark sammanhållning och en lärande kultur. Vi är ett globalt bolag med familjär stämning där vi tar hand om varandra och där din utveckling tas på allvar – särskilt i början av din karriär.


Vi är certifierade som **Top Employer** och **Great Place to Work** och erbjuder en arbetsmiljö där du kan växa både professionellt och personligt. Hållbarhet och ansvar är centrala delar av vår verksamhet, vilket bland annat uppmärksammats genom att vi utsetts till branschvinnare i **Sustainable Brand Index B2B** för tredje året i rad.

  

**Vill du också vara med?**

  


  

Välkommen med din ansökan senast **20 maj 2026**. Urval och intervjuer sker löpande.

  

*Enligt EU-direktiv (2009/52/EG) måste vi som arbetsgivare kunna påvisa våra medarbetares rättighet att arbeta inom EU. Vid en anställning på DHL måste du därför kunna uppvisa din rätt att arbeta inom EU genom medborgarskap (exempelvis pass) eller i annat fall uppvisa ditt arbetstillstånd. Vi genomför bakgrundskontroller på alla våra slutkandidater.*

title: Openstack Technician
description:
Vi på Iver brinner för innovationer och god laganda, vi är särskilt intresserad av dig som gillar att tänka nytt och dela med dig av dina tankar. Vi söker nu en Openstack tekniker som vill bidra till bättre IT-lösningar för våra kunder. Är du vår nya kollega?
  
We empower our Nordic society Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation. Våra tjänster är kritiska inte bara för våra kunder utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort. Med huvudkontor i Stockholm verkar Iver främst i Norden med en agenda att fortsätta expandera. Iver omsätter drygt 3 miljarder SEK och har cirka 1 300 anställda som arbetar på ett av våra 23 kontor i Norden.
  
Din roll på Iver I den här rollen blir du en del av vårt team inom Cloud Operations som distribuerar och underhåller våra molnplattformar bland annat inom Openstack. Tillsammans med teamet kommer du att arbeta med design, implementering och operations av våra cloud baserade plattformar. Detta inkluderar underhåll, larmhantering, monitorering, felsökning, tickethantering 2nd - 3rd line, samt automatisering och förbättringsarbete. Rollen kräver djupa kunskaper i Linux och Ansible. Rollen omfattas även av beredskap.
  
**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter:** • Designa och implementera lösningar i molnmiljöer • Leda och genomföra tekniska projekt och migreringar • Ge mentorskap och kompetensdelning i teamet • Felsökning och optimering av driftmiljöer
  
**Det som gör denna roll unik:** I den här rollen får du möjlighet att jobba med ny och spännande teknik, med ett starkt fokus på att skapa automatiserade digitala infrastrukturtjänster för våra kunder som vill innovera utan att kompromissa med dataskydd och integritet. Vad erbjuder vi dig? På Iver får du möjlighet att arbeta med den senaste tekniken och vara med på en spännande tillväxtresa. Vi är inkluderande och strävar efter ett genuint samarbete mot gemensamma mål. Inom Iver finns stora möjligheter till utveckling och vi finns här för att inspirera dig till att nå dina yrkesmässiga mål. Vi står bakom dig när du vill lära dig mer inom ditt specialområde, ledarskap eller nya områden. Hos Iver är du också en del av ett ambitiöst och innovativt företag, vilket innebär att förbättra, testa, utvärdera och våga ändra hur vi gör saker är viktiga ingredienser för att vi ska utvecklas. Vi på Iver ger samma löfte till våra kollegor som till våra kunder. Löftet är att alltid vara ”beside you”, ”behind you” och ”before you”. Vi kallar det för "The Iver way".
  
**Förmåner hos oss:** Kollektivavtal & trygga villkor Hybridarbete Friskvårdsbidrag Terminalglasögon ⏳ Tidsbank – 24 h extra ledighet/år Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring Tjänstepension (ITP) & flexpension
  
Vem söker vi? Vi söker dig med flera års erfarenhet av liknande roller med goda kunskaper inom Linux & Ansible. Du har ett brinnande intresse för teknik och du vill ständigt utvecklas. Vi tror också att du har ett starkt intresse för Cloud plattformar och vill fortsätta utvecklas inom det området. Du trivs i att arbeta tillsammans med ett team samtidigt som du har ett självständigt driv i att driva ditt arbete i mål och vill alltid hitta nya sätt att testa och förbättra hur vi gör saker.
  
  

**Vidare tror vi att du har erfarenhet av:**  

**Linuxkompetens:** Stark felsökningsförmåga i Linuxmiljöer.
  
  

**Automation:** Erfarenhet av Ansible, Terraform
  
  

**Skriptning/Programmering:** Goda kunskaper i Python, Bash eller Go.
  
  

**Container teknik:** Erfarenhet av Docker och Gardner.
  
  

**Infrastruktur:** Goda kunskaper inom compute, storage, monitorering, nätverk mm.
  
  

**Meriterande:** Tidigare erfarenhet av att arbeta för en cloud provider är meriterande. Placeringsort: Iver finns på 23 orter i Norden. För denna roll kan du utgå från närmaste Iver kontor för dig, men med fördel från ett av våra kontor i Karlskrona, Stockholm, Malmö, Landskrona eller Västerås.
  
**Övrig information:** Vi har kunder inom alla branscher och sektorer inklusive säkerhetsklassad verksamhet, därför genomför vi bakgrundskontroller i samtliga av våra rekryteringsprocesser. Sök till oss! Urval sker löpande, tjänsten kan tillsättas före sista ansökningsdag. Iver eftersträvar en jämn könsfördelning och värdesätter etnisk och kulturell mångfald. Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-06-07. Välkommen att kontakta Chef Thomas Ahlgren Warin (thomas.ahlgrenwarin@iver.se) eller rekryterare Jennie Vilhelmsson (jennie.vilhelmsson@iver.se) vid frågor eller funderingar kring tjänsten. Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Senior Enterprise Account Executive - Retail
description:
**Company Description**  

It all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.

 **Job Description**  

You will produce new business sales revenue from a SaaS license model. You will accomplish this through account planning, territory planning, researching prospect customers, using business development strategies and completing field-based sales activities within a defined set of prospects, territory or vertical.

**What you get to do in this role:**

* Develop relationships with multiple C-suite personas (e.g., CFO, CIO, COO, CDO) across all product sales
* Oversee client relationship mapping to the account team, orchestrating an account strategy while leading across a broad virtual team (Solutions Consultants, Solutions Specialist, Success resources, Partners and Marketing, etc.)
* Be a trusted advisor to your customers by understanding their business and advising on how ServiceNow can help help their IT roadmap
* Identify the right specialist/ support resources to bring into a deal, at the right time

  

**Qualifications** **To be successful in this role you have:**

* 10+ years of sales experience within software OR solutions sales organization
* Experience establishing trusted relationships with current and prospective clients and other teams
* Experience producing new business, negotiate deals, and maintain healthy C-Level relationships
* Experience achieving sales targets
* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision-making, or problem-solving. This may include using AI-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* The ability to understand the "bigger picture" and our plans around IT
* Experience promoting a customer success focus in a "win as a team" environment
* Willingness to travel up to 50%

  

**Additional Information** **Work Personas**


We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third-party service.

**Equal Opportunity Employer**


ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.

**Accommodations**


We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.

**Export Control Regulations**


For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.


From Fortune. ©2025 Fortune Media IP Limited. All rights reserved. Used under license.
company_description: At ServiceNow, our technology makes the world work for everyone, and our people make it possible.

title: Business Manager till Consumer Market
description:
Som Business Manager på Tre Consumer Market har du en nyckelroll i att balansera affär och lönsamhet. Du arbetar med ett tydligt kommersiellt fokus och ansvarar för att utveckla attraktiva erbjudanden som skapar värde både för våra kunder och för Tre som bolag. Kanske är det här nästa roll för dig?
  
  

Om rollen
  
I rollen som Business Manager så står affärs- och produktutveckling i centrum, och denna roll fokuserar lite extra på cirkulära erbjudande, hårdvarunära tjänster och partnerskap. Du blir en viktig länk mellan affär och hållbarhet där du utvecklar lösningar som stärker både kundvärde, affärsnytta och miljö.
  
  

Rollen innebär att utveckla produkter och tjänster samt driva projekt genom hela processen, från idé och planering till lansering, uppföljning och resultatansvar i linje med Tres kommersiella mål. För att lyckas arbetar du nära och tvärfunktionellt tillsammans med bland annat ledning, IT, Nät, Finans, Legal, Marknad och våra säljkanaler.
  
  

Som en central spelare i flera av våra mest affärskritiska initiativ, skapar du helhet, möjliggör framdrift i projekten och säkerställer goda resultat. Vi står inför nästa steg i utvecklingen av våra affärsmodeller med ökad påverkan och kortare time-to-market. Här får du möjlighet att göra verklig skillnad, på riktigt!
  
  

**Du kan se fram emot att:**  

Ha en bred roll med ett viktigt affärs-och produktansvar för vår Circular Business så som försäkring, Trade-in, refurbished och reperationer hos en av Sveriges ledande telekomaktörer
  
Leda och driva affärskritiska projekt, både självständigt och genom andra, i ett stort nätverk inom Tre med tydligt resultatansvar
  
Hos oss i Commercial teamet driver vi den kommersiella agendan tillsammans. Vi samarbetar tätt, stöttar varandra och arbetar över gränserna för att skapa bästa möjliga resultat, alltid med Tres helhet i fokus
  
Ha örat mot rälsen och arbeta kreativt, affärsnära, projektledande i en organisation där din output kommer märkas
  
Ha en plats på en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser (jajamen, flera år i rad har vi blivit utnämnda till Great place to work)
  
Några av våra medarbetare
  
Julia Maxén
  
Gruppchef
  
"Jag vill att mitt team ska få de bästa förutsättningarna för att göra sitt jobb på bästa sätt. Det är så vi utvecklar oss som team, men även utvecklar Tre framåt."
  
Henrik Sundvall
  
Digital projektledare
  
"Det absolut bästa med att vara projektledare på Tre är jag får jobba brett med kollegor från alla delar av organisationen och få lära mig nya saker varje dag. Jag har friheten att vara mig själv – och bli uppskattad för det!"
  
Jayasri Battola
  
Utvecklare
  
"The great work culture and the technology made me choose Tre. Working alongside great people in mixed team setups, with both experienced and new talents, along with the latest and greatest tools and technologies like Cloud and Azure."
  
  

Vem är du?
  
Vi ser gärna att du har några års erfarenhet från en liknande roll, exempelvis som Business Manager eller i en annan kommersiell roll där du har lett tvärfunktionella team, drivit produktlanseringar och/eller utvecklat produktportföljer med tydligt affärsansvar. Alternativt har du arbetat som managementkonsult i några år och därigenom drivit större projekt i komplexa organisationer. Du har en relevant högskoleutbildning och behärskar svenska och engelska obehindrat. Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet från telekom eller annan abonnemangsbaserad B2C-verksamhet.
  
  

Vi tror att du har en stark förmåga att kombinera strategiskt tänk med kundfokus och affärsförståelse, och har en prestigelös “kavla upp ärmarna”-attityd. Med många kontaktytor i organisationen är du en skicklig kommunikatör som skapar samsyn, driver arbetet framåt och får saker att hända. Du har en förmåga att se hur allt hör till helheten samtidigt som du är en skicklig förhandlare, nyfiken lyssnare och som oftare än andra säger ”hur då?” när du ställs inför nya problem och utmaningar. Med ett lugnt och strukturerat arbetssätt navigerar du även när förutsättningarna förändras.
  
  

Välkommen med din ansökan!
  
Vi tar emot ansökningar via denna annons och håller intervjuer löpande. Personligt brev behövs inte, men vi vill gärna att du bifogar CV och svarar på de frågor vi ställt nedan i samband med att du söker. Vi använder tester för att säkra objektiva bedömningar i samband med urval. Tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Bakgrundskontroll görs på slutkandidat innan beslut om anställning fattas.
  
  

För mer information om tjänsten kontakta rekryterande chef Fredrik Sivander på: Fredrik.Sivander@tre.se
  
  

Vi har riktigt bra förmåner
  
  

Friskvårdsbidrag, föräldrarlön, pension & försäkringar enligt kollektivavtal
  
  

Flexibla helgdagar och fem dagar extra ledigt per år
  
  

Hundzon & gym i 3huset
  
  

Subventionerad lunch
  
  

Förmånliga rabatter på cyklar, kollektivtrafik och elbilar
  
  

Generösa bonusmodeller eller provisioner
  
  

Vi drivs av att hela tiden försöka göra saker bättre, på nya och annorlunda sätt. Vi ser oss själva som en avgörande del av Sveriges samhällsstruktur, eftersom vi vet att pålitlig uppkoppling är en viktig grundsten i dagens digitala värld.
  
  

Tre föddes som utmanare och är en organisation i ständig rörelse. Vi strävar efter att vara i framkant i allt vi gör. Vi är övertygade om att det är människorna och kulturen på Tre som är avgörande för vår utveckling.
  
  

När du startar din resa på Tre finns det oändliga möjligheter att växa och utvecklas med oss.
  
  

WE THINK LIKE CHALLENGERS - I en föränderlig värld, är vi på Tre nyfikna och ständigt öppna för nya lösningar. På Tre anpassar vi vägen framåt allt eftersom vi provar och lär oss vad som funkar bäst.
  
  

WE WORK LIKE CHAMPIONS - På Tre gör vi alltid vårt bästa. Vi känner ägandeskap för vår uppgift, sätter tydliga mål och håller fokus på det som gör mest nytta för affären.
  
  

WE ACT LIKE BUDDIES - På Tre är vi schyssta kollegor. Vi samarbetar med varandra över team och funktioner, vi bollar idéer, ger och tar emot feedback.
  
  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video

Tre först i Sverige med videosamtal och strömning av mobil video. Att se personen som du ringer upp i ögonen är en helt ny upplevelse vid den här tidpunkten.

Tre lanserar mobilt bredband som tredje operatör i världen. Under de kommande fem åren vinner Tre pris för Sveriges snabbaste mobila bredband.

Därefter lanseras 3Samla som gör att alla kunder kan lägga till fler användare till sitt abonnemang och sist men inte minst är Tre först i Sverige med ett lansera ett publikt 5G-nät.
  
  

2025

title: Database Administrator - Remote
description:
**Job Title:** Database Administrator


**Job Type:** Contractor


**Location:** Remote


**Job Summary:** As a Database Administrator, you will apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. No prior experience in AI is required , your domain knowledge is what matters.


**Key Responsibilities:**


* Analyze and optimize database performance for large-scale MySQL and PostgreSQL environments.


* Partner with the development team to design, implement, and maintain robust database structures.


* Develop, test, and manage data backup and recovery procedures to safeguard business-critical information.


* Monitor database environments to proactively identify and resolve performance bottlenecks.


* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align database solutions with evolving business needs.


* Document database configurations, processes, and best practices to ensure operational transparency and continuity.


* Stay current with emerging SQL and database technologies to drive continuous improvement.


**Required Skills and Qualifications:**


* Advanced hands-on expertise with MySQL and PostgreSQL administration.


* Proven track record in database optimization and troubleshooting.


* Strong command of SQL for querying, scripting, and performance tuning.


* Experience with backup, restore, and disaster recovery processes.


* Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to clearly document and explain complex technical information.


* Collaborative mindset and a proactive problem-solving approach.


* Ability to work effectively in a remote, distributed team environment.


**Preferred Qualifications:**


* Experience implementing and managing database security best practices.


* Familiarity with cloud-based database solutions and automation tools.


* Previous collaboration with cross-functional or global teams.

title: Technology Engineer (SAP Analytics – BW4HANA / SAC)
description:
**About Justera Group**  

Justera Group AB is a leading Swedish IT consulting firm with great experience specializing in building high-performing technology teams and delivering end-to-end IT solutions. Led by dynamic female executives, Justera Group focuses on helping businesses harness the power of digital technologies to continuously evolve in today’s rapidly changing economy. The company has deep expertise in IT consultancy, software development, and recruitment services, providing clients with purpose-driven, well-trained consultants who consistently deliver efficient and effective results. Justera Group manages the entire talent lifecycle, from hiring to ongoing management, ensuring the right fit for each project on time and within budget. With their strong commitment to quality, collaboration, and client success, Justera Group is a trusted partner for technology innovation across Sweden.  

  

**About the Role:**


We are seeking a Technology Engineer with strong expertise in SAP Analytics solutions to support a strategic Group Digital initiative within a BI/BW environment. The assignment focuses on designing and delivering analytical dashboards using SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), contributing to data-driven decision-making across business domains such as Record-to-Report (R2R) and Source-to-Pay (S2P).

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Design, develop, and implement analytical solutions using SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
* Build and enhance data models, reporting layers, and dashboards aligned with business requirements
* Work with CDS views and ODP extraction to integrate and optimize data flows
* Support implementation activities across SAP analytics landscape
* Collaborate with stakeholders to translate business needs into scalable analytics solutions
* Ensure best practices in data modelling, performance optimization, and solution architecture

**Requirements:**

* Strong hands-on experience in SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
* Proven SAP implementation experience, preferably in analytics or data warehousing projects
* Experience with CDS views and ODP extraction frameworks
* Solid understanding of SAP analytics architecture and hybrid modelling approaches
* Exposure to business processes such as R2R (Record-to-Report) and S2P (Source-to-Pay) is highly desirable
* Ability to work independently and take ownership of deliverables

**What We Offer:**

* A dynamic and innovative workplace driving advancements in cutting-edge robotic technologies
* The opportunity to collaborate with talented cross-functional teams on meaningful and impactful projects
* Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
* A supportive culture that fosters continuous learning, growth, and professional development
* Flexible hybrid working model for an optimal work-life balance
* 25 days of annual leave to recharge and relax
* An annual wellness allowance of 3,500 SEK to support your health and wellbeing

title: Cloud AI API Integrations – Subject Matter Expert - Sweden
description:
**Cloud AI API Integrations – Fully Remote Subject Matter Expert**
------------------------------------------------------------------


#### ***About Prolific***



Prolific is not just another player in the AI space – we are building the biggest pool of quality human data in the world.



Over 35,000 AI developers, researchers, and organizations use Prolific to gather data from paid study participants with a wide variety of experiences, knowledge, and skills.


#### ***The Opportunity***



We are inviting software developers, system administrators, and other technical professionals who work with AI models via cloud platforms to participate in an upcoming research project. We want to learn about your real-world experience integrating AI APIs into applications and workflows.



This project is open to a broad range of practitioners, including:


* Developers and system administrators integrating Claude (Anthropic), OpenAI (GPT models) and Google Gemini via Amazon Bedrock, Google Cloud Vertex AI, or Microsoft Azure AI
* Developers and system administrators working with other leading AI APIs via cloud platforms or direct API access


**Please note:** This is a "bench" model. By verifying your credentials, you gain eligibility for high-level research tasks as they become available. Access is based on project demand and professional profile matching.


#### ***What You'll Bring***


* Active experience as a software developer or system administrator working with AI APIs in a professional context
* Hands-on integration of AI models via cloud platforms (e.g. Amazon Bedrock, Google Cloud Vertex AI, Microsoft Azure AI) or direct API access
* Practical knowledge of embedding AI capabilities (such as Claude, GPT, or Gemini models) into applications or automated workflows
* Comfort discussing technical implementation details, challenges, and decisions in your day-to-day work

#### ***What You'll Be Doing***


* Complete a paid screener to help us assess your background and suitability for specific research tasks
* Participate in AI-moderated interviews via Listen Labs (primary research method)
* Complete qualitative surveys via Qualtrics
* In some cases, take part in live interviews with the research team

#### ***Nice To Have***


* Familiarity with multiple AI providers or models in the same workflow or organisation
* Experience with RAG pipelines, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, or AI agent frameworks
* Involvement in evaluating or selecting AI platforms for enterprise use

#### ***Why Prolific is a great platform to join as a Participant***



Joining our platform as a Prolific participant will give you the chance to influence the AI models of the future using your professional expertise. Once you pass our assessment, you can join Prolific in just 15 minutes, and start enjoying competitive pay rates, flexible hours, and the ability to work from home.



We've built a unique platform that connects researchers and companies with a global pool of participants, enabling the collection of high-quality, ethically sourced human behavioural data and feedback. This data is the cornerstone of developing more accurate, nuanced, and aligned AI systems.



We believe that the next leap in AI capabilities won't come solely from scaling existing models, but from integrating diverse human perspectives and behaviours into AI development. By providing this crucial human data infrastructure, Prolific is positioning itself at the forefront of the next wave of AI innovation – one that reflects the breadth and the best of humanity.

title: Cloud AI API Integrations – Subject Matter Expert - Sweden
description:
**Cloud AI API Integrations – Fully Remote Subject Matter Expert**
------------------------------------------------------------------


#### ***About Prolific***



Prolific is not just another player in the AI space – we are building the biggest pool of quality human data in the world.



Over 35,000 AI developers, researchers, and organizations use Prolific to gather data from paid study participants with a wide variety of experiences, knowledge, and skills.


#### ***The Opportunity***



We are inviting software developers, system administrators, and other technical professionals who work with AI models via cloud platforms to participate in an upcoming research project. We want to learn about your real-world experience integrating AI APIs into applications and workflows.



This project is open to a broad range of practitioners, including:


* Developers and system administrators integrating Claude (Anthropic), OpenAI (GPT models) and Google Gemini via Amazon Bedrock, Google Cloud Vertex AI, or Microsoft Azure AI
* Developers and system administrators working with other leading AI APIs via cloud platforms or direct API access


**Please note:** This is a "bench" model. By verifying your credentials, you gain eligibility for high-level research tasks as they become available. Access is based on project demand and professional profile matching.

* Active experience as a software developer or system administrator working with AI APIs in a professional context
* Hands-on integration of AI models via cloud platforms (e.g. Amazon Bedrock, Google Cloud Vertex AI, Microsoft Azure AI) or direct API access
* Practical knowledge of embedding AI capabilities (such as Claude, GPT, or Gemini models) into applications or automated workflows
* Comfort discussing technical implementation details, challenges, and decisions in your day-to-day work

* Complete a paid screener to help us assess your background and suitability for specific research tasks
