title: Senior Infrastructure Project Manager
description:
**Job Title:** 
 Senior Infrastructure Project Manager
 



**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden (Hybrid)
 



**Job Type:** 
 Contract
 



**Role Summary** 




 Lead a large-scale global network hardware Life Cycle Management (LCM) activity. You will have end-to-end responsibility for replacing routers, switches, and surrounding solutions across a significant part of a global IT landscape, ensuring minimal disruption and alignment with technical requirements.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Planning & Definition:** 
 Define scope, objectives, delivery plans, and milestones for global hardware replacement and regional rollout plans.
* **Stakeholder & Change Management:** 
 Manage global/local stakeholders and coordinate cross-functional teams and external vendors.
* **Execution:** 
 Drive the replacement of network hardware ensuring delivery meets quality standards and technical requirements.
* **Budget & Resource Management:** 
 Plan and secure internal/external resources and optimize utilization with technical leads and suppliers.
* **Value Monitoring & Reporting:** 
 Track KPIs, risks, and progress; report status to steering groups and deliver post-project documentation.
* **Leadership & Collaboration:** 
 Lead multicultural project teams with clarity and communicate complex technical topics effectively.



**Required Skills & Qualifications** 



* **Senior Infrastructure Leadership:** 
 Confident project leader capable of simplifying complexity and creating structure.
* **Network Expertise:** 
 Deep experience in network-related initiatives (routers, switches, and infrastructure solutions).
* **Global Project Management:** 
 Proven track record leading large-scale, international hardware replacement programs.
* **Strategic Execution:** 
 Ability to manage risks, dependencies, and escalations in complex environments.
* **Communication:** 
 Strong ability to align technical teams, business stakeholders, and external vendors.

title: Head of Public Cloud
description:
Betsson Group is now looking for a Head of Public Cloud Infrastructure to lead and evolve the backbone of our global platform in the public cloud space.
   




**The Wow** 









 This leadership role is responsible for a broad and business-critical infrastructure domain spanning across public cloud platforms, system operations, cloud security and observability. To be successful in this role you will have a relentless continuous improvement mindset that scales teams, platforms, and business outcomes. You will lead multiple engineering leaders to shape the vision, operating model, and technical roadmap for cloud infrastructure at scale. This role partners closely with product teams, security, compliance, and business stakeholders worldwide to ensure our cloud infrastructure is resilient, scalable, secure, and cost-effective.
 






**A taster of what you will be involved with** 





 Leadership
 






* Inspire and encourage team engagement and delivery through your vision and actions.
* Drive modernization initiatives, including cloud adoption, IAC, automation, and platform standardization.
* Implement and evolve the target architecture across public cloud environments.
* Own the end-to-end infrastructure engineering capability in the public cloud platforms, aligned with business goals, regulatory and architectural requirements.











 People & Organization
 


* Lead and mentor senior engineering managers and technical leaders across a large, distributed organization.
* Build high-performing teams with clear ownership, strong engineering culture, and operational excellence.
* Set goals, performance expectations, and career development paths for leaders and teams.



 Operational Excellence
 


* Ensure high availability, performance, reliability, and scalability of all infrastructure services.
* Oversee cloud engineering with a strong focus on uptime and incident management.
* Establish best-in-class practices for observability, monitoring, alerting, and incident response.
* Own capacity planning, disaster recovery, and business continuity strategies.







 Cloud & Infrastructure Capabilities
 


* Lead cloud strategy and execution across public cloud platforms.
* Drive infrastructure-as-code, AI adoption, automation, and self-service capabilities for engineering teams.
* Balance innovation, security, and cost efficiency (FinOps mindset).



 Stakeholder Collaboration
 


* Partner with engineering, product, security, compliance, architecture and commercial leaders across global markets.
* Act as a trusted advisor on infrastructure topics for senior leadership.
* Support regulatory, security, and audit requirements relevant to iGaming operations.














**What we are looking for** 








* Extensive experience leading large-scale infrastructure or platform engineering organizations in complex, always-on environments.
* Proven track record leading leaders and technical teams.
* Strong understanding of high-availability systems, low-latency platforms, and global distributed architectures.
* Experience operating in regulated industries (iGaming, fintech, payments, or similar is a strong plus).
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills in a global, multi-cultural environment.
* A pragmatic, business-oriented mindset with the ability to balance risk, speed, and stability.
* Deep expertise across
* Cloud platforms (AWS primarily)
* System and database operations
* Network technologies
* Observability and reliability engineering










**What we offer** 

 Much like riding a rollercoaster, sometimes life at Betsson can be lightning fast with twists and turns but always FUN! Then again, what else would you expect from a business 75% millennial and 1700 strong, spread across 7 offices with 900 based out of our Malta HQ alone! We recognise it may not be for the faint-hearted, but if you’re a go-getter, initiator and adrenaline junkie, always striving to push the boundaries and challenge yourself, then you’ll fit right in.
 



  
 


 Challenge accepted?
 
***By submitting your application, you understand that your personal data will be processed as set out in our Privacy Policy***

title: Sr. Account Executive - Agentforce - SWE
description:
**Description**
**Overview of the Role:**
 As an Agentforce Specialist Account Executive at Salesforce, you will play a pivotal role in driving revenue growth by positioning and selling Agentforce — Salesforce's flagship AI platform — to enterprise and commercial customers. You will combine deep AI knowledge with strong enterprise sales skills to conduct technical discovery, craft compelling points of view, and demonstrate how Agentforce delivers measurable business outcomes. Working closely with the broader Salesforce sales team, you will show up as One Salesforce throughout the entire client engagement.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Identify, qualify, and develop Agentforce opportunities across new and existing customers, conducting comprehensive technical discovery to map client business challenges to Agentforce capabilities
* Collaborate closely with the Salesforce sales team to drive Agentforce growth, crafting and presenting compelling Points of View (POVs) that articulate clear business value to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
* Articulate how the full Salesforce product stack — including Agentforce, Data Cloud, and core clouds — delivers tailored, scalable solutions that fit within customers' existing architectures and long-term strategic objectives
* Lead cross-functional coordination across internal teams to ensure a seamless client experience throughout the full sales cycle


**Required Qualifications**
* 10+ years of experience in enterprise and commercial B2B sales within a highly technical sales environment, with a proven track record of consistently surpassing sales targets
* Deep understanding of AI and machine learning concepts, including agent configuration, automation, API connectivity, and how AI capabilities translate into business outcomes for non-technical buyers
* Hands-on experience with the Salesforce platform (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Marketing Cloud, Data Cloud) and familiarity with cloud infrastructure, data warehouse technologies, and business intelligence tools
* Outstanding communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to lead complex discovery conversations and present solutions confidently at all levels of a customer organisation


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience selling AI-driven customer engagement solutions in a specialist or overlay sales capacity
* Familiarity with predictive and prescriptive modelling techniques and Tableau
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience with an extensive background in technology sales

title: Teamlead IT-infrastruktur
description:
*Folkhälsomyndigheten är en nationell kunskapsmyndighet som arbetar för bättre folkhälsa. Det gör myndigheten genom att utveckla och stödja samhällets arbete med att främja hälsa, förebygga ohälsa och skydda mot hälsohot. Vår vision är en folkhälsa som stärker samhällets utveckling.*
 Vill du arbeta som teamleader och säkerställa att Folkhälsomyndighetens it-infrastruktur är säker, skalbar, flexibel och anpassad till organisationens behov? Då kan du vara personen vi söker för att leda projekt och utvecklingsarbeten inom området.
   

  

 Vad ska du jobba med?
   

  

 Som teamlead för it-infrastruktur kommer du att arbeta tvärfunktionellt för att stärka och utveckla myndighetens it-miljöer. Du ingår i myndighetens arkitektråd och samarbetar nära med andra funktioner inom IT och övrig verksamhet.
   

  

 I rollen ansvarar du för att samordna och säkerställa att infrastrukturen är säker, skalbar, flexibel och anpassad till organisationens behov. Det dagliga arbetet innefattar planering och prioritering av aktiviteter, framtagande av beslutsunderlag för val av teknik, inköp och arkitektur samt deltagande och ledning av projekt och utvecklingsarbeten inom området.
   

  

**Dina Arbetsuppgifter**
* Samordna frågor rörande drift och infrastruktur.
* Leda och driva upphandlingar inom infrastruktur, samt bidra med kompetens i upphandlingar där infrastruktur är aktuell.
* Leda och planera underhållsarbete, bland annat genom återkommande servicefönster.
* Leda och utveckla interna processer och rutiner, såsom incident- och problemhantering.
* Planera och vid behov delta i beredskapshanteringen för IT.


**Specifika Ansvarsområden**
* Leda teamets arbete och, tillsammans med it-chef, planera verksamheten.
* Ansvara för den övergripande infrastrukturen (nät, servrar och lagring) med stöd av teamet.
* Delta i en samordningsgrupp för verksamhetsplanering av it-enhetens arbete.
* Inneha det övergripande ansvaret och strategin för licens- och certifikatshantering inom infrastruktur.
* Stödja it-chef i budgetarbete och ekonomisk uppföljning, med särskilt ansvar för infrastruktur.


 Vem söker vi?
   

  

**Krav För Anställningen**
* Relevant högskole- eller yrkesutbildning eller aktuell och relevant arbetslivserfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer som likvärdig.
* Aktuell erfarenhet av ansvar för drift och infrastruktur, inklusive ekonomisk planering och uppföljning.
* Djup teknisk kunskap inom datacentermiljö (servrar, lagring, backup) i egen drift, nätverk, datakommunikation och brandväggar – företrädesvis inom produkter från HP, Cisco eller NetApp.
* Flerårig erfarenhet av it-drift i komplexa it-miljöer.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska, både i tal och skrift.


**Mycket Stor Vikt Läggs Vid**
 Därtill ser vi dessa kompetenser, förmågor och erfarenheter som viktiga för att du ska trivas hos oss:
   

  

* Personliga egenskaper god samarbetsförmåga, ansvarstagande och god förmåga att leda och prioritera. Du har ett helhetsperspektiv och ett gott bemötande.
* Aktuell kunskap och erfarenhet av arkitektur med hög säkerhet inom infrastruktur.
* Stor vana och erfarenhet av att ta fram beslutsunderlag.
* Stor vana att leda och planera underhållsarbete, bland annat genom återkommande servicefönster.
* Aktuell erfarenhet av arbete i regelstyrd verksamhet.
* Vana att leda team inom området.
* Kunskap och erfarenhet av upphandling inom säkerhetsskyddad verksamhet.
* Vana av budgetarbete och ekonomisk uppföljning.
* Aktuell kunskap och erfarenhet av att leda incidenthantering.
* Goda kunskaper i engelska, både i tal och skrift.


**Stor Vikt Läggs Vid**
* Aktuell erfarenhet av licens- och certifikatshantering.
* Aktuell kunskap om och erfarenhet av arbete inom DevSecOps utifrån infrastruktur.
* Aktuell kunskap och erfarenhet av projektledning och projektstyrning.
* Vana att leda och delta i offentliga upphandlingar inom infrastruktur.


**Vikt Läggs Vid**
* Du är certifierad inom ITIL.


 Vad gör enheten?
   

  

 Enheten för IT ansvarar för att myndigheten har en säker och tillgänglig it-driftmiljö samt en effektiv support, förvaltning och modern utveckling av it-systemen. Enheten ansvarar även för en samordnad och kostnadseffektiv process för inköp av it-relaterad utrustning, licenser och konsulttjänster.
   

  

 Hur är det att jobba på Folkhälsomyndigheten?
   

  

 Vi erbjuder utvecklande arbetsuppgifter där du kan påverka och göra skillnad. Oavsett vad du jobbar med är du med och bidrar till samhällsnytta. Det gör du tillsammans med engagerade och kompetenta kollegor i stimulerande samarbeten. Folkhälsomyndigheten är en arbetsplats som strävar efter att ge lika möjligheter till alla och att vara fri från diskriminering. Myndigheten har sin verksamhet i Solna och Östersund.
   

  

 Medarbetarskap och kultur på Folkhälsomyndigheten
   

  

 Om anställningen
   

  

 Du kommer att anställas som handläggare med placering på vårt kontor i Solna. Anställningen är en tillsvidareanställning på heltid som inleds med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde sker snarast enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

 Som anställd vid Folkhälsomyndigheten kan du komma att bli krigsplacerad. Vissa tjänster är placerade i säkerhetsklass där svenskt medborgarskap kan vara ett krav. Säkerhetsprövning kommer då genomföras i enlighet med Säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585).
   

  

 På myndigheten kan det finnas möjlighet att teckna överenskommelse om distansarbete upp till 40 procent av din arbetstid.
   

  

 Är du intresserad?
   

  

 Vill du veta mer om anställningen är du välkommen att kontakta enhetschef Sofia Palmér, telefon 010- 205 22 53.
   

  

 Fackliga företrädare är för SACO Susanne Fridh, telefon 010-205 23 17, och för OFR/S Jessika Spångberg, telefon 010-205 29 22.
   

  

 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan till befattningen som handläggare hos oss!
   

  

 Vi har valt att ta bort det personliga brevet ur rekryteringsprocessen. I stället ansöker du med ditt CV och genom att besvara urvalsfrågor. Målet är att skapa en mer inkluderande rekryteringsprocess. Arbetspsykologiska tester och arbetsprov kan komma att användas som en del i rekryteringsprocessen.
   

  

 Vänligen ladda upp relevanta examensbevis i samband med din ansökan.
   

  

 Läs i ansökningsformuläret hur du går tillväga om du har skyddade personuppgifter.
   

  

 Ansök senast 2026-05-27 via myndighetens webbplats.
   

  

 Arbetsgivarens diarienummer: 01444-2026-2.1.1

title: Head of Energy & Utilities Strategy
description:
**Job Description**
****VP Strategy – Energy & Utilities [Onsite]****
**Location: Europe (preference for Oslo, Stockholm, Helsinki, Berlin or London)**
****Shape the Future of Energy & Utilities****
 Hansen (ASX: HSN) is a global provider of mission‑critical software and services to the energy, water, and communications industries. With over 600 customers in more than 80 countries, we help organisations modernise revenue management, customer engagement, and core operational processes — balancing today’s realities with tomorrow’s opportunities.
   

  

 We are now seeking a
 **VP Strategy – Energy & Utilities** 
 to define and drive Hansen’s
 **global Energy & Utilities strategy** 
 , shaping our long‑term product direction and market position at a time of profound industry transformation.
   

  

****The Opportunity****
 This is a
 **senior, high‑impact strategy role** 
 with genuine influence across product, technology, sales, and executive leadership.
   

  

 You will own the
 **Energy & Utilities vertical strategy globally** 
 , with a particular focus on Europe, developing a clear
 **3–5 year market point‑of‑view** 
 and translating major industry shifts — including regulation, decarbonisation, customer experience expectations, and cloud/SaaS adoption — into a pragmatic, investable roadmap.
   

  

 Working in close partnership with the
 **Global President, Energy & Utilities** 
 , the
 **Chief Product Officer** 
 , and senior Product, R&D, and Delivery leaders, you will ensure Hansen’s product investments remain differentiated, coherent, and aligned to evolving global Utility needs.
   

  

****Your Impact****
* Define the strategic narrative for Hansen’s Energy & Utilities business globally, but with a key focus on Europe
* Translate market insight into product direction, investment priorities, and executable roadmaps
* Act as a trusted industry voice, building deep C‑suite relationships across utilities, partners, and ecosystems
* Enable go‑to‑market success, shaping value propositions, strategic bids, and growth initiatives
* Bridge strategy and execution, ensuring ideas convert into real, delivered outcomes for customers


****Key Responsibilities****
**European (& Global) Market & Competitive Intelligence**
* Maintain a deep, current understanding of European (and global) Energy & Utilities trends, regulation, and investment drivers
* Interpret competitive dynamics and partner ecosystems, translating insight into strategic advantage


**Vertical Strategy & Long‑Term Product Direction**
* Own Hansen’s Energy & Utilities strategic point‑of‑view and longer‑term product direction (3–5 year horizon)
* Act as custodian of product investment priorities alongside Product, Technology, and Delivery leaders
* Balance near‑term customer needs with longer‑term strategic bets


**Strategy to Roadmap Translation**
* Shape coherent strategic programs that Product and R&D teams can plan, prioritise, and deliver
* Lead structured customer engagement (advisory boards, co‑development, workshops) to validate and refine direction


**Go‑to‑Market Enablement & Growth**
* Articulate strategic differentiation internally across Sales, Marketing, and Account teams
* Support complex bids, pricing strategies, and strategic growth initiatives
* Contribute to M&A assessments aligned to our global Energy & Utilities strategy, particularly across Europe


**Industry Thought Leadership**
* Build and maintain a strong reputation as a trusted Energy & Utilities thought leader
* Represent Hansen at industry events, conferences, and executive forums


****About You****
 You are a
 **credible industry strategist** 
 with a strong product, technology, or consulting background, comfortable operating at board and C‑suite level.
   

  

**You Bring**
* Deep experience in Energy & Utilities, ideally within the European market, but even better if you have broader, global expertise
* A track record of shaping product or platform strategy in complex enterprise environments
* Strong understanding of cloud, SaaS, and PaaS business models
* The ability to influence across global executive teams, product leaders, and commercial stakeholders
* A consultative, relationship‑driven style with strong communication and presentation skills


 Experience with
 **CIS, MDMS, CRM platforms** 
 , and additional European language capability is advantageous.
   

  

****Why Join Hansen?****
* Influence the strategic direction of a global Energy & Utilities portfolio
* Operate at the intersection of industry transformation, technology, and product innovation
* Work with a leadership team that values pragmatic progress over hype
* Join a business with strong values, long‑term customers, and global scale


 We are proud to be an equal opportunities employer. Hansen prides itself on celebrating diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees, even extending this to how we work with our customers, partners and suppliers. We welcome applications from all qualified candidates, regardless of age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, race, ethnicity, religion or belief, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic. If you require any adjustments or accommodations during the recruitment process, please let us know.

title: AI Product Manager
description:
We are on a mission to become the leading international force in residential property management. What we do matters to billions of people in their everyday lives.
   

  

 Residential real estate is the world’s largest asset class, and for most families, buying a home is the single biggest financial decision they will ever make. For too long, residential property management has fallen short of homeowners' and residents' expectations, and the industry is ready for change. Odevo was formed to make that change happen.
   

  

 In just six years, Odevo has grown more than 70-fold, establishing us as the leading international player. We are more than 12,000 people across the US, the UK, the Nordics, Germany, Spain, Portugal, Mexico, and Italy building Odevo. Together, we aspire to break new ground through innovation and cultivate a workplace where we help each other succeed, where ideas matter more than titles, and where kindness is a strength.
   

  

 By combining the power of people and technology, we set a new standard for how homes are managed. Our technology-enabled services simplify living for residents and create a better experience for property owners and boards.
   

  

 Our ambition is to continue our fast-growing journey through new customers, service expansion, and by partnering with great companies that share our mindset and ambition, both in existing and new markets.
   

  

 As we continue to grow, we stay true to who we are, challenge unnecessary bureaucracy, and keep decision-making close to our customers.
   

  

 If you share our mindset and ambition, we’d love you to join us and help accelerate our mission together.
   

  

 At Odevo, we build production-grade AI systems that change how residential living is managed at scale. Our AI Engineering team is deeply technical, highly collaborative, and driven by learning - and we're now looking for a Product Manager to help shape what we build and why.
   

  

 This is a role at the intersection of cutting-edge AI and real-world property management. You'll work side by side with AI engineers, domain experts, and business stakeholders to turn emerging AI capabilities into products that thousands of residents, property managers, and support teams rely on every day. You'll own the product direction for AI-powered features - from early exploration to production - and make sure we're always solving the right problems in the right order.
   

  

 You'll drive the roadmap for tools like our case triage engine - defining what great looks like, gathering user feedback, and working with engineers to continuously improve how we understand and route incoming maintenance issues.
   

  

**Your Main Responsibilities**
* Bring structure, clarity, and momentum to a complex case management landscape shaped by decentralized organizations, differing local processes, legacy systems, and uneven technical maturity.
* Own the product direction for AI-powered case management automation, turning ambiguous operational needs into clear priorities, actionable backlog items, and scalable solutions.
* Build deep understanding of how case handling works in practice today across the business - immersing yourself in operational workflows, pain points, and variations to ensure we solve real problems in ways users trust and adopt.
* Act as the bridge between AI engineers, operations teams, domain experts, and business stakeholders - translating between technical possibilities, business needs, and day-to-day operational reality.
* Drive alignment, prioritization, and delivery together with the AI engineering team and stakeholders, balancing business value, technical constraints, data dependencies, and long-term product evolution.
* Drive adoption and measurable impact end to end - from discovery and rollout to follow-up, iteration, and continuous improvement based on usage, feedback, and outcomes.


**Who You Are**
* You thrive in complexity and ambiguity, and you are at your best when bringing structure, focus, and progress to situations that are not yet well defined.
* You are genuinely curious about how work happens in practice and willing to go deep into the domain to understand workflows, edge cases, and operational pain points.
* You build trust quickly and communicate clearly across functions, levels, and backgrounds - from highly technical teams to operational stakeholders and senior leadership.
* You are comfortable making decisions with incomplete information, balancing short-term needs with long-term direction, and adjusting course as new insights emerge.
* You combine strategic product thinking with hands-on execution, and you care as much about adoption and outcomes as you do about delivery.
* You are excited by applied AI and motivated by the challenge of turning new technology into products that create real value in complex environments.


**What We Are Looking For**
* A true product owner who is the natural go-to person for the AI product domain - perceived as an owner, not a coordinator.
* Someone who can bridge the gap between engineers who care deeply about their craft and stakeholders who care about outcomes.
* A data-driven decision maker who is comfortable making trade-offs and driving alignment across functions.
* An excellent communicator - verbal and written - who can make complex AI concepts accessible to any audience.
* A team player who thrives in a collaborative, open, and supportive environment.


**Relevant Experience**
* 5+ years as a Product Manager, Product Owner, or similar product leadership role, ideally in B2B SaaS or tech-driven services.
* Hands-on experience working with AI, ML, or data-driven product teams is a strong plus.
* Experience in PropTech or the service industry is a plus.
* Bachelor's degree in a relevant field is preferred.
* Fluent in Swedish and English.


**Location**
 Our office is located at Tulegatan 4 in Stockholm, and our AI team follows a hybrid work model with three days in the office to balance focus and collaboration.
   

  

**Sounds like you?** 
 Apply today!
   

  

 #msl

title: AI Engineer, Retrieval & Quality
description:
**The Role**
 Among other things, you'll design and own the systems that decide which licensed data reaches our customers' models, and the evaluation infrastructure that proves it's better than the alternatives.
   

  

 In this role, you will:
   

  

* Design and operate the retrieval pipeline that serves licensed data to AI agents and models in real time: hybrid search, ranking, fusion, re-ranking
* Build the eval harness that runs continuously, gates deploys on quality, and surfaces regressions before customers feel them
* Translate research from our data science team into production systems, then own them end to end
* Define what "good" means for Redpine's output and build the dashboards that prove it across customers, verticals, and competitors
* Work across the stack as quality demands it, from ingestion signals through embedding pipelines to the API response


**The Team**
 We're a small, fast growing team based in Stockholm, working across infrastructure, data, and AI. The same people designing systems are building, shipping, and running them. Feedback loops are short and ownership is direct.
   

  

 You'll work closely with our data scientists, who own research, methodology, and data quality. You'll own production retrieval and the eval infrastructure that runs on top of that.
   

  

 We're early enough that many of the core systems are still being defined. That means you won't be scaling someone else's architecture.
   

  

**What We're Looking For**
* Production experience with retrieval systems: search, ranking, recommendation systems, or RAG at scale, not just notebooks
* Strong opinions on evaluation, both offline and online. You've designed test sets, run A/B experiments, and argued with data scientists and product managers about whether a metric reflects reality
* Comfortable with the full retrieval stack: embeddings, vector and lexical indexes, learning-to-rank, hybrid systems & knowledge graphs
* Have shipped, not only researched. You know the difference between a method that works in a paper and one that works in production
* Comfort operating where direction evolves quickly and problems aren't yet well-defined
* We work primarily in Go, Rust and Python in a multi cloud environment. We hire for judgment, not stack.


**Why this role**
 Most retrieval and AI engineering roles are about plugging the latest models into an existing product. This isn't.
   

  

 You'll be working on questions like:
   

  

* How do you prove that licensed data produces better agent outputs than scraped data, with rigor that holds up to a customer's evaluation team?
* What does a retrieval system look like when freshness, provenance, and rights are first-class signals alongside relevance?
* How do you build evals that are honest enough to fail your own deploys and convincing enough to win customers?


 This role sits at the core of whether Redpine is differentiated infrastructure or a nicer API on commodity vector search.
   

  

**Practical details**
* This role is based in Stockholm and requires a valid Swedish work permit or similar eligibility
* Relocation support available
* Competitive salary and meaningful equity


**About Redpine**
 If models were the first wave of AI, and compute the second, we're building the data layer that comes next.
   

  

 Only a small fraction of the world's data is on the open internet. The rest, high-quality, domain-specific, often critical, sits behind paywalls, in databases, or with rights holders. Redpine is building the infrastructure to unlock it.
   

  

 We provide AI builders and autonomous agents with access to licensed, high-quality, multimodal data through a unified platform and API. The goal is simple: make AI systems more accurate, more useful, and grounded in real-world information.
   

  

 We're backed by Nordic Ninja, Node VC, and Luminar, alongside angels from OpenAI, Spotify, and Perplexity.

title: Enhetschef inom Generell telefoni i Sundbyberg
description:
Placeringsort SundbybergDiarienummer FK 2026/010265
   

  

 Logga in och sök jobbet Öppnas i nytt fönster
   

  

*Varje år fattar Försäkringskassan 21 miljoner beslut som påverkar människors liv och hela samhället. Vi betalar ut cirka 260 miljarder kronor varje år. Det är allas skattepengar vi har hand om. Det är ett stort ansvar. Därför sätter vi oss in i varje ärende, följer lagar och regler, informerar och vägleder, bryr oss och visar omtanke. Det är ett jobb för dig som vill vara med och ta ansvar. Välkommen till Försäkringskassan.*
 Vi söker nu en enhetschef till en enhet inom generell telefoni (kundtjänst) sjukförsäkring. Du kommer att leda en enhet som är med och besvarar drygt 1 miljon kundsamtal per år. Medarbetarna i generell telefoni besvarar många olika typer av frågor om sjukförsäkringen och är ofta de som står för kundernas första möte med Försäkringskassan. Det är därför viktigt att våra kunder både får svar på sina frågor och ett gott bemötande.
   

  

 Nära ledarskap, förändring, hållbar arbetsplats
   

  

 Som enhetschef är du den chef som befinner dig närmast medarbetarna och verksamheten. Du ansvarar för att leda och driva det dagliga arbetet utifrån avdelningens uppdrag och mål där den statliga värdegrunden genomsyrar ditt arbete. Genom ditt ledarskap förmedlar du tydliga förväntningar, följer upp mål och ger dina medarbetare rätt förutsättningar att ta sitt ansvar. Du har personalansvar såväl som resultat- och uppföljningsansvar för teamen i din enhet.
   

  

 Din enhet består av ca 20 medarbetare som arbetar med att besvara inkommande telefonsamtal och har sin placering i Sundbyberg. Genom ett nära ledarskap skapar du den förutsägbarhet, trygghet och hållbarhet som är nödvändig för att medarbetarna ska kunna ta sitt ansvar samt möta behov av förändring. Du skapar förståelse för sammanhang, riktning och de målbilder avdelningen satt upp och tar fram de planer din verksamhet behöver. Som enhetschef är du ett stöd för områdeschefen och du ingår i områdets ledningsgrupp som består av 11 chefer, HR-stöd och en administrativ assistent där du bidrar med din kompetens och ditt engagemang. Du anpassar och utövar ditt ledarskap på ett sätt som skapar förutsättningar för medarbetarna att använda sitt omdöme och kompetens.
   

  

 Tjänsten innebär att du hanterar sekretessbelagda uppgifter vilket ställer höga krav på rätt hantering. Därför är det viktigt att du som ska arbeta hos oss har högt säkerhetsmedvetande.
   

  

 Det är ett jobb för dig som vill vara med och ta ansvar.
   

  

 Vi söker dig som
   

  

* har högskoleexamen eller erfarenheter och kvalifikationer som kan prövas likvärdiga
* har god ledarskapsförmåga
* främjar andras professionella och personliga utveckling
* arbetar för att nå mål och resultat, följer upp effekterna av egna och andras aktiviteter
* har ett systematiskt arbetssätt
* samarbetar effektivt med andra för att nå gemensamma mål
* har god självkännedom och är stabil som person, främjar ett förtroendeskapande arbetsklimat
* främjar ömsesidig dialog, är lyhörd och anpassar sin kommunikation efter behov och situation.


 Det är meriterande om du
   

  

* har erfarenhet av operativt ledarskap i liknande verksamhet
* har erfarenhet av coachande ledarskap och att leda i förändring
* har erfarenhet av att leda team, gärna på distans
* har erfarenhet av att planera din verksamhet i samarbete med chefskollegor på distans
* har erfarenhet av kompetensbaserad rekrytering inom staten
* har god förståelse för Försäkringskassans uppdrag.


 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Övrigt
   

  

 1 tjänster, tillsvidare, heltid, med tillträde enligt överenskommelse. Provanställning kan bli aktuellt. I enlighet med Försäkringskassans riktlinje för säkerhet genomförs bakgrundskontroller i denna rekrytering. Möjlighet till distansarbete finns om arbetet tillåter. I den här rekryteringen kan arbetspsykologiska test användas som en del i urvalsarbetet. Placeringsort: Sundbyberg.
   

  

 Vill du veta mer om Försäkringskassan som arbetsgivare? Besök fk.se/jobbahososs
   

  

 Kontaktpersoner
   

  

 Chef: Lars Andersson, 010-111 39 20 (för frågor om tjänsten). HR-specialist: Annika Chitaar, annika.chitaar@forsakringskassan.se, 010-113 10 42, (för frågor om rekryteringsprocessen). ST: Marcus Bringzén, , 010-111 38 22, Saco-S: Mats Furby , 010-116 33 10, Seko: Eliza Grundström, 010-115 34 02.
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan senast den 6 maj 2026. Ladda gärna upp dina examensbevis, betyg och intyg i samband med din ansökan.
   

  

 Har du skyddade personuppgifter eller ingen tillgång till bank-id ringer du den HR-specialist som finns namngiven i annonsen så får du hjälp med att skicka in din ansökan.
   

  

 Vi ska i allt vi gör, agera med utgångspunkt i principen om alla människors lika värde, rättssäkerhet och med god service.

title: Technical Pre-Sales & Solution Specialist
description:
Vill du kombinera teknik, affär och kunddialog i en roll där du får vara med och forma framtidens kommunikationslösningar för våra företagskunder. Brinner du för att översätta komplex teknik till tydligt kundvärde och affärsresultat? Hos oss på Tre B2B söker vi nu en Technical Pre-Sales & Solution Specialist.
   

  

 Som Technical Pre-Sales & Solution Specialist hos oss blir du en nyckelperson i Tre:s företagsaffär. Rollen är bred och kombinerar teknisk rådgivning, affärsutveckling och kundnära säljstöd. Du arbetar med moderna kommunikationsplattformar – exempelvis UCaAS, molnbaserad telefoni, mobilplattformar och IoT – och hjälper våra företagskunder att hitta rätt lösningar utifrån deras behov.
   

  

 Du deltar i kundmöten tillsammans med våra säljare och tar fram tekniska lösningsförslag, paketerar erbjudanden, sätter prisbilder och säkerställer att vi skapar värde genom både teknik och kommersiella upplägg. Internt får du en central roll inom B2B och arbetar tätt tillsammans med bland annat IT, legal och säljkanaler för att driva lösningar hela vägen från behov till leverans. Du följer utvecklingen på marknaden, analyserar konkurrenslandskapet och driver omvärldsbevakning för att säkerställa att vi ligger steget före.
   

  

**Du kan se fram emot att**
* ha en central roll i komplexa kunddialoger där teknik, affär och strategi möts
* påverka utvecklingen av nya produkter genom omvärldsbevakning och marknadsanalys för våra företagskunder
* vara en del av en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser (Great Place to Work 2026)


 ,
   

  

**Mer om dig**
 Vi tror att du har en teknisk bakgrund, och en gedigen erfarenhet i en motsvarande roll där telekom, plattformslösningar eller kommunikationstjänster står i centrum. Du är trygg i kunddialoger och trivs i en roll där du bygger relationer, skapar förståelse och omsätter komplex teknik till tydliga affärsmöjligheter. En stor del av din tid jobbar du nära säljorganisationen för att få ihop komplexa lösningar. Du förstår vikten av att hålla dig uppdaterad kring teknik, marknad och konkurrenter för att säkerställa att vi ligger steget före.
   

  

 Som person är du lösningsorienterad och tar naturligt initiativ för att driva ditt arbete framåt samtidigt som du trivs med att samarbeta nära andra för att nå gemensamma resultat. Du har god kännedom om Microsofts plattformslösningar och arbetar vant med moderna kommunikationslösningar. Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på både svenska och engelska. Har du dessutom kunskap inom cybersäkerhet ser vi det som en värdefull tillgång i rollen.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**
 Vi tar emot ansökningar via denna annons och kommer hålla intervjuer löpande. Personligt brev behövs inte, men vi vill gärna att du bifogar CV och svarar på de frågor vi ställt nedan i samband med att du söker. Vi använder tester för att säkra objektiva bedömningar i samband med urval. Tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag. Bakgrundskontroll görs på slutkandidat.
   

  

 För mer information om tjänsten kontakta rekryterande chef Per Malm (per.malm@tre.se)

title: IT-arkitekt IT-infrastruktur
description:
Beskrivning av tjänsten
   

  

 Vi söker en erfaren IT arkitekt med inriktning mot infrastruktur till vår GTO verksamhet. Rollen innebär arbete som solution architect i både pågående kunduppdrag och i affärsrelaterade aktiviteter, såsom anbud och förstudier, för såväl nya som befintliga kunder.
   

  

 Du arbetar med arkitekturfrågor i miljöer där flera tekniska områden samverkar och där befintlig infrastruktur ofta är en viktig utgångspunkt. Fokus ligger på att ta fram lösningar som är tekniskt genomförbara, möjliga att drifta och relevanta över tid.
   

  

 Vi är öppna för placeringsorterna: Stockholm, Göteborg, Västerås & Malmö
   

  

 Dina framtida arbetsuppgifter
   

  

* Ta fram arkitektur och teknisk design för infrastrukturlösningar
* Arbeta med lösningsarkitektur inom pågående affärsprojekt och uppdrag
* Delta i framtagning av arkitektur- och lösningsförslag i samband med anbud och förstudier
* Arbeta i dialog med kund kring krav, förutsättningar och tekniska beroenden
* Omsätta verksamhets- och säkerhetskrav till konkreta tekniska lösningar
* Bidra till estimat, beslutsunderlag och dokumentation kopplat till lösningar
* Säkerställa att föreslagna lösningar fungerar i kundens befintliga miljö och är möjliga att förvalta
* Stötta leveransprojekt från analys och design till införande
* Arbeta med migration och integration mellan system, plattformar och miljöer
* Driva mindre uppdrag självständigt med ansvar för arkitektur och teknisk samordning


**Om rollen i praktiken.**
 Rollen kräver god teknisk bredd och erfarenhet av att arbeta med infrastruktur som helhet. Du gör arkitektoniska avvägningar mellan teknik, verksamhetskrav, säkerhet och drift, och förväntas vara trygg i att fatta beslut även när alla förutsättningar inte är helt givna.
   

  

 Dokumentation och kommunikation är en central del av arbetet. Du behöver kunna förklara arkitektur och tekniska val på ett tydligt och strukturerat sätt, både för tekniska och mer verksamhetsnära mottagare.
   

  

**För att fungera väl i rollen ser vi gärna att du**
* Tar ansvar för arkitekturleveranser och följer upp att beslut får genomslag
* Arbetar strukturerat och dokumenterar lösningar så att de är möjliga att ta över
* Är van att arbeta i sammanhang där teknik, affär och leverans möts
* Är lyhörd i dialog med kund och kan anpassa kommunikationen efter situation
* Gör pragmatiska tekniska val baserade på krav, risk och sammanhang
* Samarbetar väl med specialister, projektledare och andra arkitekter
* Bidrar med erfarenhet och omdöme snarare än att driva enskilda tekniska preferenser


 Kvalifikationer för att bli framgångsrik denna roll
   

  

* Flerårig erfarenhet som IT arkitekt eller solution architect med inriktning mot infrastruktur
* Erfarenhet av arbete inom flera delar av IT infrastruktur, exempelvis:
* Linux- och/eller Unix baserade plattformar
* Server- och plattformslösningar
* Nätverk (LAN/WAN)
* Identitet och katalogtjänster
* Infrastrukturrelaterad säkerhet
* Cloud- och hybridmiljöer som del av en större helhet
* Migration och integration mellan system och miljöer
* Erfarenhet av arbete i kund- eller projektform, inklusive tidiga skeden och affärsstöd
* Relevant utbildning på universitetsnivå eller motsvarande arbetslivserfarenhet
* Mycket god svenska i tal och skrift samt god engelska


**Vad CGI erbjuder**
 CGI är ett konsultbolag med både lokal närvaro och internationell verksamhet. I Sverige finns vi på ett stort antal orter, vilket möjliggör arbete nära kunder samtidigt som du är del av ett större nätverk av arkitekter och specialister.
   

  

**Hos oss erbjuds:**
* Flexibla arbetstider
* Möjlighet att utvecklas vidare som arkitekt, specialist eller i ledande roller
* Kompetensutveckling genom uppdrag, utbildningar och interna nätverk
* Stöd från erfarna kollegor och närvarande ledning


**Förmåner inkluderar bland annat:**
* Aktieprogram och möjlighet till delägarskap
* Friskvårdsbidrag
* Föräldralön
* Kollektivavtal och pensionslösningar
* Möjlighet till personalbil


 Bakgrunds- och registerkontroll kan förekomma beroende på uppdragets art.
   

  

 Om du har frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chefer Marcus Grindange, marcus.grindange@cgi.com eller Husnia Kabiri, husnia.kabari@cgi.com
   

  

**Låt oss som ägare omvandla verklig insikt till handling – tillsammans.**
 Livet på CGI bygger på ägande, lagarbete, respekt och tillhörighet. Tillsammans med oss kommer du att kunna nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Du är inbjuden att ta ägandeskap redan från första dagen i vårt arbete med att förverkliga vår dröm om att skapa en arbetsmiljö där vi trivs med att arbeta tillsammans och bidrar till framgången för vårt företag. Det är därför vi kallar oss CGI Partners snarare än anställda. Vi drar nytta av vår kollektiva framgång och tillsammans får vi möjlighet att aktivt forma vår företagsstrategi och inriktning.
   

  

 Ditt arbete skapar värde. Du kommer att vara med att utveckla innovativa lösningar och bygga relationer med medarbetare och kunder samtidigt som du får tillgång till globala möjligheter att skala upp dina idéer, omfamna nya möjligheter och dra nytta av gedigen bransch- och teknikexpertis.
   

  

 Du kommer att forma din karriär tillsammans med ett företag som är byggt för att växa och bestå. Du får stöd av ledare som bryr sig om din hälsa och ditt välbefinnande och ger dig möjligheter att fördjupa dina kunskaper och vidga dina vyer.
   

  

 Bli en del en av världens största leverantörer av IT- och affärskonsulttjänster.

title: Sr. Account Executive - Large Enterprise Business - Sweden
description:
**Description**
**Overview of the Role:**
 As an Enterprise Account Executive at Salesforce in Sweden, you will work with strategic accounts across organisations with 1,500+ employees. Partnering with customers across the full Salesforce AI CRM and Agentforce platform, you will act as a trusted advisor — developing deep insight into complex enterprise business dynamics and helping shape customers' transformation agendas. You will be part of a high-performing Enterprise team with dedicated onboarding, coaching, and career development.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop and manage senior stakeholder relationships across an assigned portfolio of enterprise accounts in Sweden, driving customer satisfaction and long-term growth
* Build and execute long-term account strategies aligned to customer business objectives, coordinating with Specialist Cloud sales and Solution Engineering resources
* Identify and develop new opportunities across existing accounts and whitespace prospects, using the full Salesforce Customer 360 and Agentforce portfolio
* Perform structured account planning to align internal Salesforce resources with customer needs and drive expansion


**Required Qualifications**
* 5+ years of full-cycle SaaS or software sales experience, including managing complex deal structures and commercial proposals for large enterprise accounts
* Proven ability to lead internal stakeholder teams in a client-facing environment and engage credibly with both operational and C-suite decision-makers
* Strong analytical, problem-solving, and influencing skills, with a demonstrated appetite for strategic selling environments
* Fluent in Swedish and English, with the right to work in Sweden and ability to work in a hybrid arrangement with 3 days per week in the office


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience coordinating and strategising within a large, extended internal sales team
* Familiarity with Agentforce, AI-driven CRM, or multi-cloud Salesforce selling motions


 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and be your best, and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can do your best. Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 At Salesforce, we strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates.
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodation Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity Statement.
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit. The same goes for compensation, benefits, promotions, transfers, reduction in workforce, recall, training, and education.
   

  

**Salesforce welcomes all.**
 In the United States, compensation offered will be determined by factors such as location, job level, job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Salesforce offers a variety of benefits to help you live well including: time off programs, medical, dental, vision, mental health support, paid parental leave, life and disability insurance, 401(k), and an employee stock purchasing program. More details about company benefits can be found at the following link: https://www.salesforcebenefits.com.

title: Specialistsäljare inom Collaboration
description:
Säljspecialist inom Collaboration & hybrida mötestjänster
   

  

 Vill du vara med och forma framtidens mötes- och samarbetslösningar? Hos Telia Cygate hjälper vi organisationer att arbeta smartare, säkrare och mer hållbart – och nu söker vi en affärsdriven säljspecialist inom Collaboration som vill göra verklig skillnad för våra kunder.
   

  

 Jag heter Staffan Sundqvist och ansvarar för vårt fantastiska Team inom Collaboration inom Managed Services, en central enhet som ansvarar för att levererar Hybrid & Cloud tjänster inom Telia Cygate och vi behöver förstärka vårt Team.
   

  

**Vad du kommer göra i rollen**
 Som Specialistsäljare inom Collaboration blir du en strategisk rådgivare som stöttar kunder i allt från avancerade videoinstallationer till långsiktiga val av suveräna och hybrida mötestjänster. Du arbetar nära Account Managers inom Telia och Telia Cygate och Tjänsteägare för att utveckla och vinna affärer.
   

  

* Översätta kundbehov till hållbara och relevanta lösningsförslag
* Guida kunder i val av hårdvara, tjänster och lösningar inom Cisco, Pexip, A/V och Collaboration
* Att vi har rätt erbjudande till marknaden
* Leda workshops och utbildningar som skapar affärs- och verksamhetsnytta
* Delta i tekniska dialoger kring videoendpoints, mötesrum och molnintegrationer
* Arbeta med kunder där säkerhet, förtroende och compliance är avgörande
* Representera Telia Cygate i kund- och leverantörsmöten


**För att lyckas i rollen**
 Du har ett starkt affärsdriv, är trygg i kunddialoger och har ett genuint intresse för teknik och utveckling.
   

  

* Självständig, proaktiv och initiativtagande
* Teamorienterad med god samarbetsförmåga
* Flexibel och lösningsorienterad
* Minst 10 års erfarenhet inom video- och collaborationområdet med tekniksförståelse
* Erfarenhet av Cisco videoendpoints, Webex, Pexip och A/V-miljöer
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska


**Varför Telia Cygate?**
 På Telia Cygate är vi inte bara experter på nätverk, säkerhet och olika slags moln – vi är också ett gäng som tycker att det ska vara kul att gå till jobbet! Som en del av Telia Company har vi styrkan att skapa verklig påverkan i stor skala, bidra till samhällsnytta och hjälpa våra kunder att navigera i digitaliseringens värld. Vi gör det alltid med värme, omtanke och ett leende. Här är det idéerna och våra olika perspektiv som gör oss starka, och tillsammans ser vi till att teknikens värld blir en plats där alla trivs – och där du hör hemma.
   

  

 Hos oss är din utveckling viktig. Vi uppmuntrar till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och ser till att just du och dina intressen är i fokus. Vi vet att det är människorna som utgör vårt företag, och därför värdesätter vi glädje, kreativitet och olika perspektiv i allt vi gör.
   

  

 Välkommen att växa tillsammans med oss, där vi gör teknik mänsklig och skapar verklig påverkan!
   

  

**Telia Cygate är stolta över att vara certifierade som Great Place to Work!**
 Hos oss står människor i centrum – här får du utvecklas, utmanas och trivas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor. Vi bygger en kultur där trygghet, gemenskap och möjligheter går hand i hand. Vill du vara med på resan? Välkommen till en arbetsplats som verkligen gör skäl för namnet.
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder**
 När du börjar hos oss får du ett omfattande förmånspaket anpassat efter din lokala marknad, möjlighet till hybridarbete och mer. Du har också chans att få bonus baserat på din prestation och Telias resultat.
   

  

**Låter det intressant?**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan senast
 **2026-05-10.** 
 Rollen kan komma att stängas tidigare om vi hittar rätt kandidat – så vänta inte för länge!
   

  

 Placeringsort: Solna / Göteborg
   

  

 Om du går vidare i processen kommer du att kontaktas av vår
 **Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Bakgrund- och referenskontroller ingår i processen.
   

  

 Vill du veta mer om rollen? Kontakta gärna rekryterande chef Staffan Sundqvist på staffan.sundqvist@cygate.se
   

  

 I samband med våra rekryteringar undanber vi oss kontakter från rekryteringsföretag och andra annonsörer.
   

  

**Lika möjligheter för alla**
 På Telia värderar vi kompetens och utvecklingspotential. Vi främjar mångfald och ser till att varje individs behov tillgodoses, oavsett funktionsvariation, kön, ålder, nationalitet, sexuell läggning eller social bakgrund. Tillsammans skapar vi en inkluderande arbetsmiljö där din unikhet är vår styrka.
   

  

**Välkommen till Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Sr. Account Executive - Agentforce - SWE
description:
**Description**
**Overview of the Role:**
 As an Agentforce Specialist Account Executive at Salesforce, you will play a pivotal role in driving revenue growth by positioning and selling Agentforce — Salesforce's flagship AI platform — to enterprise and commercial customers. You will combine deep AI knowledge with strong enterprise sales skills to conduct technical discovery, craft compelling points of view, and demonstrate how Agentforce delivers measurable business outcomes. Working closely with the broader Salesforce sales team, you will show up as One Salesforce throughout the entire client engagement.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Identify, qualify, and develop Agentforce opportunities across new and existing customers, conducting comprehensive technical discovery to map client business challenges to Agentforce capabilities
* Collaborate closely with the Salesforce sales team to drive Agentforce growth, crafting and presenting compelling Points of View (POVs) that articulate clear business value to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
* Articulate how the full Salesforce product stack — including Agentforce, Data Cloud, and core clouds — delivers tailored, scalable solutions that fit within customers' existing architectures and long-term strategic objectives
* Lead cross-functional coordination across internal teams to ensure a seamless client experience throughout the full sales cycle


**Required Qualifications**
* 10+ years of experience in enterprise and commercial B2B sales within a highly technical sales environment, with a proven track record of consistently surpassing sales targets
* Deep understanding of AI and machine learning concepts, including agent configuration, automation, API connectivity, and how AI capabilities translate into business outcomes for non-technical buyers
* Hands-on experience with the Salesforce platform (Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Marketing Cloud, Data Cloud) and familiarity with cloud infrastructure, data warehouse technologies, and business intelligence tools
* Outstanding communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to lead complex discovery conversations and present solutions confidently at all levels of a customer organisation


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience selling AI-driven customer engagement solutions in a specialist or overlay sales capacity
* Familiarity with predictive and prescriptive modelling techniques and Tableau
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience with an extensive background in technology sales

title: Full-stack Developer
description:
**About This Vacancy**
 At our company, you will work closely with our clients in Greater Stockholm on projects spanning the entire development chain, from backend and database layers to modern frontend frameworks. The role includes responsibilities such as developing robust solutions, optimizing code, building integrations, and contributing to scalable systems in cloud environments. You'll be working in a dynamic environment with close collaboration between various teams, giving you the opportunity to develop both technical and communication skills. As an Employeneur at TMC, you will carry out assignments where your expertise makes a difference. At the same time, you will become part of our business cell Digital & IT in Stockholm, where we are building a strong network of developers and specialists.
   

  

**What We Expect From You**
 We believe you have:
   

  

* A college or university education in a relevant field (at least a BSc, MSc is a plus)
* At least five years of experience in software development with a focus on backend
* Strong experience in Java, Node, .NET/C#, and/or Go
* Experience with React, Angular, Vue, and/or Next
* Proficiency in working with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
* Experience with CI/CD, Docker, and Kubernetes
* An understanding of microservices
* We assume you are fluent in both Swedish and English.


 It is a plus if you have a background in IT security, DevOps, IaC, cybersecurity, AI/ML, or data engineering.
   

  

**What You Can Expect From Us**
 In the role of Employeneur, you get to both develop your technical skills and drive your own personal growth and business. You become part of an innovative and entrepreneurial organization where the focus is on continuous development and the opportunity to take responsibility for steering your own career.
   

  

 We place great emphasis on your personal commitment and your willingness to drive your development forward. To succeed in this, you are given the chance to influence the type of projects you take on as well as the skills development you want to invest in. In short, you are in control of your career.
   

  

 Since TMC is an international company, we can offer projects in various locations and countries where we and our clients are present. Currently, we are represented in Sweden, the Netherlands, Belgium, France, Germany, Luxembourg, Spain, Portugal, Italy, Hungary, the U.A.E., Mexico, the USA, and Canada. You get the world as your workplace!

title: Sales Manager - Thales’ Identity and Biometric Solutions (IBS)
description:
Location: Stockholm, Sweden
   

  

 Thales people architect identity management and data protection solutions at the heart of digital security. Business and governments rely on us to bring trust to the billons of digital interactions they have with people. Our technologies and services help banks exchange funds, people cross borders, energy become smarter and much more. More than 30,000 organizations already rely on us to verify the identities of people and things, grant access to digital services, analyze vast quantities of information and encrypt data to make the connected world more secure.
   

  

 "As market leader within Digital Identity and Security, Thales makes personal digital interaction simple and secure in an increasingly connected society. From secure software to biometrics and encryption, Thales provides technologies and services that enables business and governments to authenticate identities and protect data, enabling its clients to offer trusted digital services to billions of individuals. Located in Älvsjö since 2012, the site houses both a commercial office as well as two productions within Identity & Biometric Solutions, and Banking & Payment Services. Working commercially across all business areas within Digital Identity and Security, Thales has become a trusted partner within various businesses as well as governments throughout the Nordics.
   

  

 We are currently looking for a Sales Manager for IBS Business Line for Sweden based in Stockholm.
   

  

 Thales Identity and Biometric Solutions (IBS) Business Line is part of the global Thales Group, which employs more than 80,000 people in 68 countries. Your responsibility will be to drive the IBS Business Line sales and account management in Sweden with the objective to deliver sustained profitable growth.
   

  

 You will be reporting to Regional Sales Director Northern Europe IBS based in Sweden and will be mentored and onboarded to existing customer portfolio and trained for relevant products and solutions.
   

  

 In order to apply for this role, we value that you have thorough knowledge of managing complex sales of ICT solutions in B2G or B2B environment. Also, proven experience in public procurement processes is an asset.
   

  

 The ideal candidate will be expected to:
   

  

* Develop and maintain deep understanding of the target markets in – customer needs, priorities, trends, competitive landscape etc
* Build strong trust-based relation with the customers and with the key partners
* Build and maintain wide pipeline of business opportunities in mid and long term
* Define the capture plan including winning strategy for all target opportunities and to orchestrate internal resources for capture plan execution
* Drive the tender teams towards successful capture of the tendered projects.
* Target growth and profitability
* Coordinate IBS actions in the country


**Qualifications:**
* Strong background in managing complex sales of ICT solutions in B2G or B2G environment
* Proven experience with public procurement processes is an asset
* Ability to work with long sales-cycles
* Experience in international matrix organizations
* Strong verbal and written communication skills
* University education
* Native knowledge of Swedish and working proficiency in English is mandatory


**Personal qualifications:**
* Autonomous, self-driven and resilient
* Hunting gene, energetic and positive minded
* Structured and able to comply with processes
* Outstanding networking skills are of great importance
* Open and transparent mindset, honest team-player


 At Thales we provide CAREERS and not only jobs. With Thales employing 80,000 employees in 68 countries our mobility policy enables thousands of employees each year to develop their careers at home and abroad, in their existing areas of expertise or by branching out into new fields. Together we believe that embracing flexibility is a smarter way of working. Great journeys start here, apply now!

title: Principal Technical Program Manager, AWS Digital Sovereignty & European Sovereign CloudDigital
description:
**Description**
 AWS is building the future of sovereign cloud computing. As a Principal Technical Program Manager on our Digital Sovereignty team, you will drive strategic programs that enable AWS customers to maintain control over their data while leveraging the full power of AWS cloud services.
   

  

 You will work directly with the Director of Digital Sovereignty and Managing Director of European Sovereign Cloud to orchestrate technical workstreams that support our global strategy and initiatives.
   

  

 This role requires deep technical expertise, strategic thinking, and the ability to influence without authority across a complex, matrixed organization. You will own technology roadmaps, manage portfolios of programs, and drive execution of initiatives with broad cross-organizational impact. You will also help the director to prioritize his external engagements.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Strategic Leadership
   

  

* Develop annual strategic plans that align cross-functional technical contributors toward unified business outcomes
* Identify gaps and opportunities across countries, architectures, and organizations
* Influence organizational technical priorities and business strategy through data-driven contributions
* Maintain and foster executive relationships at Director and Vice President levels
* Collaborates with the Director and Go-To-Market team to plan, prepare, and execute high-impact executive customer engagements, ensuring technical discussions are tailored, well-coordinated, and aligned to customer priorities


 Program Execution
   

  

* Lead global programs and coordinate efforts across matrixed teams of Solution Architects, Technical Business Developers, Technical Program Managers, and Account Managers
* Drive execution through influence and collaboration, providing technical guidance and mentorship without direct reporting relationships
* Define clear, measurable goals and success metrics aligned with internal Amazon customer needs across diverse business units
* Assess risks, anticipate bottlenecks, provide escalation management, and make tradeoffs between business needs and technical constraints
* Manage team outcomes and cross-functional deliverables using Salesforce and tracking mechanisms


 Cross-Functional Collaboration
   

  

* Foster deep collaboration with AWS service teams (EC2, S3, Global Networking, Bedrock), Infrastructure, Partners, and Professional Services
* Orchestrate cross-functional initiatives that accelerate innovation and customer outcomes
* Facilitate knowledge sharing and best practice development across technical contributors
* Build organizational capability and ensure consistent approaches to complex technical challenges


 Technical Excellence
   

  

* Bring strong, data-driven, and strategic technical judgment to decisions
* Lead design, implementation, and delivery of highly complex cross-functional projects in ambiguous or new technology areas
* Create scalable mechanisms, methodologies, and best practices for the organization
* Recognize and actively steer teams away from prior technology failure patterns
* Write effective narratives (PRFAQs, strategic documentation) and present to senior leadership
* Provides technical review and input to support the go-to-market team in developing, scaling, and maintaining internal and external technical enablement materials, ensuring accuracy and technical credibility across internal and external audiences


**About The Team**
 About Digital Sovereignty at AWS?
   

  

 AWS has prioritized sovereignty since our beginning as the only major cloud provider allowing customers to control the location and movement of their data. Digital sovereignty means different things across countries and regions—there is no single definition. Through conversations with customers, analysts, and regulators, we have identified key themes: data residency and security, operator access restriction, resiliency and survivability, and independence and transparency.
   

  

 The AWS European Sovereign Cloud represents our commitment to meeting the evolving sovereignty requirements of EU customers. Learn more:https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/aws/in-the-works-aws-european-sovereign-cloud/
   

  

 Why AWS?
   

  

 Work-Life Harmony We value work-life balance. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why flexibility is part of our working culture.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth We continuously raise our performance bar as we strive to become Earth's Best Employer. You'll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship, and career-advancing resources to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.
   

  

 Diverse Experiences Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all preferred qualifications, we encourage you to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn't followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don't let it stop you from applying.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Experience in project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management
* Experience developing strategies that influence leadership decisions at the organizational level
* 8+ years experience with Bachelor's degree, or 5+ years with Master's degree or equivalent experience
* Experience in digital sovereignty, regulated industry, public sectors, regulators, European data regulations and certifications (GDPR, C5, SecNumCloud, etc).
* Demonstrated experience building processes and working with software development teams
* Experience leading creation, revision, and improvement of standard operational procedures (SOPs).


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in information security and compliance
* Master's degree in a technical field
* Experience presenting to senior leadership
* Experience defining KPIs and SLAs used to scale businesses and provide reporting to senior leadership
* Strong sense of ownership and ability to promote operational excellence
* Deep knowledge of core system technologies or broad understanding of company systems and technologies


 Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.
   

  

 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 - AWS EMEA SARL (Sweden Branch) - G54
   

  

 Job ID: A10412270

title: SEO & AI Content Platform Manager
description:
*At Aceve, we empower the builders of society and transform the construction and skilled trades industry—one of the least digitalized sectors in Europe. As a united SaaS powerhouse, we bring together leading products into a single pioneering platform dedicated to making a difference.
   

  

 With over 900 passionate employees and more than €100 million in revenue, we blend tradition and innovation to reshape our industry’s future. Our cloud-based, AI-driven software solutions deliver actionable insights and drive improvements for construction companies and skilled tradespeople, enhancing project management, installations, maintenance, and services.
   

  

 On our ambitious growth journey, we are committed to winning together and accelerating digital transformation. With Aceve’s tools, our customers can boost their performance, productivity, and profitability, ensuring they thrive in a rapidly changing landscape.
   

  

 Join us in revolutionizing the industry and building a brighter future together!*
**About The Role**
 We’re looking for an experienced and forward-thinking SEO & AI Content Platform Manager to own and scale our organic growth across seven markets. This is not a traditional SEO role — you’ll define how we win in both search and AI-powered answer engines, while serving as the product owner of our AI-driven content platform. Sitting at the intersection of strategy, automation, and global content operations, you’ll play a critical role in how Aceve grows its inbound presence and integrates new acquisitions at scale.
   

  

**What Will You Do**
 You’ll lead our organic growth strategy end-to-end, combining deep SEO expertise with a builder’s mindset for AI and automation. Your work will span markets, teams, and technologies — here’s what that looks like in practice:
   

  

* Own and lead the global SEO and GEO strategy across on-page, off-page, and technical pillars for seven markets and languages, defining and executing roadmaps that drive organic visibility and inbound lead volume
* Define and execute an Answer Engine Optimization (AEO/GEO) strategy to improve visibility across AI-powered search experiences, including generative results and agentic interfaces such as ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews
* Stay hands-on with technical site health — audits, performance monitoring, and structured data — working with web development and external partners to implement improvements
* Lead the SEO and content integration of newly acquired companies into the Aceve web presence, designing and implementing automated workflows to streamline domain migrations, content consolidation, and structural alignment at scale
* Own our agentic content platform as a product: define the roadmap, requirements, and success metrics, while training and continuously improving the platform to scale content production, optimization, and experimentation
* Establish governance standards and quality frameworks for AI-generated content across markets, and partner with content and product marketing to deeply integrate AI and automation into the full content lifecycle — from brief to publish
* Collaborate with content, product marketing, and local teams to scale high-impact, intent-aligned content, and support local teams with keyword research, topic planning, and market-specific optimization strategies


**We Believe You Have**
* 4+ years of experience in SEO, ideally in a B2B SaaS and/or multi-market environment
* A proven track record of driving organic traffic and inbound lead growth through both technical SEO and content strategy
* Hands-on experience with AI content tools, prompt engineering, or agentic workflows — you’ve built or operated AI-assisted content systems
* Practical understanding of Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and how to optimize for visibility and sentiment in AI-generated responses
* Experience with multilingual SEO setups, including hreflang configuration, CMS workflows, and consistent metadata management
* Strong analytical skills with fluency in GA4, Search Console, SEMrush, Screaming Frog, or similar platforms
* Excellent cross-functional collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively with content, development, and regional teams


**Bonus Points For**
* Experience designing or owning automation workflows, or familiarity with headless CMS platforms such as Payload
* Prior experience with M&A web integration, domain migration projects, or understanding of how SEO integrates with SEM, CRO, and demand generation strategy


**Not ticking every box?** 
 No worries! We value potential and drive, so apply anyway or connect with us- you might be just what we're looking for in our growing organisation! Join Aceve and take your expertise to the next level, together we are redefining what’s possible in craft and construction solutions!
   

  

*Aceve is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Our selection process is conducted continuously and without discrimination, ensuring an equal opportunity for all candidates.*
 Aceve is in business to back the builders of society. With over 900 employees, 100 million € in revenue and extensive experience in the field, we combine tradition and tech to provide a pioneering platform that helps our customers to achieve more.

title: Principal Software Engineer- Privileged Access & Infrastructure
description:
**What You Will Do**
* Build and operate cloud-native, security-critical platform services on AWS.
* Take ownership of complex systems end-to-end, from design through production operation.
* Contribute to technical direction and architectural decisions for the team's services.
* Work across multiple languages (Python, Go, TypeScript) adapting to the right tool for each problem.
